name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: This victory happened because you spoke out.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It hasn’t even been 48 hours and Trump is already backing down from his unconstitutional power grab.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250129-4714-footer&t=1&akid=4714%2E420207%2EmcdQa0)
Peter, it hasn’t even been 48 hours and Trump is already backing down from his unconstitutional power grab:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250129?refcode=em20250129-4714&amount=3&refcode2=4714_420207_mcdQa0&akid=4714%2E420207%2EmcdQa0)
Donald Trump came after the working people of this country and we all stood up, fought back, and he and his billionaire advisers backed down. It’s a victory — and a game plan for the next few years.
**Democrats may not have majorities in Congress, but that doesn’t mean we’re powerless, Peter. Together, we made it clear that we will not stand by while Trump’s billionaire buddies loot our government.**
But, this is just the start. This whole head-spinning saga was a preview of what the implementation of Trump’s Project 2025 will look like.
Pramila is committed to fighting against Trump’s MAGA agenda with everything she’s got until he’s out of the White House for good — and she’s counting on your help to do it.
[**Will you pitch in $3 before Friday’s deadline to help us reach our $20,000 end-of-month goal? Together we can continue to grow our movement and elect a government that puts working people — not billionaires — first.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250129?refcode=em20250129-4714&amount=3&refcode2=4714_420207_mcdQa0&akid=4714%2E420207%2EmcdQa0)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250129?amount=3&refcode=em20250129-4714&refcode2=4714_420207_mcdQa0&akid=4714%2E420207%2EmcdQa0)**
Together, we can fight back against Trump’s future unlawful actions. Our Constitution and our country demand it.
In solidarity,
Pramila HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250129-4714-footer&t=2&refcode2=4714_420207_mcdQa0&akid=4714%2E420207%2EmcdQa0)**

name: Kristen McDonald Rivet
subject: This isn’t just incompetence, it’s cruelty.
body:
|
#
Friend, I came to Congress to solve real problems. But it turns out my first crisis...

**Cleaning up the Administration's giant mess.**

On Monday night, the Trump administration issued a reckless order freezing federal funds on essential services. Chaos ensued here in Michigan, with organizations and families worried the programs they rely on would disappear.

Child care centers were led to believe they were on the brink of closing. Food programs for seniors and kids were ready to shut the doors. First responders were left unsure if they’d get the equipment needed to keep Mid-Michigan safe.

The phones at our offices were ringing off the hook from folks desperate for clarity, and while the memo was rescinded this morning, the damage had already been done.

**Folks, this isn’t just incompetence, it’s cruelty. And it’s the American people who are paying the price.**

I'm doing everything in my power to demand accountability and stop these cruel attacks on essential services, but I can't do this alone:

[**Friday marks my first fundraising deadline since being sworn into Congress. name: Justice Democrats
subject: How to stand up to AIPAC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, did you
know that AIPAC and its affiliated groups spent a staggering $126.9
million in the last election?

A new report from Sludge found that AIPAC funneled this money to
“lawmakers who approved military aid packages for Israel’s war in Gaza.”

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250129?refcode=em20250129-36376&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=36376_1203867_0CpHg-&akid=36376%2E1203867%2E0CpHg- ]Headline from readsludge.com: 'Here Is All the Money AIPAC Spent on the
2024 Elections'

Justice Democrats Cori Bush and Jamaal Bowman were top targets of this
unprecedented spending. AIPAC backed their primary opponents, who support
unconditional military aid for Israel’s genocidal war in Palestine and
passing massive giveaways for large corporations.

We cannot sit by while special interests like AIPAC buy votes in Congress
– that’s why we launched our 2026 Candidate Recruitment campaign.

We’re getting to work finding and supporting candidates who will fight for
the working class, stand up to AIPAC, and grow our progressive coalition
in Congress.

The work of electing the next generation of working-class, progressive
leaders in 2026 starts now – and we need your help if we’re going to
overcome AIPAC’s massive spending.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250129?refcode=em20250129-36376&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36376_1203867_0CpHg-&akid=36376%2E1203867%2E0CpHg- ]Can you chip in $5 to Justice Democrats today to
kickstart our 2026 candidate recruitment,
Peter? We only have two days
left to reach our goal of raising $100,000 before the month ends, and
every cent will count in 2026.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250129?refcode=em20250129-36376&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36376_1203867_0CpHg-&akid=36376%2E1203867%2E0CpHg- ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250129-36376-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36376_1203867_0CpHg-&akid=36376%2E1203867%2E0CpHg-

| Peter,

President Trump’s reckless move on Monday to pause all federal aid caused confusion for Virginians, including those counting on assistance in the wake of Hurricane Helene.
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101203518/525246045/1993432096?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-01-29_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTQ2MGI2ZTYtOWVkZS1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WlPm-fY4-bBs3yvq2lj53S5x30LoTm6usqI-HTuVMvM=)
From healthcare to education to vital infrastructure projects, this freeze put key federal services at risk — services that millions of Virginia families and businesses rely on every day.

Unlike President Trump, I understand the importance of federal programs that provide healthcare, support our schools, and protect working families. Trump pulling taxpayer dollars to slash programs that impact our most vulnerable communities is unacceptable.

While the Trump administration has partially rescinded the order — only after a federal court blocked them — Virginians deserved clarity about this decision from the very beginning, as it led to serious and near instant repercussions for our Commonwealth. This is simply no way to govern.

I will always stand up for Virginians, and I’ll work every day to make sure that we don’t lose the programs that help build strong communities and support working families. [_**But I need your help. name: Letitia James
subject: I won't stand idly by while our Constitution is undermined
disclaimer_text: Paid for by James for NY 2026
body:
Together, we can stop these bad actors once and for all
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101203636/525247610/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1800-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFkODU0MC05ZmRlLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dW2oGPV_GBrF98fFSNc1BqRdwxxTIv6oL5ejAJdjEgQ=)

Peter, in the face of every attempt to strip away our most fundamental freedoms or undermine the constitutional rights we hold dear, I ask myself one question:**_Who will fight back if we don't?_**
That's why as your attorney general, I’ve made it my mission to uphold the Constitution. To resist those who think that they're above accountability. And to protect the people of New York from actions that threaten our democracy. **Because upholding our rights, defending our progress, and standing up for justice is just too important to leave to chance.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101203637/525247611/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1800-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFkODU0MC05ZmRlLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dW2oGPV_GBrF98fFSNc1BqRdwxxTIv6oL5ejAJdjEgQ=)
Whether it's fighting back against an extremely far-right agenda, protecting reproductive freedom, or thwarting unconstitutional overreach, I will always fight to ensure our voices are heard, our rights are preserved, and our futures remain bright.

**But I can't do it alone.**
**[With a critical $15,000 end-of-month goal upon us, I'm asking for your support to keep this fight going. Can I count on you to chip in $5 or more today to help me fight back against a far-right agenda and protect the progress we've fought so hard to achieve?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101203638/525247612/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1800-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFkODU0MC05ZmRlLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dW2oGPV_GBrF98fFSNc1BqRdwxxTIv6oL5ejAJdjEgQ=)**

With your support, I’ve already taken decisive action: I’ve defended voting access and taken down efforts to try and suppress Black and brown voices.

I’ve held corporations accountable for taking advantage of hard-working families.

And I’ve fought to protect reproductive rights and ensure New Yorkers are able to get the health care they deserve.
But these important fights are far from over, Peter.

**The challenges we face require all of us to step up and do our part to ****safeguard the rights of future generations****, protect our democracy, and ****fend off efforts to undermine our Constitution****. And I need to know that you're with me for the long haul.**
**[Will you stand by me in this moment with your donation before midnight on Jan. 31? Every dollar you give toward my $15,000 goal helps send the message to these corrupt forces that we're not afraid to take them on.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101203643/525247806/-2022258813?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1800-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTg0OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZjFkODU0MC05ZmRlLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dW2oGPV_GBrF98fFSNc1BqRdwxxTIv6oL5ejAJdjEgQ=)**
Thank you for standing by me. Together, we can ensure that our Constitution remains a living promise to every American.
Letitia James

I’ve held corporations accountable for taking advantage of hard-working families. And I’ve fought to protect reproductive rights and ensure New Yorkers are able to get the health care they deserve. But these important fights are far from over, Peter. The challenges we face require all of us to step up and do our part to safeguard the rights of future generations, protect our democracy, and fend off efforts to undermine our Constitution. And I need to know that you're with me for the long haul. = Thank you for standing by me. Together, we can ensure that our Constitution remains a living promise to every American. Letitia James | With so many tough and crucial fights ahead, I am counting on people like you to fuel my fight for justice, progress, and true equality. Will you make a monthly donation to make sure I can continue using the full power of the Attorney General's office to make a difference for everyday people and families? | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. James for NY 2026 PO Box 20656 Brooklyn, NY 11202 United States | | Paid for by James for NY 2026

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: We’re running out of time
body:
| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Patriot,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=646efd4d4bd842a789ec298017422251&_e=CN4uGDkeciCzqho8wc4ErMJik0n9BnBum3unmn2Cm5YcaRrwGliT5PIx_y5oGgocXIQT39rREWtv4QKyTEEDiUXi_asUkpg1A8QhRW75MrcELJ55djd-AE9d9PdGO0gVz1ekY7sO3gwxFy9AOcfH5r7-ycIV4tmDvDy3T_lFTa9h9DwHIMwiPGHD0ravfgkZe95kwlfuH7gXHuZHZNvZWYfWu4gZ9DTGpuzFSL5A1ZwmYtedKUUdQe6uq6XECqSzZgeFhOGavhYoTaNyLFKiLIAfyKn0tzcUz8OAxK6Ga-4Zf-owkXOU7Tay_Ud0M2Xvu4SovJDNsWg3uCSLBNZyqtdd6IzbMUbqnJ4EtLI2vSA-vZ3yAFL8RkXChjxlE01Z)
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=646efd4d4bd842a789ec298017422251&_e=CN4uGDkeciCzqho8wc4ErMJik0n9BnBum3unmn2Cm5YcaRrwGliT5PIx_y5oGgocXIQT39rREWtv4QKyTEEDiUXi_asUkpg1A8QhRW75MrcELJ55djd-AE9d9PdGO0gVz1ekY7sO3gwxFy9AOcfH5r7-ycIV4tmDvDy3T_lFTa9h9DwHIMwiPGHD0ravfgkZe95kwlfuH7gXHuZHZNvZWYfWu4gZ9DTGpuzFSL5A1ZzrruUcYRiy-io_mZVFS-l_SdcxkVNbOl3lxge72wIN00mbhrJIDRRqBryTMani51tJgeVOR1IZplP3CRlgmNKt0aqXc3hhxbBpyX3tdzKxR0e0HroobSuAVZ31ttzHKPNJBy2wG2KM41Mt1Xg0lI-X)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=646efd4d4bd842a789ec298017422251&_e=CN4uGDkeciCzqho8wc4ErMJik0n9BnBum3unmn2Cm5YcaRrwGliT5PIx_y5oGgocXIQT39rREWtv4QKyTEEDiUXi_asUkpg1A8QhRW75MrcELJ55djd-AE9d9PdGO0gVz1ekY7sO3gwxFy9AOcfH5r7-ycIV4tmDvDy3T_lFTa9h9DwHIMwiPGHD0ravfgkZe95kwlfuH7gXHuZHZNvZWYfWu4gZ9DTGpuzFSL5A1Zwmdwi-6gIdxBRY_VJV5H2-WNxpCtT57E7SdoXWRhdqf_yZ4sfNQ2gDfDJ19TPQS4iCRVIARn6pCTDVnodhQSetRIbcTMKXyUZzGwBd9CCm3E0lQs9Oa9Mhk0Sa67O2T3PmwHPoUO3ESjqDTvuKQ4jS)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in less than two weeks and already, the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=646efd4d4bd842a789ec298017422251&_e=CN4uGDkeciCzqho8wc4ErMJik0n9BnBum3unmn2Cm5YcaRrwGliT5PIx_y5oGgocXIQT39rREWtv4QKyTEEDiUXi_asUkpg1A8QhRW75MrcELJ55djd-AE9d9PdGO0gVz1ekY7sO3gwxFy9AOcfH5r7-ycIV4tmDvDy3T_lFTa9h9DwHIMwiPGHD0ravfgkZe95kwlfuH7gXHuZHZNvZWYfWu4gZ9DTGpuzFSL5A1Zy6q47xisvElYhuR2pWfLUVnNkvpqDQqxaNOjHzyYqjdMQrYEk3MDUSLmQIQ2OHthO86-Gp4fZGT059tX5BR-FYoXTYRxWsqeMvLImt0LF1ggMyWmjh-qZp7kTCxsM46zY4zlHxEoeIFC9etxaPKn9d)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=646efd4d4bd842a789ec298017422251&_e=CN4uGDkeciCzqho8wc4ErMJik0n9BnBum3unmn2Cm5YcaRrwGliT5PIx_y5oGgocXIQT39rREWtv4QKyTEEDiUXi_asUkpg1A8QhRW75MrcELJ55djd-AE9d9PdGO0gVz1ekY7sO3gwxFy9AOcfH5r7-ycIV4tmDvDy3T_lFTa9h9DwHIMwiPGHD0ravfgkZe95kwlfuH7gXHuZHZNvZWYfWu4gZ9DTGpuzFSL5A1ZzP6G0ljxtSYnp-HKM5sJLSaWBVuxx46OaecUEkwZq1M8KFcFAi0Zj_7BKVchOIOfFnt658p0TCwPQU1Ci0Jr4Ciliqbni2IXC2DJFDyk-4xpzJikImr8LHbniL4f5JqRGF3RiUoXL42PpYxDGIM1GV) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=646efd4d4bd842a789ec298017422251&_e=CN4uGDkeciCzqho8wc4ErMJik0n9BnBum3unmn2Cm5YcaRrwGliT5PIx_y5oGgocXIQT39rREWtv4QKyTEEDiUXi_asUkpg1A8QhRW75MrcELJ55djd-AE9d9PdGO0gVz1ekY7sO3gwxFy9AOcfH5r7-ycIV4tmDvDy3T_lFTa9h9DwHIMwiPGHD0ravfgkZe95kwlfuH7gXHuZHZNvZWYfWu4gZ9DTGpuzFSL5A1Zx3e396xChTu3WBj5Y84rHKqVehQKqBpYeRQ_Z2Uo6WtGd3ZK245kLaELEWufWvdIFJ6WPqWE6E-tSuFcPqwRMmB-5sjoaRnOaxZY0fYgxy0f50dw7hdOymWd2jsyw9gTxpxeEjqNVkcWl4tZbldTDM) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_
---

name: Gingrich, Newt
subject: Hey – it’s Newt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
I truly can’t think of a better way to kick off President Trump's second term, but this is going to require a NATIONWIDE effort.
I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second.
| |
---
| | | This is the most serious call I've made in a while - and it's to you, Friend.

Hey, this is Newt Gingrich. I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms:

_Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second._

_Yes, we took back the Senate ... Yes, we saved the House... And yes, we re-elected President Trump..._

But in doing so, we emptied our ENTIRE warchest to support President Trump in battleground states, win swing races, and drive the Democrat Party into ruin in 2024. As a direct result of these strategic investments, our budgets are now running on FUMES!

**And to make matters worse, Axios just reported that the Democrat Machine is unloading $10,000,000 to obliterate our House Majority and barge back into power ASAP.**

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to launch a major rebuilding effort for House Republicans to refill our warchest with ONE MILLION DOLLARS. _**[Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before the end of the month?](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82f45560b3a044879b0af409be16ab16&_e=sv46ipMU6Jkjwn54CEnNGyYsO9URLryaAxD0VXnwfcOfRKkLuDPFOtVDzCBZBq_LLArYHYCrBjc1lERAx_yOZO7Gv-MGfZ8XbCRjdjtRW7SY9LHpUBX4kpqhvKARLzIE9TMgS5JgVNQuB7jwfA3uM4_rLTpIgriRGyk27GJXzIzMceGiFYfEH0hzDHpw7vxI076Q7fG5mi99WOOrT-6q2cnnOsJvQJihURLqjRZrPKGnyS4genito4PljhGVCfL66yp1VHElr5iHIkY-M5WDF657wr6NHgN_NOTWFomDVrS7_yQagxMW1tf7PZBB0vGaZKwk-AGJhJAydAwGUjazFG-Go5NMtRpMrQ5XC4wBaJtYQiAzmJZRhRhqNM0Owo8_ "Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before Inauguration Day?")**_

* * *
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82f45560b3a044879b0af409be16ab16&_e=sv46ipMU6Jkjwn54CEnNGyYsO9URLryaAxD0VXnwfcOfRKkLuDPFOtVDzCBZBq_LLArYHYCrBjc1lERAx_yOZO7Gv-MGfZ8XbCRjdjtRW7SY9LHpUBX4kpqhvKARLzIE9TMgS5JgVNQuB7jwfA3uM4_rLTpIgriRGyk27GJXzIzMceGiFYfEH0hzDHpw7vxI076Q7fG5mi99WOOrT-6q2cnnOsJvQJihURLqjRZrPKGyGWBYTAkrZkJNXCwXRAt1VhZbKLUigP2mqgv965xAbwUooD8V7W9MxiahagEWTD_3Z-VL7WuiIhALMF53IU7MWsyqhf0pq7FciS00s5kchBhrnN_i8uIte_ulqX0tdY8yfRAyOCKlbz-NRMLErHOt "I'm calling on you for help")

GOAL: **ONE MILLION DOLLARS**
DEADLINE: **JANUARY 31**
| | [PLEASE DONATE NOW](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82f45560b3a044879b0af409be16ab16&_e=sv46ipMU6Jkjwn54CEnNGyYsO9URLryaAxD0VXnwfcOfRKkLuDPFOtVDzCBZBq_LLArYHYCrBjc1lERAx_yOZO7Gv-MGfZ8XbCRjdjtRW7SY9LHpUBX4kpqhvKARLzIE9TMgS5JgVNQuB7jwfA3uM4_rLTpIgriRGyk27GJXzIzMceGiFYfEH0hzDHpw7vxI076Q7fG5mi99WOOrT-6q2cnnOsJvQJihURLqjRZrPKGL_MhBfMXB8UfIvyjA0spEDm_uKTpDqU4_LAu6sppkr1YU8phHtvBx6EhvjfgCcs77XAtSb-ddtRbiFUF7GamUW_2kPMskTJqdnq3md9f8npflPtFmhHTEBOVjfMS-RjY1hrT4kehyC0DO8Udfd6tr " PLEASE DONATE NOW")
---
* * *

I truly can't think of a better way to kick off President Trump's second term, but this is going to require a NATIONWIDE effort.

It's a lofty goal but I'm not one to back down when the odds are against us.

_**[So please: Pitch in right here and now to help us hit our goal before January is over and done with.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=82f45560b3a044879b0af409be16ab16&_e=sv46ipMU6Jkjwn54CEnNGyYsO9URLryaAxD0VXnwfcOfRKkLuDPFOtVDzCBZBq_LLArYHYCrBjc1lERAx_yOZO7Gv-MGfZ8XbCRjdjtRW7SY9LHpUBX4kpqhvKARLzIE9TMgS5JgVNQuB7jwfA3uM4_rLTpIgriRGyk27GJXzIzMceGiFYfEH0hzDHpw7vxI076Q7fG5mi99WOOrT-6q2cnnOsJvQJihURLqjRZrPKExx8j9TuRy0ojfsB1W2Q5PMTcJYg4TlT01GQgYLs8Pj_5kKR8L7hh3cR-cDTvhbX5hgIOpjL-HF-oURaljHe93oJkS1VSYX3YmAwnk1_VQMpTn4FndCkniVM2eNjPClhLZHZu_VdiVst2TxIBR5LPg "So please: Pitch in right here and now to help us hit our goal before President Trump is sworn in. ")**_

I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second. | | | | | This is the most serious call I've made in a while - and it's to you, Friend. Hey, this is Newt Gingrich. I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second. Yes, we took back the Senate ... Yes, we saved the House... And yes, we re-elected President Trump... But in doing so, we emptied our ENTIRE warchest to support President Trump in battleground states, win swing races, and drive the Democrat Party into ruin in 2024. As a direct result of these strategic investments, our budgets are now running on FUMES! And to make matters worse, Axios just reported that the Democrat Machine is unloading $10,000,000 to obliterate our House Majority and barge back into power ASAP. That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to launch a major rebuilding effort for House Republicans to refill our warchest with ONE MILLION DOLLARS. name: Gage Hoekstra
subject: Indiana GOP Statement on Governor Mike Braun's State of the State Address
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE INDIANA REPUBLICAN STATE COMMITTEE
body:
| | |
---
| | **For Immediate Release:** January 29, 2025

**Contact:** Gage Hoekstra, Press Secretary, **[ghoekstra@indiana.gop](mailto:greid@indiana.gop "greid@indiana.gop")**

**Statement from Indiana GOP Regarding Governor Braun’s State of the State Address** **INDIANAPOLIS (January 29, 2025)** – Indiana Republican Chairwoman Erin Lucas released the following statement regarding Governor Braun’s State of the State address on January 29, 2025.

**“Governor Braun's speech served as both a reminder of why Hoosiers voted overwhelmingly to put him in office and of his commitment to keeping the promises he campaigned on,"** said Indiana Republican Party Chairwoman Erin Lucas.**** **"Governor Braun's administration has already taken decisive action to deliver on his Freedom and Opportunity agenda, issuing executive orders to combat government waste and corruption, reduce healthcare costs, and protect our communities. Tonight, Governor Braun pledged to work tirelessly with our representatives in the Statehouse to bring tax relief, improve government efficiency, enhance public safety, increase economic development, deliver affordable healthcare, and build upon our education system.** **"These common-sense priorities represent the concerns and aspirations of everyday Hoosiers, and our party is proud to stand by leaders who champion those priorities."** ###

name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: An attack on all Americans
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

We’re only a week in and Donald Trump has shown us who is once again – someone who will always put profits over people. He recently signed an executive order rolling back President Biden’s initiative to lower prescription drug prices and expand access to cell and gene therapies for Medicaid recipients.

This will force families to pay more for life-saving prescriptions and deny Medicaid recipients access to innovative treatments. This is a huge step backwards – and it’s an attack on working families, seniors, and all Americans who rely on affordable prescription medicines. I’ve always been committed to restoring this progress and fighting for legislation that puts patients first, but I can’t do it without you.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Georgia wants to gerrymander with impunity
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
It's simple: The Voting Rights Act was passed to outlaw racial discrimination in elections , including the drawing of districts in ways that effectively blocked minority groups from electing their preferred candidates.
Since the Supreme Court started gutting the VRA more than a decade ago, vote suppressors in state legislatures have used the redistricting process to silence minority voters by gerrymandering them into electoral irrelevance. Now the state of Georgia is fighting in court to win the right to do it with impunity and codify voter suppression into their maps forever.
We must spread the word and continue to fight for fair maps and our right to vote. RUSH $25 or more right now to fuel our work to protect voting rights in Georgia and beyond >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012925_2&amount=25]
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012925_2&amount=25]
Atlanta Voice: Georgia seeks another Supreme Court showdown over Voting Rights Ac [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012925_2&amount=25]
Bad news for all of us, Team: The state of Georgia is seeking another Supreme Court showdown over the Voting Rights Act, asking a federal appeals court to interpret the 1965 law in a way that could make it much harder to prove minority votes have been illegally diluted.
Georgia is trying persuade the judges to make up a new, harder-to-prove standard that could hobble Voting Rights Act lawsuits, less than two years after the U.S. Supreme Court turned back a separate challenge from Alabama to the VRA.
From the AP: " A lawyer for the state asked a three-judge panel of the 11th Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals in Atlanta to overturn a lower court that required lawmakers to draw more Black-majority electoral districts. Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger argued in court filings that the Voting Rights Act is being misused to bolster Democratic election chances and that white voters prefer Republicans for nonracial reasons. "
Opponents of voting rights are hell-bent on dismantling the Voting Rights Act piece by piece and we can't let them. We have to fight in Georgia, Alabama, and beyond to protect our fundamental rights
Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to give us the resources we need to defend our right to vote in the states, in the courts, and in Congress >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012925_2&amount=25]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=012925_2&amount=25]

clean_body: It's simple: The Voting Rights Act was passed to outlaw racial discrimination in elections , including the drawing of districts in ways that effectively blocked minority groups from electing their preferred candidates. Since the Supreme Court started gutting the VRA more than a decade ago, vote suppressors in state legislatures have used the redistricting process to silence minority voters by gerrymandering them into electoral irrelevance. Now the state of Georgia is fighting in court to win the right to do it with impunity and codify voter suppression into their maps forever. We must spread the word and continue to fight for fair maps and our right to vote. RUSH $25 or more right now to fuel our work to protect voting rights in Georgia and beyond >> [] Voter Action Project Logo [] Atlanta Voice: Georgia seeks another Supreme Court showdown over Voting Rights Ac [] Bad news for all of us, Team: The state of Georgia is seeking another Supreme Court showdown over the Voting Rights Act, asking a federal appeals court to interpret the 1965 law in a way that could make it much harder to prove minority votes have been illegally diluted. Georgia is trying persuade the judges to make up a new, harder-to-prove standard that could hobble Voting Rights Act lawsuits, less than two years after the U.S. Supreme Court turned back a separate challenge from Alabama to the VRA. From the AP: " A lawyer for the state asked a three-judge panel of the 11th Circuit U.S. Court of Appeals in Atlanta to overturn a lower court that required lawmakers to draw more Black-majority electoral districts. Georgia’s Republican Secretary of State Brad Raffensperger argued in court filings that the Voting Rights Act is being misused to bolster Democratic election chances and that white voters prefer Republicans for nonracial reasons. " Opponents of voting rights are hell-bent on dismantling the Voting Rights Act piece by piece and we can't let them. We have to fight in Georgia, Alabama, and beyond to protect our fundamental rights Pitch in $25 or whatever you can today to give us the resources we need to defend our right to vote in the states, in the courts, and in Congress >> [] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [] Other Amount [] [] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [] Donate Now [] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). name: Neveen with ParentsTogether
subject: TikTok put my daughter in a wheelchair (sign the petition)
body:
Dangerous TikTok diet content targets kids and promotes eating disorders | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us8.campaign-archive.com/?e=7e921d898f&i=*|ITERATION_UNIQUE_ID|*&u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=2df35a139f)
---
| | _Content Warning: This email discusses eating disorder thoughts and behaviors._ Hi Peter, TikTok almost killed my daughter Mariam. At the low point of her eating disorder, brought on by extreme pro-anorexia TikTok content, Mariam was in heart failure, wheelchair-bound, and on a feeding tube. Her eating disorder was triggered by the constant stream of unrealistically thin bodies and severe food restriction content that TikTok pushed on her. This type of content is incredibly dangerous – anorexia is the deadliest psychiatric disorder, killing 20% of those who are diagnosed. I feel grateful Mariam is now in recovery, and her experience has made me determined to make sure other families don’t go through this.
---
|
#### **That’s why I’m asking TikTok to ban dangerous eating disorder and diet content targeting kids. Will you join me and sign the petition?**
---
| | [Sign the petition](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=77860f424d&e=7e921d898f&i=088d60400e "Sign the petition")
---
| Like a lot of young people, Mariam was insecure about her body and began watching a few videos about diet and exercise. But within days, the TikTok algorithm began showing her increasingly extreme content that dominated her feed. TikTok pushed her to “skinny check” challenges where girls would try and fit in a baby swing, dangerously low-calorie “what I eat in a day” videos, and places where kids compete in the comments to see whose weight was lowest. As a parent, I tried setting up safeguards and even taking away her phone, but I was fighting a losing battle against a highly-addictive, powerful platform determined to keep my child watching at any cost. Today, Mariam is working hard in recovery, and she has a long road ahead of her. She directly attributes the severity of her disease to the constant stream of unrealistic bodies and pro-disordered eating content on social media. We need TikTok to stop pushing this dangerous content to children – their lives are literally at stake. [Add your name to the petition asking TikTok to ban dangerous eating disorder and diet content targeting kids here. ](https://parents-together.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1c4af7e0c2cf6603f994addd7&id=a2be4b518a&e=7e921d898f&i=088d60400e)
---
| Thanks for all you do, **Neveen with ParentsTogether**
---

name: Josh W. (D-Florida)
subject: This teacher just WON his primary!
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-weil?refcode=250129em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-weil?refcode=250129em]
Hi there, it’s Josh Weil. I’m a teacher 📝 and a Democrat running against Trump’s handpicked extremist in FL-6.
I’m overwhelmed with gratitude today. Thanks to your support, we just won our primary, making me the official Democratic Nominee in FL-06.
This victory wouldn’t have been possible without the grassroots energy that powered our campaign, and I am so incredibly thankful for every person who believed in me and this movement.
But now, the real fight begins.
Can I count on you to chip in $25, $50, or whatever you can to help us take on Trump’s hand-picked MAGA crony, Randy Fine, in the general election? Every dollar is going to be critical in these next 80 days. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-weil?refcode=250129em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-weil?refcode=250129em]
Nobody expected a public school teacher to achieve this. But we did it with the help of people like you who know what’s at stake.
And now, we’re taking on Trump’s handpicked crony, Randy Fine. We’re going to beat him, stop MAGA extremism in its tracks, and flip this seat into Democratic hands.
Momentum is on our side, but we need to keep it up. The next 60 days will decide the future of Florida’s 6th District. With Trump’s agenda at stake, the MAGA machine will stop at nothing to crush us.
Let’s prove them wrong. Become a Founding Donor to my General Election campaign: Chip in whatever you can right now to help us keep the momentum going and WIN this fight! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-weil?refcode=250129em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24-weil?refcode=250129em]
This is our moment. Thank you for standing with me. We couldn’t have done this without you.
Gratefully,
Josh Weil
Democrat for Florida’s 6th
Tobias Read is Oregon's Secretary of State. To support him directly, please donate here. [https://www.tobiasread.com]
Josh Weil is running for Congress in an upcoming special election in Florida's 6th District. You can support him directly here. [https://www.joshweil.us/]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

Friends of Tobias Read (5208)
PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

name: Mark Warner
subject: Tomorrow I will question Tulsi Gabbard…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101205481/525281674/-317235110?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Gabbard_250129_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjJmN2FiYi1hOWRlLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-rw-VQRngGB_27RVB0_EF0xAT9E9oUzg3HMY_PKtoeE=) It’s a big day tomorrow, Derek. In the morning, I’m headed to the Senate Select Committee on Intelligence to question Tulsi Gabbard, Donald Trump’s nominee for Director of National Intelligence.

This committee, where I’m Vice Chairman, is responsible for solving a lot of our country’s most pressing issues – think election security, artificial intelligence and more – and works closely with the Director of National Intelligence. Look, I won’t get too into the weeds, Derek, but the point is, this role Trump nominated Gabbard for is an extraordinarily important one.

I have a lot of questions to ask Gabbard because I have questions about her viability as a nominee.

[_**I’m committed to getting the truth on behalf of all Virginians and Americans so we can build a safer, more secure country. If you’re with me, chip in anything you can ahead of my hearing tomorrow >>**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101205482/525281675/-317235110?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Gabbard_250129_T1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjJmN2FiYi1hOWRlLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-rw-VQRngGB_27RVB0_EF0xAT9E9oUzg3HMY_PKtoeE=)

Thank you,

Mark Warner

name: Adam Schiff
subject: This is not how you make America great
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=8275%2E5257348%2EO29Sc9)
Folks, Earlier this week, Donald Trump ordered a pause on all federal grants and loans. Chaos ensued. And fear. That was the point. A judge blocked the order from taking effect — and the White House hastily rescinded the order hours later. But in that in-between period, communities across our state and the country were left scrambling. We still never got answers to some of the most fundamental questions, like: _Will Medicaid cover health care for the nearly 15 million Californians who rely on the plan?_ _Will fire departments, who worked overtime to put out the Eaton, Hughes, and Palisades fires, be cut off from funding?_ _Will children who rely on free meals at school go hungry?_ _Will FEMA be able to provide relief for communities devastated by the recent wildfires?_ _Will veterans and homeless people lose benefits and have to seek shelter elsewhere?_ If Trump wants to “make America great again,” it is _certainly_ not by doing this. [**And Democrats need to fight this, because the Trump administration has made it clear, they will try it again until they starve the government.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2025_abs_em.slA1qC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240129_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=4&akid=8275%2E5257348%2EO29Sc9) And why? So they can divert the federal resources Americans depend on to fund tax cuts for wealthy people and large corporations. With a single order, we saw the extent to which the White House is able to dramatically impact the lives of millions of people across the country — in red and blue states, in rural and urban communities, from all walks of life. I will not let millions of Californians and Americans be harmed as the White House works to appease Elon Musk and other ultra-wealthy advisors. We’re going to fight back — today and every day — and I won’t rest until vital programs like Medicaid, disaster relief, and public safety are protected. More soon, Adam [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/5035?refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240129_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8275%2E5257348%2EO29Sc9) | | Adam is fighting for our rights, our freedoms, and our democracy in the U.S. Senate. [**Chip in to stand with Adam as he fights for truth and progress.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2025_abs_em.slA1qC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240129_PM2_V1_S1&email=&amount=10&t=6&akid=8275%2E5257348%2EO29Sc9) | [DONATE ](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2025_abs_em.slA1qC&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_RES_AC90_20240129_PM2_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8275%2E5257348%2EO29Sc9)
---

clean_body: Look, we aren’t going to sugarcoat anything. . . Peter, Here’s what’s happening – and why your support matters right now: 1️⃣ We’re officially in a new cycle. That means we’re starting from scratch and rebuilding from the ground up to take on what’s ahead. 2️⃣ Republicans control the White House, Senate, and House. The time to hold them accountable is now, not on Election Day. 3️⃣ This is Kim’s first end-of-month deadline under the new Trump administration, which means things are officially about to heat up. But we’re still a ways away from hitting our critical $10,000 end-of-month fundraising goal. These first few weeks of 2025 set the tone for the fights ahead. Starting strong means having the resources to defend our progress and to fight back against the extremists who seem hell-bent on taking away everything from reproductive freedom to affordable healthcare. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Team Schrier Rep. Kim Schrier is a doctor, scientist, and mom, fighting for Washington's 8th District in Congress. name: History Facts
subject: Did Pocahontas really love John Smith?
body:
The cross-cultural relationship between Pocahontas and Captain John Smith, originally documented with minimal romantic elements by the latter, has been twisted and reformulated enough times that most people have little idea of the true nature of their connection.
---

name: Antisemitism Alerts [via Republican Jewish Coalition]
subject: Antisemitism is running rampant at Columbia University
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican Jewish Coalition
body:
Masked anti-Israel protestors terrorized Jewish students and the Israeli professor teaching the course.

| |
---
| | | Peter,

**On the first day of the spring semester, masked anti-Israel protestors broke into a class about the history of Israel, terrorizing Jewish students and the Israeli professor teaching the course.**

They handed out fliers depicting a boot stamping out a Star of David, along with other antisemitic messages.
_**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH!**_

clean_body: Masked anti-Israel protestors terrorized Jewish students and the Israeli professor teaching the course. | | | | | Peter, On the first day of the spring semester, masked anti-Israel protestors broke into a class about the history of Israel, terrorizing Jewish students and the Israeli professor teaching the course. They handed out fliers depicting a boot stamping out a Star of David, along with other antisemitic messages. ENOUGH IS ENOUGH! "Sign our petition demanding that Columbia lose its federal funding until it eliminates the antisemitic rot on its campus." | | "ADD MY NAME" Urgently, Antisemitism Alerts [via Republican Jewish Coalition] | | "SIGN THE PETITION" | | Paid for by Republican Jewish Coalition 50 F St NW #100 Washington, DC 20001 | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add "info@updates.rjchq.org" to your address book. body:
With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. | | |
---
| |
---|---
**There are _12 special elections_** **over the next three months**. With Trump starting to implement Project 2025, Democrats need to win as many races as possible to protect our rights and combat the right-wing oligarchy taking shape in our country. **_7 states_** **are holding elections that require our immediate attention.** The MAGA movement could easily pour _millions of dollars_ into our Republican counterparts' campaigns, and the only way we can keep up with them is if we have the resources to compete. **_$7 from you_****is all we’re asking for to help fund state Democrats in our fight to secure VICTORY in upcoming elections in states like Minnesota and Pennsylvania.** [Can we count on you to chip in $7 to help state Dems defeat extreme Republicans in the states? ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquD37PtIk9GhRAB5og_YtPf8W_B0xptJi6SYPCTnYZrCrAs2HZ-bYjMk4_ccc18887V_FzP15Do3wcgaLtArTR4IzKjqOcZ28sVaBbdRB5ZX-oV5AU3bt-gb_Dkox99WaKt5byNRMF3N6d7QGK6fnKisHuJ33jmTzvArHHVFvyKciclKIq3NaC-nleRiiDbADHWp68ieU8wGCDkKM8pYbobV6rw-NU-QhD2j7OEif1fk3uqC5Alk02fRfftJGVbIXaP9KhonZQ204e3t36xK4NNa2Qox6rOCMN8bBcG0bbQd95dtLZYUgqRmxzOx4U76tb6wjGjN_Gqelzzqpjx6Nf3JoJyM0CAlEoJQljWutOzz1gR_UHTOmzTSLW4Zdn0wrE/4dl/h4TvsYdAT2yvOgBzeeFP9A/h0/h001.kK-5eWf48QI0KTS18POwMhWPy6m0UftuwSC-UjEBquE) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

subject: CALL TO ACTION: Winner Take All - January 30th🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY]( "PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY")
body:
🚨Time is running OUT!🚨 | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/c7e8a41fc149/n41kepo7ku-12728823?e=25844e23a8)
---
| | [ ](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=03687e73a4&e=25844e23a8)
---
| | **Time is Running OUT!**

**It is imperative that Nebraskans attend or testify in person at the upcoming Subcommittee hearing on[LB3 - Winner Take All](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=fd3cf06f86&e=25844e23a8). The hearing is currently scheduled for Thursday, Jan. 30th @ 1:30 pm - Room #1507. Online testimony to be entered into the record must be submitted and verified by Thursday, Jan. 30th at 8:00 am Central Time.**

[**FOR MORE INFORMATION GO TO OUR WEBSITE - NE.GOP/WTA**](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=31f5cca053&e=25844e23a8)
[](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=ba60e7a381&e=25844e23a8) **Winner Take All **\- Our state Governor, Secretary of State, Auditor, Treasurer, Attorney General and both US Senators serve the whole state and are elected by the whole state. The US President serves the whole state and should be elected that way.

Liberal Dark Money...that's the Political Capital at our Capitol. As long as the "Blue Dot" has value, Green New Deals are coming to your BACKYARD. You may also just submit that you are a proponent if you do not want to write a testimony. **Remember to check your email after submitting testimony to complete the submission process. **Additionally, if you plan to attend the hearing on Thursday, please sign your name as a proponent on the sign-in sheet by the hearing door. You may go to the Legislature's web page for LB3 Winner Take All [HERE](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=1159c7e0fe&e=25844e23a8) and then click on the "Submit Comments Online for LB3" bar to proceed. You may also send your comments of support to the members of the Government, Military and Veterans Affairs Committee. Their contact information may be found [HERE](https://gop.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=320b65f35b&e=25844e23a8). **\--Chairman Eric Underwood
Republican Party of Nebraska**

body:
Seniors will starve, veterans will be out on the streets, our economy will collapse.

| | | | Request Fewer Emails by clicking [here](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/-Do_sDwoiK5sTeFz_g3t1Q~~/AAUS1hA~/qYRySf_gnfNUcUQCP3bdI-d_BBuote3jF2H_0CL9owTQnw8xh60Cr0XixVj9a2AuOW7GswtuNPU5L1KjVKqRvGmSNFrSslE76nky3a0FeL5ZGrle1PX6qC4BKCQtra68jzCLepcXGbgVJwQEE6msDw~~).

Trump is holding the nation’s hospitals, seniors, veterans, and school children HOSTAGE with his illegal power grab.

**Medicaid services are frozen** – 71 million Americans rely on Medicaid for their healthcare.

**Meals on Wheels is not allowed** by Trump to deliver food to 2.2 million seniors.

**Food assistance through SNAP and WIC benefits have been taken away** from 42.1 million Americans, including children and infants.

But that’s not all. **Funding for police, veterans, domestic violence shelters, farmers, schools, healthcare workers** — all gutted. Odds are you or someone you know just had their life turned upside down by Donald Trump and his disdain for the American people.

Forget that it's unconstitutional for a moment – I’ll call it what it really is, Peter – **evil**.

[**Listen, Democrats are locked out of power on the federal level but we still have our voice. Use it, Peter – before it’s too late. Chip in to elect Democrats in 2025 Special Elections, flip the feckless MAGA Majority, and end Trump’s crisis. »**](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/k9cdgZ6LMuVZ4ZsXs6wEKA~~/AAUS1hA~/3Oj1MaqmDzM7Qij7T7qkD7IIEOAlD8OPjgDZ5HS8Mt9D4YG6k7JTnMH9RuVMlczfUx9IJMjpsPJ7K6qFp4pdaOORhpOHgsGvtg1wWD6evdJCS1LmugTBuC7uPTd22037vRiPbSQWGYgM5VoQE9W6z_gij7lY5rpeHTpvXh_vIoUoc4ioR2N4ZDYzQAlO46TUaG68uW0p4mnR0N_hQ0bm4-JWo8A4QYooqGzEDZp0CidvUg9VsZVjpnvI3kM_d5FZUGVkUeXlZnRcdAGwAfPzgE8Vl-COOpcxs3Ob2eMM1k0~) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $7 »](https://go.sparkpostmail1.com/f/a/ppKQA0Y2SVFXTYi5i9yQbQ~~/AAUS1hA~/DMJrZ5cl5fzLmXxWerE9DBwX8WeC9ve0YaLIM0a-2uHtRkC4-vm2sfwSBRwjUCQDJsB52qPiAI-GiaJU9cGDzKnVbzpA4NPx_Je3W_Nh4nEqy4SNo-zTXItoCAgNQq4Uq4mwcZKoRUbGi-CZ1Ii4wkSBAN4Pnb6TMWKiNskz5EUTy_ID1Co7uC9QXppOK7o9QtVlrK7A44cPlGTbilhySyW5Bm2f26hvHQJeo4PfuSO1_ZI9qYoKgWVLiyqwPfzsXcFkuKIZq01jWU6Iu-GNGMyokV3AgjJPMdh-5XwbIeCnEqQPN1B9hMQTCZYXMl36zgQwt3XSztR4kFzhVst-Di21SwhbZhXezSQBjMG6KNdRAEyrZHwoaZMKivSIgdsC)

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zlrio086i7v84i6f3kdesbfjmmbth7634i58lejo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zfht4645kk977lbqoeaaruvvsk9hg80or6g0o1cg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here or the links below to donate.](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zpq1e0sdkcdtn78gjqf6bhmhnqgcq8s4l0t9h1fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)
[](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zuhe5b3marg53jqmbcb23stihg2a2p521pv0r5k8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)
[Donate $25](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z33s4mub4aoubjotmk8mhjclhi5j24liafo958n0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ze4f8kfpsp09cfb79hlakff7jh6l8cdoki318qfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zgbq1cjvdncs4nr0k0rfh14e1i26876cs5n8fceo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zjqgkcr0h6o6sdoic1nmqpcturv9popic4n7vb28_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zp83q26eno2iru6mqituctant5ncsf08em6spvhg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2znvp7du0il333np5vhfo6s1imlg6jb9en1jnb5vo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zq787ipatmol5a4a6ik6742k5ork54ckn48h4a6g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)
We have a proven concept.

We have momentum on our side.

Now, I am humbly asking for your support to expand our ballot-chasing operations this year. As a special thank you, I’ll send you one of our new “47” hats.

Thank you for everything,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

subject: President Trump cannot pardon me in this case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The President can only pardon in federal cases.

The President can only pardon in federal cases.
| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z9hgbd2m8v9gu1l9idt11d07iceeejd3rkjrafng_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h6eor2c9h2bs)
---
**_MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
ATTN: Friend,
---
Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life.
---
_**Unfortunately, because the charges are at the _state_ level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me.**_
---
After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.
---
_If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly!_
---
**And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case.**
---
But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. _I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side._
---
Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia.
---
_**And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival!**_
---

_My cup runneth over!_

**You are truly a blessing from heaven and I can 't express how grateful I am for you.**

When the going got tough, you were my rock.
And now we can enjoy the fruits of our labor together.

_**This is Monica De La Cruz. I 'm the Pro-Trump, Pro-America Conservative Congresswoman who won the most competitive House race in America.**_

The Democrats held my seat in South Texas for over 100 years and NO ONE thought I had a chance of winning.

But with your help, we proved them wrong TOGETHER!

And now we have a strong GOP House Majority ready to deliver on YOUR vision for America.

So to start things off on the right foot, I want to hear from you.

_It would be my honor to get your personal guidance in our brand-new House GOP 2025 Agenda Survey.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0j1gcug6s7v6vdnlidc1njgui3bdha1bbcrrfm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zbqpij5dvjt8mfk48mp2qo1vda87r4n23j9t7opg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here or the links below to donate.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z1c3rejmvdpecqha0fmlvbpt1b8tobap8pji7v4o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zegoc4rs3iatgeeredqhak352sib47vno2e4d4v0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zsrt98sn04s243dkiqvmdcfn8dsdgspattdh2kco_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zrff8tacehfvaj20bv99s2coaignl3ki1ne6c7fg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z8gici5l0c6ivg9s1l5ladqf3ml99hp5ak2hcjg0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdsupkt6bfo929r6vt4bqdf5t47jioq8cutc3jlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7v17h40fqu73682ad2p5mh23fcttcbi7vt10q98_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h61pb2c5h2bs)
We have a proven concept.

We have momentum on our side.

Now, I am humbly asking for your support to expand our ballot-chasing operations this year. As a special thank you, I’ll send you one of our new “47” hats.

Thank you for everything,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. name: Charlie Kirk
subject: My BIG plan
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear.

|
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z156h61olnrvqt612sgp13np9l0rilfsgg07q8p8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)
Friend,

Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC.

I want to personally invite you to be a part of it.

First, let’s recap what we achieved in 2024:
* Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump
* The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump.
* Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress!

Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls.
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zbsd1kjafelmu2dkqlad3m4onvntpie9pk1a9eig_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)
Here is my big plan:

**I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.**

To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive “47” hat for contributing $25 or more.

[Can you donate $25, $50, $100, $250, $500, or ANY amount you can generously afford today? Click here or the links below to donate.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqfqbefchcr05n10123c2pt5mr0ootq9eia5bia0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrf82gl1ag42m6qup6ds6eb31nu34onr31dqib7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)
[Donate $25](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z5fi4g7uahpn1n1tjrjeij6cek3ckdd1vadc3bb0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)

[Donate $50](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z97mikhufujiuv1tlt0g3c2opsklun7d5r88f64g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)

[Donate $100](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp07sn5tun0t6d34vq4o4uisdu0sq5n248fc2ugg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)

[Donate $250](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z030rnintprk624fa5kevaoo3ak0gqemcc93e6s8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)

[Donate $500](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z7j6pmn1jf3ei2am0gh84ptepcehotlev5197fbg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)

[Donate $1,000](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp5sc4cijoec1lt3jram3put09tbtljbetuan4t8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)

[Donate Any Amount](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdv78htah47kkslfkthju4aja5aopie3966li3l8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9h69ob2c9h2bs)
We have a proven concept.

We have momentum on our side.

Now, I am humbly asking for your support to expand our ballot-chasing operations this year. As a special thank you, I’ll send you one of our new “47” hats.

Thank you for everything,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
---

Your America
---

subject: Caught on TAPE: “The Deep State isReal”
body:
Byron was caught on camera explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. Watch here and support

| [](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z1m26j58vars4e88bfbpeerejq1fa8a31pts4ps0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)

Dear Friend,

I've been reluctant to use the term "Deep State" as it sounds so conspiratorial and cloak and dagger.

But it's pretty easy to explain: The Deep State is a portion of 2 million federal workers who choose to obstruct the policies of the President of the United States.

They may not be meeting in secret or even working together. **They are men and women paid by us who choose to work against us to promote their own personal agenda**.

However, I will leave it to Byron Cohen, a Biden Administration holdover and advisor to the White House Office of Pandemic Preparedness and Response Policy, to explain.

**Byron was caught on camera** explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. **[Watch here and support our work.](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgbs432d2l782mq0k1fkap0ek7msqgj8a7i5tmq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)**

[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zrjegrs93bkjk9rv9uerpb4coj6n1m6menj195a8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)
Maybe it took a Harvard PhD like Byron to explain what the Deep State does, but I suspect those tactics are just the tip of the icebeg of what these federal workers are planning to do during the Trump Administration . . . if they don't choose to resign.

President Trump gets it, and I suspect that's one of the reasons why 2 million government employees received a gracious offer for their resignation.

But we know that many of these federal workers will stay on board to obstruct, delay,, and undermine President Trump's policies over the next four years.

It's why OMG's work is so important. We're exposing these folks one at a time, **and our pace is picking up rapidly.**

**[Watch our latest release here, and please help fund our ongoing operations, which will expose the next Byron!](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z25bipdi4utb389859cd0k8irm3t34q4quafskp8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)**

Thanks again for all you do, and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2z56q1of45u7mlsslc3r4rosst8l346pdqoke0gs0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)

name: CADEM
subject: Why is Trump doing this?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the California Democratic Party | www
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-footer?refcode=header&amount=5]
This week, chaos erupted across the country as Donald Trump called for a unilateral halt of federal financial assistance programs that millions of Americans rely on. It’s outrageous, reckless, and entirely avoidable.
What does that mean, exactly?
It is effectively an instantaneous cut of services that everyday Americans depend on. This means vital services for housing, public health, education, and senior care could stop overnight, leaving countless Americans stranded. Even the universally-loved Meals on Wheels program is alarmed about the impact this could have on the communities they serve.
Why is Trump doing this?
Because he and his billionaire buddies — like Elon Musk and his DOGE project — are aiming to slash government services for the poor and middle class to give the oligarchy massive tax cuts. They want to defund government for *US* to fund enrichment for themselves.
This decision itself is a confirmation that Trump is following the Project 2025 agenda that we feared — a far-right agenda designed to dismantle government programs and consolidate power for the wealthiest few.
Where does this stand now?
Things are changing quickly, but as of now, a judge has temporarily suspended the implementation of the funding freeze, pending further judicial review. The Trump Administration has rescinded the initial memo that spurred this mess, but some administration officials are saying the freeze is still in effect. Overall, it remains a confusing mess for everyday Americans created solely by the incompetence of the Trump Administration.
What are Democrats doing to fight back?
Because of supporters like you, California is sending a larger Democratic delegation to Congress in 2025 than we had in 2024. We flipped three seats from red to blue, and now have more influence to fight to restore these lifesaving programs and ALSO fight against tax cuts for billionaires in Congress.
If you want to help our delegation keep up the fight, you can pitch in a donation right now. Otherwise, we will keep you posted on any new developments. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cdp-jan25?refcode=&amount=]

subject: Caught on TAPE: “The Deep State isReal”
body:
Byron was caught on camera explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. Watch here and support

| [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z4hobd81eg58pb5b1cr6tf5fgqom0u56nns3m90g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)

Dear Friend,

I've been reluctant to use the term "Deep State" as it sounds so conspiratorial and cloak and dagger.

But it's pretty easy to explain: The Deep State is a portion of 2 million federal workers who choose to obstruct the policies of the President of the United States.

They may not be meeting in secret or even working together. **They are men and women paid by us who choose to work against us to promote their own personal agenda**.

However, I will leave it to Byron Cohen, a Biden Administration holdover and advisor to the White House Office of Pandemic Preparedness and Response Policy, to explain.

**Byron was caught on camera** explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. **[Watch here and support our work.](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zgh0tvlmriukvdagp6p8m6t8eh82h89r3jb4bd7g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)**

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zroefnrbhptsr9pmjc9r92eknhansscdo7580pjo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)
Maybe it took a Harvard PhD like Byron to explain what the Deep State does, but I suspect those tactics are just the tip of the icebeg of what these federal workers are planning to do during the Trump Administration . . . if they don't choose to resign.

President Trump gets it, and I suspect that's one of the reasons why 2 million government employees received a gracious offer for their resignation.

But we know that many of these federal workers will stay on board to obstruct, delay,, and undermine President Trump's policies over the next four years.

It's why OMG's work is so important. We're exposing these folks one at a time, **and our pace is picking up rapidly.**

**[Watch our latest release here, and please help fund our ongoing operations, which will expose the next Byron!](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zlcr47f83i6n5k49k5322453rket22kumlfqve80_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)**

Thanks again for all you do, and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

---
[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zm1vdh4erik8m9qk97810447t3ql0cvfjapolrlg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j68oj6c5h2bs)

_My cup runneth over!_

**You are truly a blessing from heaven and I can 't express how grateful I am for you.**

When the going got tough, you were my rock.
And now we can enjoy the fruits of our labor together.

_**This is Monica De La Cruz. I 'm the Pro-Trump, Pro-America Conservative Congresswoman who won the most competitive House race in America.**_

The Democrats held my seat in South Texas for over 100 years and NO ONE thought I had a chance of winning.

But with your help, we proved them wrong TOGETHER!

And now we have a strong GOP House Majority ready to deliver on YOUR vision for America.

So to start things off on the right foot, I want to hear from you.
