subject: Focused and fired up / Concentrado y entusiasmado
body:
Freedom over fascism:
Our communities are defiant in the face of a MAGA power grab
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Immigration%20march%20signs.jpg]
The cruelty is the point. Unhinged and vindictive as ever, Donald Trump is manufacturing chaos through executive orders at a blistering rate, all in an attempt to overwhelm the millions of everyday working people of our nation who oppose his destructive, backwards agenda.
From taking a sledgehammer to the rights of federal workers to emboldening ICE to attack migrant households, Trump and MAGA Republicans are showing they want to rule over us, not represent us. Trump’s Project 2025 -- which we're starting to see enacted through this initial flurry of executive orders [https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2025/01/trump-project-2025-underway-executive-orders.html] -- promises to remove checks on presidential power, paving the way for a MAGA dictatorship that aims to take away our freedoms.
As bleak as these last few days may have been for so many of us, we know there is a path forward for ourselves, our families, and our communities. We will not be worn down, nor will we give in. TOP understands the assignment, and with solidarity and our vision for liberation guiding us, we will keep building the Texas we ALL deserve.
We protect US! ACCESS and SHARE these "know your rights" guides in English [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/English-KYR-ILRC.pdf] and Spanish [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Spanish-KYR-ILRC.pdf] from our allies at the Immigrant Legal Resource Center.
LAST CALL:
Add your name for stronger tenants' rights in Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20justice%202024.jpg]
The housing crisis in Dallas continues to worsen. Rent prices are rising faster than wages, evictions for some residents are happening without notice or cause, and housing instability is on the rise.
From collapsing ceilings due to water damage to routine water shutoffs, countless tenants are living with poor maintenance and broken promises from landlords — and many fear retaliation if they speak up. Despite this, current laws at the local and state levels offer little protection or support for renters. We're pushing for change!
TOP's housing justice organizing is rooted in our fundamental belief that housing is a human right, and that all in our communities deserve a safe, affordable, and stable place to call home — no matter our age, race, gender, faith, or income.
ADD YOUR NAME if you're a Dallas resident who agrees, and who wants to plug in to this vital campaign work! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc7xt9JezgWm3pil3PMcC1HyJVOTPmsxZdMxZkerJcMqS02WQ/viewform]
For more information, email Iman at ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
FEBRUARY 22:
Celebrate Black History Month with us in Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20TOP%20members.JPG]
Since our nation’s founding, Black Americans have been the cornerstone to its historic rise, the reason for its prosperity, and the protectors of its democracy. All the while, our communities continue to endure the many devious forms of white supremacy that seek to diminish us. While forces may try, we will never be defeated and our spirits never broken.
This Black History Month, TOP is celebrating the lives, contributions, and sacrifices of our ancestors whose tenacity has shaped us into who we are today. We invite you to join our TOP Harris County staff and members for a special community event February 22 in Houston.
Click here for more details and to RSVP. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pvBZtP2eEk-fU8Jizpv2hA2]
For more information, contact Gracie at garmijo@organizetexas.org [garmijo@organizetexas.org] .
TOP Tip: Stream and share "Stronger Together"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Updated%20Spotify%20TOP.jpg]
Speaking of Black History Month, we've got the perfect track to add to your Spotify playlists . Several TOP staff and members last year came together to record a song to commemorate and capture the spirit of our journey toward becoming a truly Pro-Black organization.
🎵 Stream TOP’s "Stronger Together" [https://open.spotify.com/track/078Rx6LzFaxHg6gkHUJX1T] 🎵
Español
La libertad por encima del fascismo:
Nuestras comunidades se muestran desafiantes ante la toma de poder de MAGA
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Immigration%20march%20signs.jpg]
La crueldad es el objetivo. Tan desquiciado y vengativo como siempre, Donald Trump está generando caos a un ritmo vertiginoso a través de órdenes ejecutivas, todo con el fin de agobiar a los millones de personas trabajadoras de nuestro país que se oponen a su agenda destructiva y retrógrada.
Desde arremeter contra los derechos de los trabajadores federales hasta dar más poder a ICE para atacar a familias migrantes, Trump y los republicanos de MAGA están demostrando que quieren gobernarnos, no representarnos. El Proyecto 2025 de Trump -- que ya estamos empezando a ver en acción con esta oleada inicial de órdenes ejecutivas [https://slate.com/news-and-politics/2025/01/trump-project-2025-underway-executive-orders.html] -- promete eliminar los límites al poder presidencial, allanando el camino para una dictadura MAGA que busca arrebatarnos nuestras libertades.
Por más difíciles que hayan sido estos últimos días para muchos de nosotros, sabemos que hay un camino hacia adelante para nosotros, nuestras familias y nuestras comunidades. No nos rendiremos ni nos dejaremos vencer. En TOP entendemos la misión, y con la solidaridad y nuestra visión de liberación como guía, seguiremos construyendo el Texas que TODOS merecemos.
¡Nosotros nos protegemos! ACCEDA y COMPARTA estas guías de "conozca sus derechos" en inglés [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/English-KYR-ILRC.pdf] y español [https://organizetexas.org/wp-content/uploads/2025/01/Spanish-KYR-ILRC.pdf] de nuestros aliados en el Centro de Recursos Legales para Inmigrantes.
ÚLTIMA OPORTUNIDAD:
Agrega tu nombre para fortalecer los derechos de los inquilinos en Dallas
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Dallas%20housing%20justice%202024.jpg]
La crisis de vivienda en Dallas sigue empeorando. Los precios de las rentas están subiendo más rápido que los salarios, los desalojos para algunos residentes se están llevando a cabo sin previo aviso ni causa, y la inestabilidad en la vivienda está en aumento.
Desde techos que se derrumban debido a daños por agua hasta cortes rutinarios del suministro de agua, innumerables inquilinos están viviendo con un mantenimiento deficiente y promesas rotas por parte de los propietarios, y muchos temen represalias si alzan la voz. A pesar de esto, las leyes actuales a nivel local y estatal ofrecen poca protección o apoyo para los inquilinos. ¡Estamos luchando por un cambio!
La organización de justicia de vivienda de TOP está arraigada en nuestra creencia fundamental de que la vivienda es un derecho humano y de que todas las personas en nuestras comunidades merecen un hogar seguro, accesible y estable, sin importar nuestra edad, raza, género, fe o ingresos.
¡AGREGA TU NOMBRE si eres un residente de Dallas que está de acuerdo y que quiere sumarse a este trabajo de campaña vital! [https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSc7xt9JezgWm3pil3PMcC1HyJVOTPmsxZdMxZkerJcMqS02WQ/viewform]
Para obtener más información, envía un correo electrónico a Iman a ibouzid@organizetexas.org [ibouzid@organizetexas.org] .
22 DE FEBRERO:
Celebre el Mes de la Historia Negra con nosotros en Houston
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Houston%20TOP%20members.JPG]
Desde la fundación de nuestra nación, los afroamericanos han sido fundamentales a su ascenso histórico, la razón de su prosperidad y los protectores de su democracia. Mientras tanto, nuestras comunidades siguen soportando las muchas formas perversas de supremacía blanca que buscan empequeñecernos. Aunque las fuerzas lo intenten, nunca seremos derrotados y nuestro espíritu nunca se quebrará.
Este Mes de la Historia Negra, TOP celebra las vidas, las contribuciones y los sacrificios de nuestros antepasados cuya tenacidad nos ha convertido en quienes somos hoy. Te invitamos a unirte a nuestro personal y miembros de TOP Harris County para un evento comunitario especial el 22 de febrero en Houston.
Haz clic aquí para obtener más detalles y confirmar tu asistencia. [https://secure.everyaction.com/pvBZtP2eEk-fU8Jizpv2hA2]
Para obtener más información, comunícate con Gracie en garmijo@organizetexas.org [garmijo@organizetexas.org] .
Consejos de TOP: Transmite y comparte nuestra canción "Stronger Together"
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/TSM/TSMTO/1/45640/images/Updated%20Spotify%20TOP.jpg]
Hablando del Mes de la Historia Negra, tenemos la canción perfecta para agregar a tus listas de reproducción de Spotify . El año pasado, varios miembros y miembros del personal de TOP se reunieron para grabar una canción para conmemorar y capturar el espíritu de nuestro viaje hacia convertirnos en una organización verdaderamente pro-Negra.
🎵 Escucha "Stronger Together" de TOP [https://open.spotify.com/track/078Rx6LzFaxHg6gkHUJX1T] 🎵

San Antonio, TX 78207

name: Monica De La Cruz
subject: My cup runneth over!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Monica for Congress
body:
| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zof4i1l84a2234n4ckckuf5s3dmo3tgbjg7sehd0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j6co32cdh2bs)
---

_My cup runneth over!_

**You are truly a blessing from heaven and I can 't express how grateful I am for you.**

When the going got tough, you were my rock.
And now we can enjoy the fruits of our labor together.

_**This is Monica De La Cruz. I 'm the Pro-Trump, Pro-America Conservative Congresswoman who won the most competitive House race in America.**_

The Democrats held my seat in South Texas for over 100 years and NO ONE thought I had a chance of winning.

But with your help, we proved them wrong TOGETHER!

And now we have a strong GOP House Majority ready to deliver on YOUR vision for America.

So to start things off on the right foot, I want to hear from you.

_It would be my honor to get your personal guidance in our brand-new House GOP 2025 Agenda Survey.
_
---
| _**OFFICIAL SURVEY INVITATION**_

**Deadline:** 11:59 PM
**Submission:** MISSING

---

It's only a couple questions and won't take but a few minutes to complete.

_**[But the deadline to submit your input is at midnight TONIGHT so please don't waste another second.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zh0j95agmnq5ka2vm9h4v0e6k5j8e6t1mpesfb8o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j6co32cdh2bs "But the deadline to submit your input is at midnight TONIGHT so please don’t waste another second.")**_

---

**YOU were the reason for our landslide victory and YOUR VOICE will decide what comes next for our country.**

Here's to a brighter future for America.

_Monica De La Cruz_

name: America First Priorities Survey
subject: To: Patriot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Complete by 11:59 PM.

|
---
| | | | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zlbo00mpo4q8kdq5kdien114fubh68v4h2vhtvn8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j6co32cdh2bs "America First Priorities")
---

Friend's America First Profile
America First Status: **CONFIRMED**
Survey Status: **INCOMPLETE**

**DEADLINE**** **
---
| | [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z9rjgmkrhk07hsdlmu46pbtbuo9ijsf0sm46lrfo_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j6co32cdh2bs "Timer")
---
| | | [TAKE THE AMERICA FIRST PRIORITIES SURVEY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zkp8fqitmu7km7l42mtn1kgh3a7socesb5phflj8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j6co32cdh2bs "TAKE THE AMERICA FIRST PRIORITIES SURVEY")
---

Friend, we have you down as an America First Patriot!

We know that you will always put America and our people above foreign special interests, which is why we need YOU to complete the America First Priorities Survey today!

---
| | | [TAKE THE AMERICA FIRST PRIORITIES SURVEY](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zmnfue1d51pqgr4oengq40rmn1phc29al8uc5tv0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j6co32cdh2bs "TAKE THE AMERICA FIRST PRIORITIES SURVEY")

clean_body: The President can only pardon in federal cases. The President can only pardon in federal cases. | MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI ATTN: Friend, Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life. Unfortunately, because the charges are at the state level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me. After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag. If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly! And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case. But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side. Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia. And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival! name: RESPONSE REQUESTED [From House Republicans]
subject: Warning to the Deep State
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Pres. Trump tapped Elon Musk to DRAIN the Deep State Swamp, SLASH bureaucratic red tape, ELIMINATE wasteful spending, and...

| |
---
| | | **DEEP STATE BE WARNED!**

President Trump issued a historic executive order FORMALLY establishing the _Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)_ and he tapped Elon Musk to run it.

Their mission is simple and sorely needed in our government:

- DRAIN the Deep State Swamp
- SLASH bureaucratic red tape
- ELIMINATE wasteful spending
- AUTOMATE systems in the sprawling bureaucracy
- RESTRUCTURE entire agencies

_**[So we're coming to you for help, Friend. We worked with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to launch our first-ever DOGE Survey and we'd like your input right away.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zli9id3bq09fauobfpdtn9rep2hcnqorlmlmvjm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs "So we’re coming to you for help, Friend. We worked with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to launch our first-ever DOGE Survey and we’d like your input right away.")**_

---
_- Majority Leader Steve Scalise's -_
**DOGE SURVEY**
---
Do you support President Trump, Elon Musk, and DOGE's mission to streamline our government? **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjtihvgb1816e25hmkshgm9cr2otppo10m16e030_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z2ulcc0d2k9bipcebcamvjktpsndc0iifj9ukf3o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs)**
Do you support the Federal government slashing wasteful spending? **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6kbdsagfpekt26tbbr7jaml5btaobh2t7fobmq0_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztakcpmad2n6qehao521ur82kh86oa5191af2gto_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs)**
Do you support closing DEI departments across the government? **[**YES >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6i3j3rq3lnj47upgmgnbjmecsvrkq0is527dhmg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs)_[**NO >>**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8njq8jtj0fii5gop4lbe6smvasrbgro1sbfs030_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs)**
Do you have any ideas about where DOGE should look to cut costs?
| | [RESPOND HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zqsd9a29f5smo2kmb7ns06eh3ggfq50gfcnjjg5g_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs "RESPOND HERE")
---

Do you have any questions, comments, or concerns you'd like to share with the Majority Leader?
| [RESPOND HERE](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6rvgvf3mpdn91c2epp951982mtp34jas0gdibag_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs "RESPOND HERE")
---

Your voice is crucial in helping us clean up the bureaucratic waste in Washington. We look forward to hearing your ideas and working with you.

Thank you for your support.

- House Republicans
_Sent via Team Scalise_

---
| |
* * *
---
| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvpfmim4scb7otq79f84c392qen45m6q9kispp88_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs "First 100 Day Survey")
---

_It 's Majority Leader Scalise._

We will make the first sprint of the new Congress the most efficient political operation this country has ever seen. And before doing anything else, I'm launching my _**[First 100 Days Survey](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zp3flj040pga8j767rmu6oro445a67d834b9usv8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9j66or4c9h2bs "First 100 Days Survey")**_ so you can weigh in on what we should prioritize first.

**_MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
ATTN: Friend,
---
Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life.
---
_**Unfortunately, because the charges are at the _state_ level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me.**_
---
After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.
---
_If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly!_
---
**And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case.**
---
But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. _I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side._
---
Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia.
---
_**And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival!**_

GIULIANI ATTN: Friend, Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life. Unfortunately, because the charges are at the state level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me. After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag. If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly! And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case. But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side. Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia. And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Freedom Nation Today PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

Dear Peter,

Montana was urged to become the first state to partner with United Sovereign Americans (USA), to conduct an open-book audit of election discrepancies in that state.

We hope Montana will join USA in setting a national precedent for collaborative audits to restore election validity and voter confidence. Read the entire Jan 27, 2025 press release [here](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVHXwl5QHxj0VFWH7H49Q_bpW8_npSB5rrf7_MXl4n65kBVqW50kH_H6lZ3lXW2FJtHk6cb4ZcW4TZHv02bF0pNW1-y9cS4f-vknW5X3qbF6_gF0HW6F9Vhx8W3MWRW8xdjKF4D5Wn9W4m9VDy7wvCqnW8xwb5S3D6rCtW5Q1HPy8-H0fmVK70WC7g16mqW4gHMZN8n1BsxW2vKYcW11g2R_N2jT0q4gzK2RVy40_x8Lvy-5W7mGXQh7YbxT6W1rwYK297202_W1CQ2cS86L_43W3m089H6WfkBCW2t7dtw92VTRZW4zGbgD4L1HFzW3s5qnl7f0VmkW13Bwc04myLwrW3Bh2fg6X3YqVV_JpMq8bMTVLW2mQGfc7Qw7mlW7yp9J37PkvLVW9jm0Vw67CbBBW6-KC5197MsCKW5BKP1m6mvbL8N58N3grSw_bFW5HVKTg1ldMMYW4rVWsX12xp0pf7f14rg04). In our [Jan 23 study session](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVHXwl5QHxj0VFWH7H49Q_bpW8_npSB5rrf7_MXl4pW3m2ndW8wLKSR6lZ3mRW52Blhc8Nkx_yN3v_bwhMsG3yW6bkWrP18NPjkTvqgp3NKGrkW2NJpgs11FVzRW8HwxNb5XZd8FW2BgcWX6HVkj1W1TPD_K6Xd0gfW3wrSXP1nBkcWW8Zgmv32HWm2MW8QcshZ8-KCCHW8YHx1x1xqvjjW5fFf5S4B1l5RW67Y1yv2NSwN5W5PZBJ732RxvmW3wHbV31FFGm-W4HSQZC5J0mk9W73tCZs4NjFZLW4ywWC_4WBB__W8yDb223R-rmlW7bBVZn8Jcd7jW7TjTL7417ChbVzG4nT1PbFxjW1hlc5r4-hd7HVL73864q33WdVvfVcM6p5FCXW6b5n773x1ZmwW1nj22Q31fjQNf602yhl04) we compared USA’s [research](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVHXwl5QHxj0VFWH7H49Q_bpW8_npSB5rrf7_MXl4pj3m2ndW7lCdLW6lZ3l5W9b2KYW8lpQpGW5v6y0B7-rd2NDDDHSSwrCRN3VNTCBnV8DwW6YsDdc4Bpn0_W82Rsbw6qrxbWW3smmyw7ZSNLNW2lGc045MJH_dW7CPnqM6QY4m1N5H1Rw1DnGKQN4vr8MBw2ZyYW4KypC64PY6ZfW1Kz5nY3XxtwBW4MgBs64bCrK0W7Lcdw76gcjXYVRd3Qq22CkRhN3XtrqM8907TW26w6sJ4xngPNN8sDkZqQ--s2W1JfXR_3FgsjhV11Dr115L0w_W7gtbN95LkjcZW8FmQYB2sFCzMW8-n0h13lFPBGf8QMDdH04) with the Brennan Center’s [research](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVHXwl5QHxj0VFWH7H49Q_bpW8_npSB5rrf7_MXl4nq5kBVqW5BWr2F6lZ3pNW48K2wR90WPgyW7gGH--3YKk6qW65jl925801-hN31f5bhbv5PmW2gvGjp15b48PN4NbB87fgyHBW4bmGFn2MZ7_WW7t1j524zkFsYN2n4rJLjJgNDW2klgPB8rySg1W1pFfwL2FKCWTW5hyFcV8xMylQV5Pky56K4nXBW42psbX7Q4-F-W60j1Ld2TBZK0N4S-k9LMqcmjVnb2bR7L346MW2TVFx31Y6r71W3NbTzN5_1L32V9jwnq1gdMV3N3PWHsYlwTdjW5lWQrM71KX8pW4wQLR_8v0X6VW46CkTb7NVCGKW7_pd7Q25dCg9VbSpPP33FWQTW64FC6H8xSSLxT2Q0n1k7kK4W8hDFSt1QHLTtW3Tf1lg3N6YgfN5gr_Y3FqlwVW6-FPWC7CmPM0W8VX3qn357k52W4lNDzv6s2xYPf9gVJP804), focusing on the differences between vote dilution and voter disenfranchisement. USA leads the effort to protect your vote by analyzing voter databases and insisting on verifiable election systems, from registration through certification. Election officials must prove to citizens that election results are valid. USA is working on groundbreaking federal legislation designed to ensure full transparency in election system records, eliminate existing loopholes, and verify every element of the voting process.
As part of this effort, USA volunteers from across the nation will present peer-reviewed audit results of November's general election on Tuesday, February 25, 2025, at **State Advocacy Day.** Discrepancies in voter rolls, vote counts, and tallies, will be shared with respective state representatives. Volunteers will also outline USA’s solutions that will ensure future elections are provably accurate and legally valid. Scroll down to the _“Join Our Team” _section to learn how to participate in this important event.

USA has uncovered [election misconduct](https://d56tDQ04.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/UD+113/d56tDQ04/VVHXwl5QHxj0VFWH7H49Q_bpW8_npSB5rrf7_MXl4pj3m2ndW7lCdLW6lZ3m_N7vjxlyPnSYTW30bzgq5Qb26cW6TXbzr4ts_vTN46NnSKltxrGW8gpm9L73QWw_W6zVBPd1Bn6Y9N2R6Rvs2KM5JW6s6mKV3JpcxNN6SJwch1jPynW4XflLg2xcHT_W46DbSM2M--rjVSpyXV2n1b7hW1vF8dT6Fj1d9W6F4H1k3GXftnW48l-dx3F3zlhW6GSXSf7-RtNzW3qkt-s6sYzvdW1-q__q11TXjMW4r2MWZ8d57PQW5c87TG3bm20jW2xKRzK3hxX7fW8NPmld6JJF3LW5DBX7v68grn2W30kgG65bPsgYdJTGT004) in the databases across 21 states. This misconduct meets the legal definition of a crime, with clear evidence in the election records. Election officials are obligated to uphold the law regarding the election system. The four critical elements of any election system are:
* authenticated voters,
* legitimate ballots,
* reconciled counts, and
* accurate, permanent, publicly available records.

Voter roll discrepancies are seen in CA, GA, IL, MI, NY, OH, PA and many other states. Significant registration anomalies have also been identified. Awareness, action, and accountability are essential.

clean_body: Montana was urged to become the first state to partner with United Sovereign Americans (USA), to conduct an open-book audit of election discrepancies in that state. | | | | Dear Peter, Montana was urged to become the first state to partner with United Sovereign Americans (USA), to conduct an open-book audit of election discrepancies in that state. We hope Montana will join USA in setting a national precedent for collaborative audits to restore election validity and voter confidence. Read the entire Jan 27, 2025 press release . In our we compared USA’s with the Brennan Center’s , focusing on the differences between vote dilution and voter disenfranchisement. USA leads the effort to protect your vote by analyzing voter databases and insisting on verifiable election systems, from registration through certification. Election officials must prove to citizens that election results are valid. USA is working on groundbreaking federal legislation designed to ensure full transparency in election system records, eliminate existing loopholes, and verify every element of the voting process. As part of this effort, USA volunteers from across the nation will present peer-reviewed audit results of November's general election on Tuesday, February 25, 2025, at State Advocacy Day. Discrepancies in voter rolls, vote counts, and tallies, will be shared with respective state representatives. Volunteers will also outline USA’s solutions that will ensure future elections are provably accurate and legally valid. Scroll down to the “Join Our Team” section to learn how to participate in this important event. | | USA has uncovered in the databases across 21 states. This misconduct meets the legal definition of a crime, with clear evidence in the election records. Election officials are obligated to uphold the law regarding the election system. The four critical elements of any election system are: authenticated voters, legitimate ballots, reconciled counts, and accurate, permanent, publicly available records. Voter roll discrepancies are seen in CA, GA, IL, MI, NY, OH, PA and many other states. Significant registration anomalies have also been identified. Awareness, action, and accountability are essential. | | Check out these media highlights. Listen to this revealing from Jan 29, 2025, discussing deficiencies in voter registration records across 21 states, where material voter eligibility details are missing. Listen to this from Jan 27 discussing the critical issue of securing our elections. We need to change our language toward election validity and away from election integrity. Elections are either lawful and accurate, or they are invalid. Our will be held April 4-7, 2025. Save the date and plan to join us to keep our momentum going, secure legitimate representation, and use the power of government for the good of the nation. More info coming soon. Our Thursday, January 23 shows how USA moved election conversations from hypothetical to actual by making direct measurements from the voter databases. | | Join our team: Follow, Comment and Share our social media to expand our mission reach: , , , , & Share our Attend our Weekly Thursday , and invite a friend so we can spread the word about the core principles of our mission. Get Involved. To volunteer with USA, click and submit your interest. Strengthen your contribution to our mission by joining the Wednesday Stars and Stripes session for advanced volunteer training on Advocacy Day, Resolutions, and more. Just scroll to the bottom of this email, click 'Manage Preferences,' and select your preferred communication updates. Invest in our efforts to educate, advocate, collaborate and litigate for the Constitutional rights of all Americans. Your partnership is crucial to our success. | | Join us TONIGHT at 7:00 PM Eastern to explore how the Constitution and other founding documents define our civil rights. We'll also examine key case law as a tool to restore election validity. You can access previous study sessions I look forward to seeing you tonight! Marly Hornik CEO, | | United Sovereign Americans, Inc., a 501(c)(4) nonprofit organization, Suite 194, 167 LAMP & LANTERN VILLAGE, CHESTERFIELD, MO 63017

clean_body: Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. | | | Friend, Coming off the HUGE victories last November, I am ready to shift things into the next gear. I have BIG plans for Turning Point PAC. I want to personally invite you to be a part of it. First, let's recap what we achieved in 2024: Hispanic voters swung heavily toward Republicans and President Trump The youth vote (18-29) swung MAJORLY to President Trump. Republicans swept the White House, Senate, and Congress! Our ballot chasers were on the ground, turning out voters. These were low-propensity voters, and we cracked the code to get them out to the polls. Here is my big plan: I want to fund ballot chasers on the ground, even in off-year elections. Our ground game is the best. I am confident we can continue to win key elections for years to come, not just presidential elections.** To expand our ballot-chasing operations, I am looking to raise $78,000 before the end of the month. As a thank you for your support, my team will send you a Turning Point exclusive "47" hat for contributing $25 or more. We have a proven concept. We have momentum on our side. name: Rep. Brandon Gill
subject: I’m furious
body:
It’s time to secure the border

| | | | |
---
**I’m furious.**

You’ve seen the astonishing numbers of _criminals_ , _gang members_ , and confirmed _terrorists_ who are being deported:
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Thanks to President Trump we are making a difference.

B****ut he knows as well as I do this only scratches the surface of what needs to be done.**
Over the past four years, the Democrats’ radical open-border policies have unleashed absolute chaos.
More than **10 million illegal immigrants have been allowed to invade our country** , including convicted criminals who walk freely in our communities, endangering law-abiding Americans.
_It’s appalling and it has to STOP right now._
**That’s why I’m leading the charge in Congress:**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[HELP SECURE OUR BORDER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**Winning fights like passing the**** _Remain in Mexico Act_****are critical to take our country back.**
We must ensure that migrants seeking asylum at our border STAY IN Mexico while their immigration proceedings play out. We cannot let them lose to roam free in our communities without proper vetting.
That’s how we fix the mess that the Democrats have thrown our country into.
**But because I’m standing with President Trump and fighting to defend our border in Congress,_I’ve become a top target for the radical Left_.**
The Communist Democrats and their allies are willing to do anything to stop me. _Smears. Lies. Attacks..._ You name it.
Why do they do this?
**Because Democrats want _open borders_ to expand their political power in blue states.**
**And they are willing to turn America into a third-world country by importing the third world to do it.**
That’s the real reason Democrats have turned a blind eye to the destruction they’re causing. They are allowing our country to edge closer to chaos for their own gain.
%recipient.first%, I refuse to let them win but I can’t take on the Left’s massive war chest on my own.
If we’re going to secure our border, I need your support right now.
**_[I need the support of patriots like you to step up and chip in $10, $25, $50, or even $100 to help me fend off the Democrats’ relentless attacks so I can stand with President Trump to take back our country](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
[HELP SECURE OUR BORDER](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This fight is about more than just one bill, it’s about **defending our nation’s sovereignty** and **keeping America safe**.
With your support, we can stand strong with President Trump, and put America First.
**_[Please, stand with me today and help secure our nation's border](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_.**
_Thanks for standing strong,_
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Congressman Brandon Gill
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
**P.S.** The Left is hoping you’ll ignore this email. Don’t let them win. Please stand with me and help us secure our border once and for all.
**_[Chip in today](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFz/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_!**

[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFA/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
| | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UFB/?__vbtrk=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNjU0OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
| [Unsubscribe](https://app.vbout.com/index.php?r=Email/OptoutConfirmationForm&messageid=272654&trkid=602203582&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com)

215 N Payne Street, Alexandria, VA 22314

It would be my honor to get your personal guidance in our brand-new House GOP 2025 Agenda Survey. | OFFICIAL SURVEY INVITATION Deadline: 11:59 PM Submission: MISSING | | It's only a couple questions and won't take but a few minutes to complete. "But the deadline to submit your input is at midnight TONIGHT so please don’t waste another second." | | YOU were the reason for our landslide victory and YOUR VOICE will decide what comes next for our country. Here's to a brighter future for America. Monica De La Cruz | | | To ensure that you don't miss out on important messages, please add info@email.monicaforcongress.org to your address book. Not Sure How? Follow the link below to your email provider to get step by step instructions on how to add us to your address book. , , , , | | Paid for by Monica for Congress PO Box 4605 McAllen, Texas 78502 Inside Scoop Politics PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 | _

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: President Trump cannot pardon me in this case
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
The President can only pardon in federal cases.

The President can only pardon in federal cases.
| [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1738e04aaf7e419fbeba9bc10f0b21e1&_e=IKZqDx4zuXf7TnCPKdwNkJrXXChbxAjV1Ok5xxmSH-cZ8tLWyA0f5cYO6AHEGhk7X762sxHbQfp8fluJ0nPLLlKCfGwoXf4TkjNuwK6AEbyruv9yj5f0m7ahzjK5SNjibNN35aDB5sHC-j6_DsYcsq1LoTHVnTnOvlP8xWRsNmeFPRPef6IGo-AUeMXIm3Siy5Hrv3sGNQJ5wGEnAvD6IMeqHPaW4USr7909nAePHZHjs_27kDKZIAPyy7SLD-L0UaDcSeY_YJEOUODBBZuqk5-XvaZOI_qoKP7cKJd2gCSD_vE3Ujel0oOGCjZACA00g_K9RDE94dtbkEBE8A_wO1q7qGW9xaG_P9e5FD3vewC5jK5iC0XCgi8BZtLQ0g4YVsfvkDtiZxoLn2OmSn1dKg%3D%3D)
---
**_MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
ATTN: Friend,
---
Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life.
---
_**Unfortunately, because the charges are at the _state_ level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me.**_
---
After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag.
---
_If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly!_
---
**And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case.**
---
But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. _I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side._
---
Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia.
---
_**And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival!**_
---
[**So please, if you can, and truly only if you can, make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can win the FINAL BATTLE in this “pardon-proof” case against me.**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=1738e04aaf7e419fbeba9bc10f0b21e1&_e=IKZqDx4zuXf7TnCPKdwNkJrXXChbxAjV1Ok5xxmSH-cZ8tLWyA0f5cYO6AHEGhk7X762sxHbQfp8fluJ0nPLLlKCfGwoXf4TkjNuwK6AEbyruv9yj5f0m7ahzjK5SNjibNN35aDB5sHC-j6_DsYcsq1LoTHVnTnOvlP8xWRsNmeFPRPef6IGo-AUeMXIm3Siy5Hrv3sGNQJ5wGEnAvD6IMeqHPaW4USr7909nAePHZFJ4TNoPfaRGgZerUw2dUw0DbUh5ZRmKXnoE_fu2JbMW2LLPI7N30IqQwPDDX9SOUD6reeIg6-mZ-FiuYGMBDHrAGRG9UVUmUkGmSsjBYM9UQ9_OWTQ_g4XZFnadCG63iBAGOcTIpnFwEEgvOlRPRj7_VRzZCTKyR3C5keG_C44Pw%3D%3D)

clean_body: The President can only pardon in federal cases. The President can only pardon in federal cases. | MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI ATTN: Friend, Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life. Unfortunately, because the charges are at the state level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me. After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag. If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly! And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case. But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side. Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia. And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival! Thank you and God bless you, Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Full Mag News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

_My cup runneth over!_

**You are truly a blessing from heaven and I can 't express how grateful I am for you.**

When the going got tough, you were my rock.
And now we can enjoy the fruits of our labor together.

_**This is Monica De La Cruz. I 'm the Pro-Trump, Pro-America Conservative Congresswoman who won the most competitive House race in America.**_

The Democrats held my seat in South Texas for over 100 years and NO ONE thought I had a chance of winning.

But with your help, we proved them wrong TOGETHER!

And now we have a strong GOP House Majority ready to deliver on YOUR vision for America.

So to start things off on the right foot, I want to hear from you.

_It would be my honor to get your personal guidance in our brand-new House GOP 2025 Agenda Survey.
_

clean_body: The President can only pardon in federal cases. The President can only pardon in federal cases. | ~ MEMO FROM RUDY W. GIULIANI ATTN: Friend, Some have wondered if a Presidential Pardon could save me in the Arizona witch hunt where Democrats are trying to put me in prison for the rest of my life. Unfortunately, because the charges are at the state level, President Trump cannot grant a federal pardon to save me. After a brutal loss last November, Democrats are seeking revenge, and they’ve turned me into their political punching bag. If they can’t take down President Trump, then they’ll gladly settle for his former attorney – yours truly! And now they believe they’ve finally got me backed into a corner in this pardon-proof Arizona criminal case. But what the Left doesn’t understand is that I’m not defenseless and all on my own. I’ve got countless patriots just like you, Friend, standing right by my side. Thanks to your support, I was able to SAVE my home! Thanks to your support, Fani Willis has been REMOVED from the witch hunt against me and President Trump in Georgia. And with your support right now, I will be able to prevail in the FINAL case against me where the Democrats wrongly think I have no chance at survival! ~ ~ Thank you and God bless you, ~ Rudy Giuliani Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust Restore Our Nation PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 ~~ | ~~_

name: Karen Crnkovich
subject: Kansas Aircraft Tragedy
body:
Hello,

On behalf of Kansans everywhere, I am deeply saddened by the tragic
aircraft accident in Washington, D.C., en route from Wichita, and my heart
goes out to the families and loved ones of those who lost their lives. The
loss of young, talented children and their family members is especially
devastating-these ice skating teammates were not only dedicated athletes
but also beloved members of their communities who will be greatly missed.
To the families of Kansans affected by this tragedy, my heart goes out to
you and your loved ones during what I am sure is an unfathomable, difficult
time.

Additionally, we mourn the brave military personnel who lost their lives in
this tragedy. Their service is nothing but honorable, and in the face of
this loss, it highlights the importance of supporting our military families
and communities.

During this difficult time, I am keeping all of the victims, their
families, and their friends in my prayers. I hope they find comfort and
strength in the outpouring of love and support from those around them and
anything they need is provided for.

--

Best regards,

Karen Crnkovich

You may unsubscribe
<https://kcforkansas-com.jmailroute.net/x/u?u=1890cffb-867e-4ffb-b597-4c2c439add39>
to stop receiving our emails.

I hope they find comfort and strength in the outpouring of love and support from those around them and anything they need is provided for. -- Best regards, Karen Crnkovich You may unsubscribe <>

subject: Patrick's Priorities, Wayward Bus Driver, and 3.4 Million Passengers
body:
Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick unveiled his top 25 legislative priorities for the current session on Wednesday. Each priority corresponds to an upcoming bill in the Republican-controlled Senate, which Patrick presides over.

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQQOGnsbug8fgHXLi4DV1uuyUyjB1GMjECK0vefpXttzvVJ52v-3SPXPj5-B-3FNqV64SA9gbqpmGiyOU9GUlhBvJKpqB6PaB2DlGuYfADzj5mg1FFZzPZDGA8pETkwBvJ4YOB0qAUetV3NEdFA1iX9Bx7Y4WBRNzq0bU1tXTFM5d3faWjW-omS1hb20-h_wkcBY4rbyc_l26_csdV4LgIHI23oPwgcEQwrgf3Ke3RyyPQ_s2l8Ol6YeCxRS6_bvtz9BXwJwAA__9-aVEO) | |
# Thursday, January 30, 2025
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1946, [Paul Alexander](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQgOGnsbegu7Px4cFDF7Z07YgObIIlEyKwQvL2Vbp3_qVP-n-uw1Vyyffbt6wp1Ne8DQTUXgAvBoYoubwHq2MYIXrUKSCbjoxzRHoJPLO1xvrIGIW9sVasnxx3HaKwB53DBwM0gEgeuYmjYOygdcmMwrZVFlLMddubuqSaXnLM5b09095M26pLWGp9HMp8KeoV9ed5NuM4fZqi_p7OQ1G_JCl1ubjOETsDeg_xceZS8uFYWbitksufVv_dewb6DQAA__9P1k9s) was born in Dallas. Despite spending over 70 years in an iron lung after contracting polio at age 6, he became a successful lawyer. He also built a sizable following on TikTok before his death in March of last year. You know about Punxsutawney Phil, but have you heard of [Bee Cave Bob](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2uqzAQhJ_GdEa7a35M4eI2dLntKdEa28GSwQisEN7-KOlPN8VoNN_385geHFPcnv959aa8Q54IqJWAUsHkOKZ7aipnLLgBK2-wV5pU1xFVi9EYdCCHau7Azqi5aymAtYqHgQM2VTSfMUAFiDRgXzvL6DS0nVeW-6YVDXgXSz7qsvji33yGdOeXP-o5r1UySyn7KdQ_QaOg8bquer1P3ngreYv5UxI0phj8We7kBY18lDh_k_Vezvzy0mYr-VjZxZSydHzLLyEBtBpJ1_uyV4dx-xVTimfXiwaeK8f0vVD-dPIy9BsAAP__okhjiA)? Check out today's _Et Cetera_ section to learn more! We want to thank all the readers who contributed to our tip jar on Tuesday. Your contribution helps _The Texas Flyover_ continue producing free, unbiased news. If you missed it, there's another [opportunity to contribute](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FugzAQxvGnsTfQ3dlwMHjowpauHZHBR7BkYgRumrx9lapTpe7f95P-H5fx4mOKt-u738SVx5JHAmoqwMrAGHxMz9Hq4CYIPWpxyKYj07ZEenXQmAaZGC1xQJnsDMyms7a1ZvE96-heGKABROqR6zB5DB00rZjJs22UBQmx5KMuqxR5-HNJz3yXo57zppNbS9lPZd4UDYqGU-bPQ2p_k5DLa6FoKKtUvx9Fwyppr_5Q-nBh_4opxbNlZeG6-Zh-_PJv8N3RdwAAAP__2NJYTw) below. We appreciate it! Today’s sponsor is [Weight Loss by Hims](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0z72OqzAQQOGnsbug8fgHXLi4DV1uuyUyjB1GMjECK0vefpXttzvVJ52v-3SPXPj5-B-3FNqV64SA9gbqpmGiyOU9GUlhBvJKpqB6PaB2DlGuYfADzj5mg1FFZzPZDGA8pETkwBvJ4YOB0qAUetV3NEdFA1iX9Bx7Y4WBRNzq0bU1tXTFM5d3faWjW-omS1hb20-h_wkcBY4rbyc_l26_csdV4LgIHI23oPwgcEQwrgf3Ke3RyyPQ_s2l8Ol6YeCxRS6_bvtz9BXwJwAA__9-aVEO). ## 'Nation's Report Card' Shows Texas Lagging
Scores from the National Assessment of Educational Progress--more commonly known as the "Nation's Report Card"--were released yesterday. Texas eighth graders [lag behind the national average](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx00L2uozAQBeCnMZ2RPea3cJGG7m632hINeABLBiN7EpK3X5H-diON9Omc8-9n_EEf_LH-wZ0sv5c4goJaKi2NGh368BmrwtlJuV4XZHVrOjBNA1BsduqqSVVLXZl5Aafmrulh7nqH2Czk6qXw9saUNkpr6HVbugm161TdkJmwrWpRKXKeYyp5I6Y35iV84otSOce9CHZjPrMwDwGDgOG6rnLPx_0TMNAhn1nAsBEG3gQMkTdKAoavIzM_HR18Hz4EmTk91_VuKs-YWZ54ONr9LA9kHw-ZZaIzJpYzJicTvQjDrWOSj4f-GPc3Fsm68_Ih-Ny0olLrjj58g_Kvy70s_A8AAP__A9dz1w) in reading and math proficiency. Just 25% of eighth graders scored high enough to be considered proficient in reading, and only 24% in math, compared to the national averages of 29% and 27%, respectively. While the rate of proficiency in reading is the same as that seen in 2019, math scores have declined significantly since then. Among Texas fourth graders, 28% scored at the [proficient level or above in reading](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2u4yAQhZ8GdxPBgP8KF9u4u9tuGY09Q4yETQTs5ebtV0m_5fk-6Ujn_Pm6f1GI4Xr8plOW-uPTHTX2oA1YfWcK8XV3HS-b5tl0spjRTmiHAbE7lgmJeEdvpZ8m4xld76zZiFlTP9PcheVdpo3VxuBsxhtvZHjS_SB2o9H1ymnhUFO-1UOq_FDx8ZW-Jd_2dHZxOWp9FmV_KVwVrq21W_NEb6lwpVzDHkXhekkrClfhvzvVkC6Fa9mPlOKbXh9UIMsz5Qo7ZYYjNWCKkQqEwuDfoqVcj098SvYpn8IQLshCHK4H0MVwUlW44jSC422eHQtso97AOZlgHmYLxnseWTtyg-3yws8WYgxlGJXTj5NC_Ayr_336e8F_AQAA__8954DC), compared to 30% nationally. In math, 43% achieved a proficient score, compared to 39% for the rest of the country. During a State Board of Education meeting Wednesday, one member called the results "atrocious." Texas Education Agency Commissioner Mike Morath confessed that "we are far from recovered from the declines that we saw during the pandemic." See Texas's results [here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kEHLozAQhn_NePskmaixhxw-EG92yyJsb5KYUbOkjcSstv9-sex1bzPzMA-8769u6LTz7jlf9YNUek1hQIblF-Nfgg1WO_8eiswqw-yFZ6S4FDWKqkLMFkVYjGTNOEk2XiTjvJbayEJoQaasJ5M5dcoYF4xzvHCZW6O5rVlZkTBaFiUUjKxLIeZpoUQvvU3-HXaK-RgemVdLSusG4huwBWyP48ifOrnw3CKtIaZRR5vPYQds1xgm52kDbLekE_3bAdtTtzs6ANv-DqIdlxATiIYDVtsfA6LpvvtzPo_dFbB6k44gGmRY_BQnmX6DaK43wGpMDkRzm3tthh-frxP19ywqux7Oe7dVEgo2P7TznxDpv63uCv8GAAD__zymd10).
## Patrick Unveils Priorities
Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick unveiled his [top 25 legislative priorities](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQhJ8Gd1jLgn8oKK5xl2uvtMBsYiRiLLOKk7c_JdU1141mpE-j7-cyX3zKabt9-zs5fl7LjICdBCU1zNGn_JpNE12AaFVDTg16RN33iM3qbFBou2CW0Y7RxMUSjkp3MCjbQ4fQJPeGgdKgFFo1tDF4FUfoetLBD6YTBigmLkfLKzE9fb3mV3nQ0S7l3mS3Mu9V6C-Bk8DpPM92C0u8nu9Z4LTRWQVOe8mJ0_KOuWwkK_tD_ik_YJlZ3spDctmlAVlp80wypJyrHC2vslKtqWwCJz102uhe4NQcLu5nyjnVfhAGbnef8ucb_yvr4fA3AAD___Enay0) for the current session on Wednesday. Each priority corresponds to an upcoming bill in the Republican-controlled Senate, which Patrick presides over. The list includes [several education reforms](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0ULuOpDAQ_BqT9cg2BpbAwSRctCddtCFqcAOtMzayfbDz9ycm36ykeqiqvj7HT2TPYf2NO9nyvcRRS92AVFDL0SH712gqZyfpelWRVV39oeu21brabL0Y3TXUYtcbQlrI9dpIpGVqXSOdrNjeYVLVUindq-7hJlTuQzYt1RN2phFGkuMS06NsVOgb8-Jf8aT0mONeebuVcmRRP4UehB6u63rsOdyc0AMF-JeFHo7oufB8w_W2hp1CudUbFsBE4DDAgSXx_Bcy6AZKPMDTytlj4ZPgSBwTF6YMCO8WcFLKHAPEBVxcCco2w4QBMDjYYyKhB0zwfKqX-fXnq0rWHRd7z7nthJHrjuzfE8qPn55W_w8AAP__FcR8Iw), such as “Providing School Choice” (Senate Bill 2), “Placing the Ten Commandments in School” (Senate Bill 10), “Protecting the Freedom to Pray in School” (Senate Bill 11), “Establishing a Parental Bill of Rights in Public Education” (Senate Bill 12), and “Guarding Against Inappropriate Books in Public Schools” (Senate Bill 13). Other items are clearly [inspired by President Trump’s agenda](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FyhCAUAL8GOhx4oEhBkcbu0qZ0HvLuZIJyo0TPv89c-tQ7szv7dRtvmHJaH5-4kK-vexlBQiukElqOEVO-RsOjDzI6xckrq3vQXQfAZ29JtyYATJMNaPTdBuip64GC1KQd8uTfMqm0VAqcsk0MqGIv2450QGtaZiTFVMvW1JkqvXC_56sctDVTWXj2c63PnekPBgOD4TzP5sK5lDdlMKx07gyGXMWjHCLiKp5YtzR9i_JTc1ppF8oa1zrjVDPXJfPNx-eZck57Z5mRjwVT_kvVf98PD78BAAD__16KW4c), including “Requiring Local Law Enforcement to Assist the Federal Government’s Deportation Efforts” (Senate Bill 8), a state DOGE initiative (Senate Bill 14), and “Making Texas Healthy Again” (Senate Bill 25). Some of the [most controversial items](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL9utDAQxJ8GukW2-XcULq6hu-8rU6LFXmATg5HtO463j0jqVDPSjH4azcdjeCA73uZ_uJJO78kPSqgahIRSDBbZnUOVWz0K28mctGzLmyqbRql80VVN1rS2rsexpLGhSSmaRGOxEy2OxuSsL5iQpZBSdbIt7IjS3kTdUDliW9VZJchy8qFICyV6Y5zc6V8UCuPX3OklpT1m5T1Tfab64ziKNW5XlqmeNnjGTPUbHZfs3nFic9loFu8dmMWzIUj4BvNMEQI5ntlvwBv8ViJgIIi0YSLYA_vAiSmCSzD7F-yYApsviHheWAxwv8uz-t995kHb_WDnODZtVol5RXY_m9OfJ760-g4AAP__pFN4BA) are likely to include “Stopping Non-Citizens from Voting” (Senate Bill 16), “Stopping Foreign Adversaries’ Land Grabs” (Senate Bill 17), and “Stopping Drag Time Story Hour” (Senate Bill 18). [See the full list here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2OwyAQhJ8Gd2sB_i8ornGXa6-0wIC9OgIWbOzk7U9Jf90Uo5lP389tuWkMGLdvfXeKnj4tkssOuICGL1ZjeC1tZZXhdhKVU2JoRtn0vZTVrgY7dJ0c9WqcsaPvnNVmNX1nTK_t5H2F6j3GRcOFkJMYamu0sCPvetcYPbQda7mzSCnXtDtyT118eKXT5XpN9yqonegorPlicmZyvq6rDrSls_5U6y2dTM7vCyZnLt55YnIOBFs6weoIh6aM6y_oGNMjrq6Ax1wIcnpEC8kDpQNaDkfGlJFeYDCEAj5loN3BR0VwG5agCU8HxZWCKTI5V1nZ48IQsPQDa_l21xg-1PSvxlPJvwAAAP__pFl24Q).
## Bus Driver Takes Students to Wrong School
A substitute bus driver for Austin ISD [took students to the wrong school](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kL3OnDAQAJ8GOiN7zd8VLtLQXdqUaG0vhxVjkL0cx9tHl_7rR6PR_HnOTwwxpNdv3MjwZ9lnkNAJqYSWs8cQ77mtvbHSP1RNRg16BN33APVqFk_aOlC61YBW9t1ITj0cjb2zzoKqg_nKpNJSKXioofEWlR9l15O2OLRd1Urygffc8EpMHyxLvPc35cbtWx3NynyUSv-qYKpguq6rWfbPgGfhkL5IBVOiq1QwOdwOSzEKirRRYsy3ODBT4iIK3sKtIfpMSVyUSfwNPuFxkBfltIUDn0zCnkX4HN6UBZ9UPN51Nv64Qoyh9EPVyteGIf5P4x9fvQ38CwAA__9h8XDL) Tuesday morning, causing some parents to panic and accuse the driver of kidnapping their children. The driver was supposed to drop the students off at Campbell Elementary School. When he arrived, he couldn’t find the designated drop-off location, so he [drove to Winn Montessori](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAURp8GO8zloqgFxTZ2s-2W5gLXkSzqRFBn3n4z2__t9yUnJ-fPY3pQTHF7_qaVbXnP-4SArQQlNUyBYvpMTRWsgzCoiq3qdI_aGMRqseDVAGYeFMxkBuV1wN6rjpugXc--raL9wkBpUAoH1dXBkQo9tIa1o65pRQMcYtmPuixc-E15Tp_94qP2-1olu5TyykL_EjgKHO_7rv9eJ39PgSMdJfrEAseN7yxw5HB6KnHfBI7ZL_ueviuducRNxhykp_XlOCXJiVfeCh0f6c4swxEvPgSOaAYJ7YzAnZfKAcmGvJMDe5Z9o1zvnEHPfXXY8LpjSjGbTjTwXCmm_87lx4iXxX8BAAD__1ROc5M), about four miles away. Some parents noticed on a bus tracking app that their children had been taken to the wrong school and showed up at Winn to get answers about what had happened. When the driver would not immediately let the students out of the bus, some parents kicked the bus door, shattering the glass. The district indicated the bus driver is not facing charges, and his identity has not been released. In an [email to parents](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJx0j7FugzAQQL_GbEHnwz7w4KELW7p2RAe-BKumRrEVwt9X6d796T29r-t05Zjiz_2TN_H1dcsTAtoL6EsHU-CYzsk0wc8QnG7E674bsCNCbFYfghgOg7bMwZIwGSExbGZaDPEyNNG_ZaA70Bqd7tswsw4DWJJu5t5YZUBCrPnR1lWqvLjc0pmf8miXvDXJr7XuRXUfCkeF43Ec7Y0XmXP-fgMKx3Ju-xqlLVusq8Jxz6UWhaMzRATkEICcA9s8fNiPmFIs1CsD941j-ovUf6-fHn8DAAD__381WLQ), the district said the incident is being investigated and that counselors would “check in with your child today to ensure they receive any support needed.”

clean_body: Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick unveiled his top 25 legislative priorities for the current session on Wednesday. Each priority corresponds to an upcoming bill in the Republican-controlled Senate, which Patrick presides over. | | | | | | Thursday, January 30, 2025 ---|--- Good morning! On this day in 1946, was born in Dallas. Despite spending over 70 years in an iron lung after contracting polio at age 6, he became a successful lawyer. He also built a sizable following on TikTok before his death in March of last year. You know about Punxsutawney Phil, but have you heard of ? Check out today's Et Cetera section to learn more! We want to thank all the readers who contributed to our tip jar on Tuesday. Your contribution helps The Texas Flyover continue producing free, unbiased news. If you missed it, there's another below. We appreciate it! Today’s sponsor is . Check out their products below. Abilene 🌧️ 65/47° | Amarillo 🌧️ 51/29° | Austin ⛈️ 71/53° | Brownsville ⛈️ 78/64° | Corpus Christi ⛈️ 74/54° | DFW 🌧️ 66/51° | El Paso ☀️ 56/34° | Houston ⛈️ 73/57° | Laredo 🌧️ 76/58° | Lubbock 🌤️ 58/32° | Midland 🌤️ 59/35° | San Antonio ⛈️ 73/51° | Tyler 🌧️ 66/51° | Waco ⛈️ 66/48° | 'Nation's Report Card' Shows Texas Lagging Scores from the National Assessment of Educational Progress--more commonly known as the "Nation's Report Card"--were released yesterday. Texas eighth graders in reading and math proficiency. Just 25% of eighth graders scored high enough to be considered proficient in reading, and only 24% in math, compared to the national averages of 29% and 27%, respectively. While the rate of proficiency in reading is the same as that seen in 2019, math scores have declined significantly since then. Among Texas fourth graders, 28% scored at the , compared to 30% nationally. In math, 43% achieved a proficient score, compared to 39% for the rest of the country. During a State Board of Education meeting Wednesday, one member called the results "atrocious." Texas Education Agency Commissioner Mike Morath confessed that "we are far from recovered from the declines that we saw during the pandemic." See Texas's results . Patrick Unveils Priorities Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick unveiled his for the current session on Wednesday. Each priority corresponds to an upcoming bill in the Republican-controlled Senate, which Patrick presides over. The list includes , such as “Providing School Choice” (Senate Bill 2), “Placing the Ten Commandments in School” (Senate Bill 10), “Protecting the Freedom to Pray in School” (Senate Bill 11), “Establishing a Parental Bill of Rights in Public Education” (Senate Bill 12), and “Guarding Against Inappropriate Books in Public Schools” (Senate Bill 13). Other items are clearly , including “Requiring Local Law Enforcement to Assist the Federal Government’s Deportation Efforts” (Senate Bill 8), a state DOGE initiative (Senate Bill 14), and “Making Texas Healthy Again” (Senate Bill 25). Some of the are likely to include “Stopping Non-Citizens from Voting” (Senate Bill 16), “Stopping Foreign Adversaries’ Land Grabs” (Senate Bill 17), and “Stopping Drag Time Story Hour” (Senate Bill 18). . Bus Driver Takes Students to Wrong School A substitute bus driver for Austin ISD Tuesday morning, causing some parents to panic and accuse the driver of kidnapping their children. The driver was supposed to drop the students off at Campbell Elementary School. When he arrived, he couldn’t find the designated drop-off location, so he , about four miles away. Some parents noticed on a bus tracking app that their children had been taken to the wrong school and showed up at Winn to get answers about what had happened. When the driver would not immediately let the students out of the bus, some parents kicked the bus door, shattering the glass. The district indicated the bus driver is not facing charges, and his identity has not been released. In an , the district said the incident is being investigated and that counselors would “check in with your child today to ensure they receive any support needed.” | Flying together with our sponsor Through , take control of your weight loss journey with a treatment plan tailored by medical professionals to help you reach your goals. () ➤ Austin: A dam floodgate got stuck in the open position during routine work on Tuesday, causing the water level in Lady Bird Lake to drop more than two feet in just a few hours. Crews installed a temporary barrier. subject: Airliner Collision Over D.C., Fed Pauses Rate Cuts, and Fish vs. Mermaid
body:
An American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers collided with an army helicopter last night near Reagan National Airport and crashed into the Potomac River, shutting down all flights at the Washington D.C. airport as rescue crews launched a massive emergency search for victims. [Follow live updates here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L3OozAQheGrMZ2R_wKkcLENXbbdEg32OMyuGSNjBeXuV0n_9UePjt4_j-UBlImfv2FH31JZjDI3qbS0aolA-b24LvqEaNB26PVoJ2OH-6C7zd_t5IIe1GTXSdngVAKt7C1pdHe3rqkj_9GUtkpre3NDP9lpxYQqRbdGHZVwCiO1Uvu_hbhtmPK7vLD2oexd9ltrxynsL2FmYebrunpeA-P1LvXfZyLMzHidwsy5BMjCzLBjpQAsgWomxlMeGRhlqHBueEriVuRRWtkhyEovrJIRqqwIT2DJ0KjwVxq0GcdRCzN31cfjopzpHEbh1HMHyt-H7adiL2_-BwAA__83vW8A).

| | |
---
| [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kD-vozAQxD-N6YLWXiCmcHFSlC7XXokMu4BP_oNsJ6d8-xN59XvtzE-jmfnzmB7WeRe33zawqWuaFKj-AvKCMJF1_j11DZmVWTE2bOQVtcJhHGSzG6uxh06TXtZlpB5mHMZx7WBma2Emapw500AiSIl9N7Qa9cwrw0rdTJJAdMDkasrt3-Ri3Xn17_Ti3C4pNN7stR5F4C-h7kLdXXxxqe1hF1vSSZwy3p81TCU988ICbxTyl-9tJBe3w24s1HAygck9g8DbYXONnMvuDqnhgj1On71CDTXawOUHZpJw7TUiaBibbOj457x3ZbiKDrZgnf80r989-TLqfwAAAP__-TV0dA) | |
# Thursday, January 30, 2025
---|---
**Good Morning!** On this day in 1965, Sir Winston Churchill was laid to rest at St. Martin's Church. The funeral was attended by representatives from 120 countries, including 6,000 people, and witnessed by over 350 million viewers. It was [the largest state funeral](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FuwyAQANCvgS3WwRHiDAyVKm-p5KHqaGHfEVPhEGHsyn9ftXt-4Env6zbcfEzxcf_wC7sa8qBBn0-gTggD-ZiOwUhygVkzSnbqgq1Ge7VKzg6m0VLAiUmDATbeEwRPLVuNV2onGd2fBgpBKTwb27TYjhwYApmRFIEwwBRrLs13jo86c0hH3rk0U15kcnOtz1Xgm9Cd0N2Rt7o1IwvdzX2iT-a99L3ALrCvW2GB7-vsC5Msjp4_MaW42oswcF98TP9kfVXcnf4NAAD__zQQVAU) in British history. Our readers helped shape today’s edition by sharing their childhood memories of activities that wouldn’t quite pass today’s parenting standards. Instead of our usual _Throwback Thursday_ section, we’re featuring stories from our readers. We’ve selected four to share, but rest assured—we’ve read and appreciated every single submission. We also want to say thanks to all the readers who contributed to our tip jar on Tuesday—it helps _The Flyover_ keep producing free, unbiased news. If you missed it, there's another [opportunity to contribute](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0z7FutDAQBOCnsTvQ2gvGFC7-hu7-NiWy2fXhyGAEzkX39tFFaVKkHc180rzd5ptPOe33_35jV2OZNei-AdUgzORTfs6dJBeZNaNkpwa0Gs1olFydMdqqJYwhYO8tjtH3lpeBICKADSSTe2mgEJTCvjOtRRs4MkTqAikC0QFTquVs30va68oxP8uDz3Ypm8xurfW4BP4TehJ6unj5OLn1O1Opr4bQU125-dkIPa2cj-Z3JE9Hx2fKOV1mEB3cN5_yN1__uvtw-isAAP__57xX4g) below. We appreciate it! If you're looking for your next investment opportunity, be sure to check out today's sponsor, [Pacaso](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kD-vozAQxD-N6YLWXiCmcHFSlC7XXokMu4BP_oNsJ6d8-xN59XvtzE-jmfnzmB7WeRe33zawqWuaFKj-AvKCMJF1_j11DZmVWTE2bOQVtcJhHGSzG6uxh06TXtZlpB5mHMZx7WBma2Emapw500AiSIl9N7Qa9cwrw0rdTJJAdMDkasrt3-Ri3Xn17_Ti3C4pNN7stR5F4C-h7kLdXXxxqe1hF1vSSZwy3p81TCU988ICbxTyl-9tJBe3w24s1HAygck9g8DbYXONnMvuDqnhgj1On71CDTXawOUHZpJw7TUiaBibbOj457x3ZbiKDrZgnf80r989-TLqfwAAAP__-TV0dA).
|
---
## Airliner, Helicopter Collide over D.C.
An American Airlines jet carrying at least 60 passengers [collided with an army helicopter](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00L3OozAQheGrMZ2R_wKkcLENXbbdEg32OMyuGSNjBeXuV0n_9UePjt4_j-UBlImfv2FH31JZjDI3qbS0aolA-b24LvqEaNB26PVoJ2OH-6C7zd_t5IIe1GTXSdngVAKt7C1pdHe3rqkj_9GUtkpre3NDP9lpxYQqRbdGHZVwCiO1Uvu_hbhtmPK7vLD2oexd9ltrxynsL2FmYebrunpeA-P1LvXfZyLMzHidwsy5BMjCzLBjpQAsgWomxlMeGRhlqHBueEriVuRRWtkhyEovrJIRqqwIT2DJ0KjwVxq0GcdRCzN31cfjopzpHEbh1HMHyt-H7adiL2_-BwAA__83vW8A) last night near Reagan National Airport and crashed into the Potomac River, shutting down all flights at the Washington D.C. airport as rescue crews launched a massive emergency search for victims. You can see the observation camera [video of the collision explosion here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kDFv8yAQQH8N3hIddxjwwBB9kT91SNeokwXhiKmIbcXUbfrrq3Tv-ob3pHc-DSefS56ur_7GrqZ5QMB2B3JHMESfy2NQTXSJGZkadtKQRdKdls3oyAbDHhR1nUlRp-ARMIbOmzZSgkuT3dMGkkBKapXeW7KBE0OKKkQZQSjgmOt837_Peaojp_KYN77vL_OtKW6sdVkFHQT2AvuvJxXY15FD8d8ssF-rrx-rwF5aq0yHslMttgAWwAjqV0FHpQXqKuho7MsE_7ZpMfzfLOe3Yx4u7aG5u7h85lLyqo1QcL35XH7z9a8dm8OfAAAA__-5Gl0s). Early reports indicated that American Eagle regional flight 5342, operated by PSA Airlines, was inbound from Wichita, Kansas when it collided with a military Blackhawk helicopter on approach to the airport around 9 p.m. ET. [Here are live updates.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL1urDAUhJ_GdEb-w4sLF7eh29umRAf7AI6MjYwXtG8fESVlum80o9FoPp7jE0IMafkPG9o651Ew0VHGqWSjhxDfo2q8nREFygYtf8heSG00b1bLOedgFBjVq85r9zCd7jrDJ6kAUJsm2LuNcck4l53SbS_7CWdks1eT554RxdCHmkv7mUOqK87xnU8srctbE-1a634Q-Y-IgYjhuq42TS7hddw-EcONRAyvg_5QDCfSKebll1-7h4oH3SMkpK7Asd4q17yBoyWcWKjLMYYj5ERXjMHlvWKhBWGBRBMtLgHvjVGiKdbvV7jD-kEUWzYI8Xtp_eu504qvAAAA__-WcnJy) Emergency responders from multiple agencies rushed to the scene as [the scope of the disaster became clear](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLGO8yAQhJ_G7ogWFmOnoPibdPnbK63Fu8SciLEwSpS3P_n6K2dGGn36vu7znVJO2-M_PcW3WGYDZlCgFcLMlPJntj37KGIEe_F6xMmguzrdr34SEweQgAOjJjaax-AgOochRg6uT_58A42gNQ7WXSacgkSByDawZugsCKdW6uW7pK2tEvOnvKRelvLss19b248O_3Xm1pkb7Zu8j3M6Q21pydKZWy0bZVZV6EGb2qils1CU6l5qU0ulY1WLhKCtYWOn4RoIFisgNrJbEMcRY1897--Uczrc2Fl4PCnlX4r2l5WXNz8BAAD__58IZHA). Inflatable fireboats were deployed in the Potomac, which was flooded with lights to help locate bodies. Details about the cause of the collision were sparse in the first hours. The Federal Aviation Administration stated that it and the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) will investigate the crash, with the NTSB leading the inquiry.
## Guantanamo Bay Readied for Deported Migrants
The White House announced Wednesday that [Guantanamo Bay](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LuOqzAQxvGnsTsi3wCncHEaupx2SzTgAWblS2QmifL2q2y_9afvV_y_bvMNKFHZ_0PGwFudjTJ9p3Rn1RyB0nt2MoYN0aCVGPRovbHDddDyCL1zbhzUqlft1eKxH_3mYcRlWf169UpS-GhKW6W17d1w8dYvuKHaoluijko4hZG4tst3pcIHbuldn9gua80yhYP5fgr7T5hJmIkPPCilzybMdNSMBV-nMBPETIVObsBUizBTr7X117Hj9sj3bn9AYSiQa7fAu8u0Nyj8OcoW4v1FKdE5jMKpPQP9-pL_avEM5icAAP__RI5hmg) will be converted into a 30,000-person migrant facility to house deported migrants under a new executive order. The U.S. naval base in Cuba is [mainly known for detaining suspects](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMZ2j9doYKFz8DV3-9kpks-vEJwMWOIl4-xPX37SfNBrN1326-5TT-vjvF3Y1bhMCthKU1DCRT_mcTEMuMiPrhp3qdI_aDlY1T9eawZqOgu5mMF3vWSNzOwc1AA-tt01yVxsoDUrp1thbr_vAkSGSCaQIhAGmVLf99r2ltT455nN7836bt6XJ7llrOYT-J3AUOPqy8ue4SOCY05sFjnV_LUWWnY9EvM6nfBXylQ9J_pQKBGq4ogYjg8EoiQclvQqdDHOINoK5uNkdlU_KOR22EwYei0_5d0P965O3w58AAAD__1i2YJc) from the Sept. 11, 2001, attacks, but it also has a facility for migrants. The Migrant Operations Center holds individuals detained at sea, primarily from Haiti and Cuba. President Trump told reporters he plans to instruct the Departments of Defense and Homeland Security to begin preparations for the facility to house the “[worst criminal illegal aliens](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLtuxCAURL8Gd6wuF68fBUUauk2b0sLm4iXhYRm8K_995PTpRpqjo9F8PaaH8cGn9dNEUtXlCQHvHASXMFnjwzm1jVWOCEk2pEQvB5Td2Inmqe4jSTuMvQNC6rAdXNvJBUC4Ze5xocarywZCghDy3na3QQ4zOQJn29kKC6wFsr7m_fadfapPcuHML9pvS45NUM9at8LkB0PNUKdzy6VeFUN9iRlqEFceGeqj8ETvwlDX_YgbNynlIy1U-LHxmrmEH-5DoNUE7mP0625SLfztQ-Az8UKpXth6mFRNMjHz2ZwMdbMru12UL13PWlij8eFvX_3vr5fC3wAAAP__Sr9tAA) threatening the American people.” According to the Pentagon, 15 prisoners are still held at Guantanamo Bay.
## Students Lag in Reading, Math
Student achievement in reading and math among America’s fourth and eighth graders [is still below](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kLHOpCAUhZ8GOwxcULSg2IZutt3SoPc6w0bBAI7x7Tdu_3enODnny_fnNb182EJ8__Y72bqmCQR0XEiuxIQ-bPekG7QrEZBqyEqjBlD92MvmY1dDah7M0ikCKUdP86xUJ6XutFnQzE2wz5qQSkipOt23gxpmWkmsqGeUKJgWhKGm3P5NIdYPrdudvpTbJe3NZj-1HoWpXwwcA3ddV3sWXxP6-ykwcKWmfDNwka7CwBGei68hRQbueWbghHzyyMCdhZd6IsXKM3kM8c3LkjIVjjkdByFf0jcgP3xE2sPCwBkzmlFoJYRh4Jps8bjCtoXSG6bFe_dh-09afzL3tfAvAAD__6A9bqU) pre-pandemic performance levels, according to a new assessment of the nation’s schools. According to the National Assessment of Educational Progress, which tests fourth- and eighth-grade students in math and reading every two years, the nation's young people scored, on average, [five points lower](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx00LGOszAQBOCnMV3QeteAU7j4pV90ufZKtInX4JPBkbGC8vYn7uorZ4pvpPm8TTeOKW7zB6_iasgTAnYX0BeCyXNM78k03gURFGrE6YEsUn_tdbO4QTrDwRq4Dp02Q4Cr9HdL3BFLp8E20Z0aaAKtqTN9a8neJQgEb-5ee1AGxMeaS_uV41YXCemdX1LaR16b5JZan7uifwpHheNxHO3GNeZtL_LMpT64-HbOL4Xjb7ErHFeui6xc4-NMCGgUjrOZ7InQOBf2oui_bYrzzyOmFPd-UAbmlWP62a1__fBy-B0AAP__OIReVQ) in reading than those who were tested before the COVID-19 pandemic in 2019. Both grades also scored lower in math, with fourth graders averaging 3 points and eighth graders 8 points below pre-pandemic levels. Officials acknowledge [the pandemic’s impact](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx0kL2O6yAQRp_G7oiGH49JQXGbdLntlhYw45gVMRagRHn7lbff8tMnHR2dr_ty9ymn_fHfP9n1tSwK1CRACg0L-ZQ_ixnJrcyK9chOztoqjVeU4-YCGfKTkhGsvsqZQoQr2RgAIwMijsmdNJAapNSTwYvVNvDKsJIJJAkGA0ypl3r5LmnvG6_5U15cL7E8x-y23o826H-Dug3q5o-d3-28zlF7ipkHdds9H6Jz66LFUrmJ3fdU9iYqH6V2EX0l0eJWShYIcgI5IRsZ7CRtYB2QfVjnmSAijtXR8U45p4bzYODx9Cn_yvS_4ryc-gkAAP__DOVmLw) but note that students are reading less for enjoyment and missing more school, explaining a drop in academic scores.
|
---
**➤ The Office of Management and Budget** reversed its call to freeze federal grants and loans Wednesday after GOP lawmakers expressed concerns over the new policy. _This week’s special edition of Throwback Thursday features memories of dangerous childhood activities from you, our readers—thank you for sharing!_ **➤ “We used to play** with the big lawn darts that could kill you if they came down on your head, and the glass ball clackers! Living on the edge in the 60s!” (_From Kerry S_.) **➤ “I spent my early years** in Canada. We would hitch rides by grabbing the backs of milk trucks, traveling down icy streets, and sliding along for as long as we could on our feet.” (_From Ken S._) **➤ “I lit firecrackers,** cherry bombs, bulldogs, and ladyfingers with my friends. It was fun, and no one blew off a finger! I also had two six-shooters (cap pistols) and the requisite holster to wear them. And an army rifle.” (_From Cathy_) **➤ “I couldn’t come up **with anything worth sharing that would be frowned upon today that was done in the 60s—but what I did come up with was about 100 things that are done today that would have been frowned upon back then!” (_From Jason D._)

clean_body: An American Airlines jet carrying 60 passengers collided with an army helicopter last night near Reagan National Airport and crashed into the Potomac River, shutting down all flights at the Washington D.C. airport as rescue crews launched a massive emergency search for victims. . | | | | | | Thursday, January 30, 2025 ---|--- Good Morning! On this day in 1965, Sir Winston Churchill was laid to rest at St. Martin's Church. The funeral was attended by representatives from 120 countries, including 6,000 people, and witnessed by over 350 million viewers. It was in British history. Our readers helped shape today’s edition by sharing their childhood memories of activities that wouldn’t quite pass today’s parenting standards. Instead of our usual Throwback Thursday section, we’re featuring stories from our readers. We’ve selected four to share, but rest assured—we’ve read and appreciated every single submission. We also want to say thanks to all the readers who contributed to our tip jar on Tuesday—it helps The Flyover keep producing free, unbiased news. If you missed it, there's another below. We appreciate it! If you're looking for your next investment opportunity, be sure to check out today's sponsor, . | Airliner, Helicopter Collide over D.C. An American Airlines jet carrying at least 60 passengers last night near Reagan National Airport and crashed into the Potomac River, shutting down all flights at the Washington D.C. airport as rescue crews launched a massive emergency search for victims. You can see the observation camera . Early reports indicated that American Eagle regional flight 5342, operated by PSA Airlines, was inbound from Wichita, Kansas when it collided with a military Blackhawk helicopter on approach to the airport around 9 p.m. ET. Emergency responders from multiple agencies rushed to the scene as . Inflatable fireboats were deployed in the Potomac, which was flooded with lights to help locate bodies. Details about the cause of the collision were sparse in the first hours. The Federal Aviation Administration stated that it and the National Transportation Safety Board (NTSB) will investigate the crash, with the NTSB leading the inquiry. Guantanamo Bay Readied for Deported Migrants The White House announced Wednesday that will be converted into a 30,000-person migrant facility to house deported migrants under a new executive order. The U.S. naval base in Cuba is from the Sept. 11, 2001, attacks, but it also has a facility for migrants. The Migrant Operations Center holds individuals detained at sea, primarily from Haiti and Cuba. President Trump told reporters he plans to instruct the Departments of Defense and Homeland Security to begin preparations for the facility to house the “ threatening the American people.” According to the Pentagon, 15 prisoners are still held at Guantanamo Bay. Students Lag in Reading, Math Student achievement in reading and math among America’s fourth and eighth graders pre-pandemic performance levels, according to a new assessment of the nation’s schools. According to the National Assessment of Educational Progress, which tests fourth- and eighth-grade students in math and reading every two years, the nation's young people scored, on average, in reading than those who were tested before the COVID-19 pandemic in 2019. Both grades also scored lower in math, with fourth graders averaging 3 points and eighth graders 8 points below pre-pandemic levels. Officials acknowledge but note that students are reading less for enjoyment and missing more school, explaining a drop in academic scores. | ➤ The Office of Management and Budget reversed its call to freeze federal grants and loans Wednesday after GOP lawmakers expressed concerns over the new policy. () ➤Former Democratic Sen. Bob Menendez was sentenced to 11 years in prison Wednesday after being convicted of bribery and corruption charges, including accepting gold, cash, and a car for aiding foreign governments. () ➤The Laken Riley Act , named after a Georgia nursing student murdered last year, was signed into law Wednesday, mandating the detention of illegal aliens arrested for certain crimes, including burglary and theft. () | Flying together with our sponsor International expansion powers “unlisted” stock price change Co-ownership is a trend growing 21% annually in America – but it is international growth that is driving As the leader in the $1.3T vacation home market, Pacaso’s international success highlights its scalable model. Their first Paris property sold out so fast that they doubled down and immediately purchased another. In Cabo, they’ve added seven homes. . That’s why they formed a new partnership with a private UK lender to foster additional growth. With $100M+ in gross profits already and proven scalability, it’s no wonder SoftBank has already invested. | ➤Paul Skenes, Elly De La Cruz, and Gunnar Henderson will all be featured on the cover art for MLB’s flagship simulation baseball game, MLB The Show 25. () ➤Washington Commanders offensive coordinator Kliff Kingsbury has announced that he will remain with the team next season despite teams asking to interview him for multiple coaching positions. () ➤ Portland Trail Blazers forward Toumani Camara slammed down this dunk over two-time NBA MVP Giannis Antetokounmpo on Tuesday night, powering the Blazers to a 125-112 win over the Milwaukee Bucks. () **➤Yesterday’s results: | | | | **** | Today's White House section is brought to you by: ➤ Robert F. Kennedy Jr. faced vocal protesters during questioning from senators at his first confirmation hearing to become health secretary. He'll have a second hearing today. () ➤ The Department of Justice on Wednesday dropped its effort to prosecute two men accused of helping former co-defendant President Trump hide classified documents at his Mar-a-Lago residence. () ➤ British Ambassador Peter Mandelson retracted his 2019 remarks on Wednesday, admitting it was “ill-judged and wrong” to call President Trump a “danger to the world.” () Flying together with our sponsor ➤**Naturally Improve Your Sleep & Reduce Stress. stress and improves your ability to fall asleep faster. We would hitch rides by grabbing the backs of milk trucks, traveling down icy streets, and sliding along for as long as we could on our feet.” (From Ken S.) ➤ “I lit firecrackers, cherry bombs, bulldogs, and ladyfingers with my friends. name: Update for America
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.
| | | [](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zc45uajtck4hs3m8ssohfq9hvkp8t3foth2gcm88_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imapr4c9h2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zl3pif15c4sc37a2l7eb5s58skcem11ve8g657rg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imapr4c9h2bs)
---
| | In this **[](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zdbko81hb3q8n6u0mi352amd8g5m2p5rpab36eno_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imapr4c9h2bs)[25-page commentary](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2z483f92l3sl56cc9s7ql0jn6alhsj5p4j0pdqnm8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imapr4c9h2bs)** , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://e.updateforamerica.com/rd/9z2zt7tsn01h94airs6it9tlnuvjc1hu5h8m6dbq6qg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imapr4c9h2bs)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

clean_body: One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes. One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes. | | | | | Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes. They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict? | | | In this , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome. With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality. Thanks, Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world. Update For America PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |
