| Candidate Training Dates: Take the First Step Toward Shaping Massachusetts' Future
---
---
| Massachusetts is at a turning point. A significant political realignment is underway, and our state is moving decisively to the right. Now is the time to act. Starting SATURDAY, the Massachusetts Republican Party will hold twice-monthly training sessions for those ready to run for municipal office in 2025 and beyond.
Municipal elections are the foundation of a successful political career, providing a pathway to higher office. Whether you're considering a run for school board, select board, city council, mayor--or even dog catcher--we want to help you succeed.
Our comprehensive candidate training sessions will cover essential topics such as political strategy, data, finance, and communications. You'll gain the tools and insights needed to run and win as a Republican in Massachusetts. Thanks to our generous donors these training sessions will be FREE to partake in.
Here are the details for our first four sessions:
Fall River 🗓️ February 1, 2025 ⏰ 12:00 PM 📍 VFW 486 Bedford Street, Fall River, MA
Holyoke 🗓️ February 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Holyoke Public Library, 250 Chestnut Street, Holyoke, MA
Lawrence 🗓️ March 1, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 Parkside Apartments Community Room 2 Bennington St, Lawrence, MA 01840
Worcester 🗓️ March 15, 2025 ⏰ 10:00 AM 📍 765 W Boylston Street, Floor 2, Worcester, MA
Don't miss this opportunity to shape the future of Massachusetts!
[Register Now](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001qgieyT7MY3iGZysJgo-FmfSWhk-O1-UFUpO7z7m3a69kiR-cGEKBZr8RFIWB_31ZmaA1ubFGM6hJgGonmZ-dlNAEbDLRebFoZEBPfsGe4gyIF5LLsbfqxpESeJ5C_U6zgR2v_kwdxSkG4-5FAAdCTNEvOakTYBzetrLN1E4DfkFRLn9z5O25Qi7BLX2muMLFB_ZzirQp552OWranPP7Nhc7k6uI6D5SyFeOvJp1m5mcbcibz5anp16TpaPqqeEDGFUc88brDWWVZ_yLAqB3JqiAWdKaf8Qiy&c=LG7ukii29SycMn7QxOkQ4VBMIWDvhMa0aowx0iVacx3QEuq_J0kytA==&ch=J7Ylcjo00ylmFn-Lb7OsjtF3NDJ_GJIiQjdCzlmz2gNsXhLHwMozQQ==)
Let's build a stronger Massachusetts, starting with you.

name: History Facts
subject: Which U.S. president had the most children?
body:
America’s 10th president, John Tyler, was born in 1790, and as of December 2023, still has one living grandchild [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?xtl=1krv9cfc68d8o8dr6nouh299dyiz87ms2d8c5ou5cck7jrmhqro3pj5hhqhl3v42g8409b3vqjwtn25sqwue6x00u6idjwk7812tpa3ost21pa7xw8umth4xjxc3e6hwz598dp23qf1wdwzd2o37juxbx&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
---
---
# [John Tyler had 15 children, the most of any U.S. president.](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
### [Famous Figures](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)
| A merica’s 10th president, John Tyler, was born in 1790, and as of December 2023, still has one living grandchild. The reason that’s possible? Tyler had children at all stages of his adult life — [15 kids total](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com), the most of any U.S. president. His first child, Mary, was born in 1815, when he was 25 years old. His youngest, Pearl, was born in 1860, when Tyler was 70, less than two years before his death.
---
Tyler and his first wife, Letitia Christian Tyler, had eight children together. The couple were both in their early 50s and already grandparents when Tyler took office in 1841, first as Vice President and then, after the death of President William Henry Harrison a month later, as president. Letitia wasn’t in good health, and passed away in 1842, making Tyler the first U.S. president to become a widower while in office. Two years later, Tyler married his second wife, Julia Gardiner Tyler — making him also the first U.S. president to get married while in office. Julia was just 24 years old at the time, 30 years the president’s junior. Together, they had seven more kids, for a grand total of 15. Tyler’s 13th child, Lyon, was born when his father was 63 years old, and later in life, Lyon also had a much younger second wife. Lyon had two very long-lived sons who were born in the 1920s when Lyon was in his 70s. The elder son, Lyon Jr., died in 2020. John Tyler’s last surviving grandson, Harrison Ruffin Tyler, is more than 90 years old today.
[](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) | [](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com)

## It’s a common myth that William Henry Harrison died due to a long inauguration speech.
William Henry Harrison, who died just a month into his presidential term, is still the shortest-serving President in U.S. history. For more than a century, the commonly accepted story was that Harrison caught a cold after delivering what’s still the longest-ever inaugural address in freezing weather. As the story goes, the President wore no overcoat, hat, or gloves during the 8,445-word speech, and wound up with pneumonia. But even Harrison’s doctor was unsure of the diagnosis at the time. In 2014, researchers [took another look](https://track.historyfacts.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sqwhkw&__onlt=h&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com) at the evidence and noted that Harrison’s symptoms started not in his respiratory system, but in his gut. They theorize that Washington, D.C.’s sewage, which at the time flowed into a marsh not far from the White House, got into the President’s water supply and caused typhoid fever.

name: 1600 Daily
subject: Milton Friedman: What does “created equal” mean?
body:
One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.
| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zddm901p7vm2q2gtkap6645r3uhgo1aermcr07dg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imepj2c1h2bs)
---
| | Hi Friend, One of the reasons young people are so attracted to the idea of socialism is the promised equality of outcomes.

They want life to be fair for everyone, and for all to have wellness, happiness, and financial security. But if the end goal of socialism is "equality", that begs the question: what is equality? Are equality and liberty consistent one with the other or are they in conflict?
---
| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zqmv2sesffc6s8kclu83vq0pi3k4iccvnrj4a308_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imepj2c1h2bs)
---
| | In this **[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zlj12ama51253010jb097vf8nebps2vkauur6cvg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imepj2c1h2bs)[25-page commentary](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo0auia6aj8rfbekv2u100g8l43vur9oc2rlo860_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imepj2c1h2bs)** , "Created Equal", legendary economist and Hoover fellow Milton Friedman answers these and other questions in great depth. You'll learn what Thomas Jefferson meant when he wrote the words "created equal" in the Declaration of Independence and how the meaning has changed through American history. You'll see how Friedman brilliantly illustrates differences between equality of opportunity and equality of outcome.

With many today striving to increase government power in the name of a concept of "equality", Friedman's words still ring true for those who believe that a society that puts freedom first will end up with both greater freedom and greater equality.

**[Please follow this link to get your free copy of "Created Equal" now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zclnu0di50bssjfoluug0f1g0mvubs19t2v68tu8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9imepj2c1h2bs)**
Thanks,

Greg Greg Stamps | Online Development Hoover Institution | Stanford University
---

Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

body:
Rush in $10 to MassGOP ??
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001x54UZaImaCDh-ckId8SEj5u7uoNqV_R0wHDLcfipxoNJlx7ygEpx7pgRenFn7n0zEI9qNlLVkSPR26uvBj0sbHs2Yw_Ouzzd1cCeevPL1DpQBlHQhsZxU1zNNrusqLVX9br9FmZYBHQx5TPyayw8KA==&c=TnQUzg3zcm4EtfGwS1eNyKgxR63EgBOdsSgPTzaPZOUR92lawTZ0zQ==&ch=v1TxWtBWQcfTs0WYzE7HR8i3d7pgNgQhXAHMAd8ki1Pqajom0lR8DQ==)

| Hi Peter,
In case you haven't heard, MassGOP is laser focused on capitalizing on November's wins and revitalizing the Republican Party here in Massachusetts. It feels like Republicans of all stripes are more committed than ever to advancing conservative values and ensuring our collective success at the ballot box. Don't you feel it too?

name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: I want to send you a “47” hat
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf8ac75n3o1ldrro2dtdr2dvpm4ues317kefjvo8_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9im1oj2cjh2bs)
---
Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z0nc9cidlptftci36c1af4pd8qlk4r2o03v89trg_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9im1oj2cjh2bs)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhvsh7auief1cei3b6ke5795qmsr9vvhtbkaq888_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9im1oj2cjh2bs)**_

---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

* **Reaches nearly EVERY smartphone and computer in our country with POWERFUL, PRO-AMERICA content** -- as only Turning Point USA can go HEAD-TO-HEAD with the Fake News Media in online reach, AND

* **Continues to INSPIRE millions of kids to LOVE AMERICA again** , with a MASSIVE SWING in favor of conservative principles among young people under age 25!

But while we're seeing MAJOR WINS every day ... we must keep up our momentum until we TOTALLY WIN the American Culture War against the "Woke" Left! _**[Please, Fellow American, make your gift of any amount today to help Turning Point USA make MILLIONS MORE kids LOVE AMERICA again, and I'll send YOU a limited-edition "47" hat as my personal thanks.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrhmehh0fk6qoko4jd6rk4rtghmf038tn61mnd50_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9im1oj2cjh2bs)**_
---
[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zib5uk8jeu1r0ijgo16u0iemin99qf15rtufc79o_rp22sh2s8i6epj0s9im1oj2cjh2bs)
---
Thank YOU for your patriotism, moral courage, and generous support of the 820,000+ America-loving young people of Turning Point USA. Working together, I know we will totally defeat the "Woke" Left to WIN the American Culture War and restore PATRIOTISM and FREEDOM as our country's way of life again! Charlie Kirk
Founder & CEO
Turning Point USA

subject: Caught on TAPE: “The Deep State is Real”
body:
Byron was caught on camera explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. Watch here and support

| [](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkbuuGyEQhp-G7bC47bIuKCJZ7k7alKtZGGNkWBCX5PWjdeQuxSnnn29-6dP8-tq-IMRw-J-Q0Lxs3Wrb0r7l5KmF4Z-ddii4CSZmyjiVbJOTM-5qF1gmNFzLVahlXdn0NPMDr1fOZuQKVrVbjXIXDkAoq1e-PqZgzh7GJeNCXSW_7O6xKr1YabUGjTNRDCLWfnkhFpsPX7G1imXsMVg4LjanKZpn76UR-YOIOxH3hnZUvMCBLveTIOKeX4gPTOgC-JpHOaPkqUMstHXoSCtCpGmnJRcg8j562loe1SKRt_-gRCwncjaOROTtffYvs5AKBH8QefvYfTb56Hh0Im8vWwURC6Q83rOYp2pc-RNiDG3RRDGfIMS3X__uG34b8TcAAP__b5WSeA)

Dear Friend,

I've been reluctant to use the term "Deep State" as it sounds so conspiratorial and cloak and dagger.

But it's pretty easy to explain: The Deep State is a portion of 2 million federal workers who choose to obstruct the policies of the President of the United States.

They may not be meeting in secret or even working together. **They are men and women paid by us who choose to work against us to promote their own personal agenda**.

However, I will leave it to Byron Cohen, a Biden Administration holdover and advisor to the White House Office of Pandemic Preparedness and Response Policy, to explain.

**Byron was caught on camera** explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. **[Watch here and support our work.](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkbuuGyEQhp-G7bC47bIuKCJZ7k7alKtZGGNkWBCX5PWjdeQuxSnnn29-6dP8-tq-IMRw-J-Q0Lxs3Wrb0r7l5KmF4Z-ddii4CSZmyjiVbJOTM-5qF1gmNFzLVahlXdn0NPMDr1fOZuQKVrVbjXIXDkAoq1e-PqZgzh7GJeNCXSW_7O6xKr1YabUGjTNRDCLWfnkhFpsPX7G1imXsMVg4LjanKZpn76UR-YOIOxH3hnZUvMCBLveTIOKeX4gPTOgC-JpHOaPkqUMstHXoSCtCpGmnJRcg8j562loe1SKRt_-gRCwncjaOROTtffYvs5AKBH8QefvYfTb56Hh0Im8vWwURC6Q83rOYp2pc-RNiDG3RRDGfIMS3X__uG34b8TcAAP__b5WSeA)**

[](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkbuuGyEQhp-G7bC47bIuKCJZ7k7alKtZGGNkWBCX5PWjdeQuxSnnn29-6dP8-tq-IMRw-J-Q0Lxs3Wrb0r7l5KmF4Z-ddii4CSZmyjiVbJOTM-5qF1gmNFzLVahlXdn0NPMDr1fOZuQKVrVbjXIXDkAoq1e-PqZgzh7GJeNCXSW_7O6xKr1YabUGjTNRDCLWfnkhFpsPX7G1imXsMVg4LjanKZpn76UR-YOIOxH3hnZUvMCBLveTIOKeX4gPTOgC-JpHOaPkqUMstHXoSCtCpGmnJRcg8j562loe1SKRt_-gRCwncjaOROTtffYvs5AKBH8QefvYfTb56Hh0Im8vWwURC6Q83rOYp2pc-RNiDG3RRDGfIMS3X__uG34b8TcAAP__b5WSeA)
Maybe it took a Harvard PhD like Byron to explain what the Deep State does, but I suspect those tactics are just the tip of the icebeg of what these federal workers are planning to do during the Trump Administration . . . if they don't choose to resign.

President Trump gets it, and I suspect that's one of the reasons why 2 million government employees received a gracious offer for their resignation.

But we know that many of these federal workers will stay on board to obstruct, delay,, and undermine President Trump's policies over the next four years.

It's why OMG's work is so important. We're exposing these folks one at a time, **and our pace is picking up rapidly.**

**[Watch our latest release here, and please help fund our ongoing operations, which will expose the next Byron!](https://email.alert.keepcongressrepublican.com/c/eJyMkbuuGyEQhp-G7bC47bIuKCJZ7k7alKtZGGNkWBCX5PWjdeQuxSnnn29-6dP8-tq-IMRw-J-Q0Lxs3Wrb0r7l5KmF4Z-ddii4CSZmyjiVbJOTM-5qF1gmNFzLVahlXdn0NPMDr1fOZuQKVrVbjXIXDkAoq1e-PqZgzh7GJeNCXSW_7O6xKr1YabUGjTNRDCLWfnkhFpsPX7G1imXsMVg4LjanKZpn76UR-YOIOxH3hnZUvMCBLveTIOKeX4gPTOgC-JpHOaPkqUMstHXoSCtCpGmnJRcg8j562loe1SKRt_-gRCwncjaOROTtffYvs5AKBH8QefvYfTb56Hh0Im8vWwURC6Q83rOYp2pc-RNiDG3RRDGfIMS3X__uG34b8TcAAP__b5WSeA)**

Thanks again for all you do, and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: Team Evergreen
subject: Tell Congress: Don't let Trump cut essential services
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
This is an administrative coup
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3285113/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Hi—

In his fervor to pursue every far-right policy fantasy outlined in Project 2025, Trump issued a memo on the evening of January 27 to cut funding to popular benefit and grant programs that Americans depend on. The sweeping yet vague announcement spread panic and chaos, and still threatens states and households that rely on essential programs for food aid, disaster relief, housing assistance, small business loans, education services, healthcare, climate initiatives... the list is long.

**It’s an administrative coup—and frankly,_blatantly illegal_.** By claiming the power to halt funding that’s already been authorized by Congress, Trump is showing us that he won’t hesitate to throw the constitution out the window and the American economy into chaos in order to funnel more money to his billionaire friends.

We need to mobilize and fight back _fast_ , and **one key thing you can do right now is to help us overwhelm Congress with messages.**

This tactic is already working, as initial public uproar has forced the administration to issue clarifications and prompted legal action.

**But in a time when spreading chaos feels like an intentional diversion tactic, we cannot afford to let them think we aren’t paying attention.**

[**Tell Congress to stand up for working families and oppose these catastrophic cuts.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3285114/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[TAKE ACTION](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3285115/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Trump wants to cut “useless government spending,” but a lot of the programs on the chopping block aren’t useless—**they’re essential.** Programs like health care for veterans, food assistance for families, and life-saving cancer research.

One example is LIHEAP (the Low-Income Energy Assistance Program), which provides federal funding assistance for people’s household energy needs. Given we just saw severe winter storms all across the country, an attack on LIHEAP could be life-or-death for families struggling to pay their heating bills.

**Bottom line****: Trump is trying to illegally take away support from American families so he can cut taxes for his billionaire friends—and we shouldn’t stand for it.**

We must not let Trump and his extremist allies go unchallenged in this reckless Project 2025 play designed to instill chaos. [**Tell Congress their constituents are watching and we expect them to stand up and fight.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3285116/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
| In solidarity,

Team Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support. |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3285117/87SdQ4wZ)
---

| [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AfBPQMVj1vJa-JgcMlCLwg~~/AARclBA~/GL8fMf9xB91ZxYIpf4roTAEtCVeBfF9BqfRtj0U_TYZZZD1vmDFM1WnewtjkRktUu2SyQXZJYhzGf8U6GTTPmuXRhVizQxUTz99YH-WjcMYU80VDJkphRrCm4ujl-ADkgzHoKcsAUZSS5-g3xLxe9S2gKwenRvNuSUbfUWdVCV5MVwU-ynlozpBMp0-QpTNFaSNYS2aHM0CcJDCAun_TQU06j_5Ai267LG8vArw8pRGVV1ZLCLjPzDBer799xhgQqvQHuBrNIS31xBcpPD8v0CWSjY20A3L3140nnMGsAi8~)

Dear Friend,

I've been reluctant to use the term "Deep State" as it sounds so conspiratorial and cloak and dagger.

But it's pretty easy to explain: The Deep State is a portion of 2 million federal workers who choose to obstruct the policies of the President of the United States.

They may not be meeting in secret or even working together. **They are men and women paid by us who choose to work against us to promote their own personal agenda**.

However, I will leave it to Byron Cohen, a Biden Administration holdover and advisor to the White House Office of Pandemic Preparedness and Response Policy, to explain.

**Byron was caught on camera** explaining to our undercover investigative reporter what the Deep State is and how it works. **[Watch here and support our work.](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AfBPQMVj1vJa-JgcMlCLwg~~/AARclBA~/GL8fMf9xB91ZxYIpf4roTAEtCVeBfF9BqfRtj0U_TYZZZD1vmDFM1WnewtjkRktUu2SyQXZJYhzGf8U6GTTPmuXRhVizQxUTz99YH-WjcMYU80VDJkphRrCm4ujl-ADkgzHoKcsAUZSS5-g3xLxe9S2gKwenRvNuSUbfUWdVCV5MVwU-ynlozpBMp0-QpTNFaSNYS2aHM0CcJDCAun_TQU06j_5Ai267LG8vArw8pRGVV1ZLCLjPzDBer799xhgQqvQHuBrNIS31xBcpPD8v0CWSjY20A3L3140nnMGsAi8~)**

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AfBPQMVj1vJa-JgcMlCLwg~~/AARclBA~/GL8fMf9xB91ZxYIpf4roTAEtCVeBfF9BqfRtj0U_TYZZZD1vmDFM1WnewtjkRktUu2SyQXZJYhzGf8U6GTTPmuXRhVizQxUTz99YH-WjcMYU80VDJkphRrCm4ujl-ADkgzHoKcsAUZSS5-g3xLxe9S2gKwenRvNuSUbfUWdVCV5MVwU-ynlozpBMp0-QpTNFaSNYS2aHM0CcJDCAun_TQU06j_5Ai267LG8vArw8pRGVV1ZLCLjPzDBer799xhgQqvQHuBrNIS31xBcpPD8v0CWSjY20A3L3140nnMGsAi8~)
Maybe it took a Harvard PhD like Byron to explain what the Deep State does, but I suspect those tactics are just the tip of the icebeg of what these federal workers are planning to do during the Trump Administration . . . if they don't choose to resign.

President Trump gets it, and I suspect that's one of the reasons why 2 million government employees received a gracious offer for their resignation.

But we know that many of these federal workers will stay on board to obstruct, delay,, and undermine President Trump's policies over the next four years.

It's why OMG's work is so important. We're exposing these folks one at a time, **and our pace is picking up rapidly.**

**[Watch our latest release here, and please help fund our ongoing operations, which will expose the next Byron!](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/AfBPQMVj1vJa-JgcMlCLwg~~/AARclBA~/GL8fMf9xB91ZxYIpf4roTAEtCVeBfF9BqfRtj0U_TYZZZD1vmDFM1WnewtjkRktUu2SyQXZJYhzGf8U6GTTPmuXRhVizQxUTz99YH-WjcMYU80VDJkphRrCm4ujl-ADkgzHoKcsAUZSS5-g3xLxe9S2gKwenRvNuSUbfUWdVCV5MVwU-ynlozpBMp0-QpTNFaSNYS2aHM0CcJDCAun_TQU06j_5Ai267LG8vArw8pRGVV1ZLCLjPzDBer799xhgQqvQHuBrNIS31xBcpPD8v0CWSjY20A3L3140nnMGsAi8~)**

Thanks again for all you do, and, as always, stay tuned.

In Truth,

James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

name: John R. Milligan (MAGOP)
subject: Secretive, spending ways…
body:
Too far Left?
| | | | | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CmkSIXZtEra1-YAwW6CkZnj3dO51PrTttUsVeHd9NNa_BREWOj0wAaIyp-TTQ-_MT23njCu-WzqPCeFAQG1ECT73O7-Hc-vEzwrEFSS6QQgmI5QdSho3WW7SRIkGDeprYCEzHPRHx19p8HjNt6MR7g==&c=oDlscfVyJs5zkoLQDGvsgysQS3x6V_CZJGbtVl5NuV5fQWWOtJdjQQ==&ch=59YVKdNJTlQFHVpBxJR40_cHSF5hhvI2NgeF1Ca9V7xtufBMeE9Q1w==)
---
| Dear Peter,
January is all about reflecting on the wins of last year & laying a foundation of success for what's ahead. At least, that's how we're operating at the MassGOP...
Over on Beacon Hill, the go-along-to-get-along Democratic Supermajority seems to be stuck in their secretive, spending ways...
Just this month alone:
* The Healey-Driscoll Administration debuted their annual budget proposal - a stark 7.4% increase over the previous year, totalling a whopping $62,000,000,000 (yes - Billion!)
* The Healey Hotels full of migrants continue to be a breeding ground for violent crime and drugs, while costing taxpayers tens of thousands of dollars per day.
* Attorney General Andrea Campbell & Boston Mayor Michelle Wu couldn't let Gov. Healey steal the progressive spotlight. Campbell & Wu spent the month actively working against ICE in their efforts to keep Massachusetts residents safe.

There really couldn't be more proof that the Democratic Supermajority has gone too far in their progressive ideology.
I'm not afraid to say it - Beacon Hill no longer reflects the values of Massachusetts residents.
And the Democratic Supermajority can't spend their way out of every crisis. If November's wins proved anything, it's that resolution lies in the hands of the voters.
It's straightforward: if you seek legitimate solutions to the problems facing the Commonwealth, vote Republican in the next election.
---
| | [SUPPORT REPUBLICANS RUNNING FOR LOCAL OFFICE RIGHT NOW](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CmkSIXZtEra1-YAwW6CkZnj3dO51PrTttUsVeHd9NNa_BREWOj0wAZuuijVR-dF8Gu4QlNv7W3nuCOWSxT9SkTmFfhgkML_a-mTJ8EMBC8P5sUrUOYFowJ9grZZaP7lYlFmHZzJuyL5jAdYbdu2AV9w3toHAGcXuH0enJ4VCW79n4YquJecRTrHTT1MK7xor&c=oDlscfVyJs5zkoLQDGvsgysQS3x6V_CZJGbtVl5NuV5fQWWOtJdjQQ==&ch=59YVKdNJTlQFHVpBxJR40_cHSF5hhvI2NgeF1Ca9V7xtufBMeE9Q1w==)
---
Talk soon, John
John Milligan Executive Director, MassGOP
---

---

name: No Dem Left Behind PAC
subject: Tulsi Gabbard: Trump’s Dangerous Pick for Intelligence Chief
body:
| | | | | | [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w9fyf-ujgl91-kyd76rh6/)
---
# **Tulsi Gabbard: Trump’s Dangerous Pick for Intelligence Chief**
---
| [](https://click.nodemleftbehind.com/click/gpnv-2w9fyf-ujgl92-kyd76rh7/)
---
| | | | We need to start this email on a somber note, friend, Our hearts are broken by the tragic collision at Reagan National Airport last night. Our thoughts are with the victims, their families, and everyone affected by this devastating event. Meanwhile, as we process this heartbreaking news, we cannot ignore the growing threats to our national security. Tulsi Gabbard has spent years cozying up to dictators, echoing Kremlin propaganda, and attacking America’s intelligence agencies. Now, Donald Trump wants her in charge of them. If confirmed as Director of National Intelligence, Gabbard will dismantle America’s national security to serve Trump’s agenda of revenge and retribution. She has repeatedly parroted Putin’s talking points, blaming the U.S. and NATO for Russia’s invasion of Ukraine. Instead of holding war criminals accountable, she has excused the atrocities of Syrian dictator Bashar al-Assad, refusing to acknowledge his role in chemical attacks on civilians. Gabbard has spent her career railing against U.S. intelligence operations, calling them “domestic enemies” and pushing to weaken the very agencies tasked with keeping Americans safe. If confirmed as Director of National Intelligence, Gabbard will dismantle America’s national security to serve Trump’s agenda of revenge and retribution. Gabbard has spent her career railing against U.S. intelligence operations, calling them “domestic enemies” and pushing to weaken the very agencies tasked with keeping Americans safe. **But on Trump’s first day in office, he announced nearly 100 Executive Orders,** none of them addressing this key issue.

Instead of focusing on the needs of everyday Americans, he’s using the power of the presidency to attack political opponents, strip away Americans’ rights, and advance his personal agenda.

name: GIFFORDS PAC
subject: Today is Kash Patel’s Senate confirmation hearing
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We cannot allow Kash Patel to be appointed as FBI Director
#

Friends - In just a matter of minutes, Kash Patel will go before the Senate Judiciary Committee for his confirmation hearing.
If you need a reminder of why Patel is a dangerous choice to serve as the director of our nation’s top law enforcement agency, here’s what you should know:
* Patel has aligned himself with the far-right political movement **QAnon.**

* Patel wants to **shut down the FBI headquarters** and says he would make it a “museum of the deep state.”

* Patel **sympathizes with insurrectionists** who stormed our nation’s Capitol on January 6, 2021.

* Patel is **backed by the extreme pro-gun group Gun Owners for America,** and a top GOA executive said that under Patel’s leadership, a “reckoning is coming.”

**This should alarm us all.**
[**We are fighting back against Kash Patel’s nomination, but we can’t do that without you. So please, if you’re with us in the fight to stop a known conspiracy theorist and gun lobby pawn from serving as our nation’s FBI Director, we’re asking you to contribute $3 to GIFFORDS PAC today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-jan25.MP3Bzo&refcode=em250130-1-b&t=1&akid=9911%2E3935704%2ECPhXCZ)

## The Chinese Sputnik
This week, China shocked the West with its announcement of DeepSeek, an artificial intelligence network capable of competing with OpenAI, Meta, and Google. The fact that China was able to develop DeepSeek without a heavy supply of sophisticated microchips from Nvidia sent Nvidia stock spiraling, along with the other major tech companies in the United [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9bb5ce290ee841b9a59f323170a74d95&_e=-qBLRxw973nfdOp-wAFhkEcKoV32HB4d8_eFfa8rtdG4TbSWbv1a09cSQam01GA9sne_QRqtyssjomOmTzRLfgs_S16k0fex7iA9NWNz_8ObV3NbZdwDtDrDQ_vKDtYKj2dnXPVjtUUnTfgPehlHO19Do4yBXpALyz1gXEoyAUp5cM-ynjXYQ6ccN5JC39xmLmwn3n-SI77Zqhn1NNgymrO-u0p_r9haApqAGqltW4Y%3D)

## Here’s ‘Due Cause’ for Firing All Those Inspectors General
Democrats in Congress like Representatives Jamie Raskin, D-Md., and Maxine Waters, D-Calif., are criticizing President Donald Trump’s firing of 17 inspectors general, including in the departments of State, Transportation, Labor, Interior, Energy, and Commerce, claiming that doing so “without due cause is antithetical to good government.” There is a very strong argument to be made [...] [Read more](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=9bb5ce290ee841b9a59f323170a74d95&_e=-qBLRxw973nfdOp-wAFhkEcKoV32HB4d8_eFfa8rtdHW8urwxemB8uhI1fKnofmQVoDTXdd3iRXOaM9LYGtcMKlnubJdu1fCoTqjclYzrGARVceWdP6TIJGBgHMXQTNG2DuGdhKaDX1skqwSci6HVoIZUOkbpzf6Djh-8a5wVwjEU2eZcT6Rgr9PKkGG4QoWnBdv2CXxxW0NSivvHEJsbcA6h0yXnJUwN6Geb06t95BsP3xDgoYQT0D5RwW5oz4S20o_cnWrOwAUoH1SYUkYu83qGh1LSJEKb04h0fayfuc%3D)
---
| |
## Medical School Hosts Workshop to Help Trans Folx Stop Talking Wrong – RedState

name: Trump Knife Collection
subject: Elevate Your Collection with the Exclusive Trump Knife Set
body:
Own a Piece of American History – Trump Knife Collection Awaits!...
| | | Unsubscribe [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/8227c823ae6c05bc7559e091ec6638eb2326e33b/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18). We'll miss you - so will great opportunities.
To view this email as a webpage, click [here](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/07c4f76fc501380345ea6aebc9884a7acef35d26/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18?message_id=ImZjOTIxYTQwLWMxNzItMDEzZC0zOGUwLTBlMjNiNDA5Zjk0ZUBuYXRpb25hbGd1bm93bmVyLm9yZyI=).
---
| | [](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/dff08d69d3620cfa72dda01988d9e84ab1f3bf45/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)
---
---
|
---
| | Dear Reader, Introducing a unique opportunity to own a distinguished piece of American history. The **[Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/131571b221f7d399ee0035b104071772c452eb31/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)** is not just a collectible—it’s a legacy of patriotism, precision, and exquisite craftsmanship. Reserved for those who appreciate the finer things in life, this set is the ultimate tribute to the 45th President of the United States.
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/dff08d69d3620cfa72dda01988d9e84ab1f3bf45/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)
---
**Why the Trump Knife Collection Stands Apart:****8 Distinctive Knives, Each Telling a Story** This collection is thoughtfully[ designed to commemorate pivotal moments from Trump’s presidency](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/131571b221f7d399ee0035b104071772c452eb31/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18). Each month, a new knife arrives at your door, featuring a full-color image of President Trump paired with one of his defining messages—from “Keep America Great” to “Save America Again.” Each piece is more than a knife; it’s a statement of American pride.
* **Premium Pakkawood Handles** : Hand-polished with a rich cherry stain, each knife handle is crafted to reflect both strength and elegance, offering a balanced, luxurious feel in your hand.
* **Razor-Sharp Stainless Steel Blades** : Each blade is forged with precision, ensuring durability and a sharp edge, reflecting the steadfast spirit of American craftsmanship.
* **American Craftsmanship** : Designed and forged in the USA, each knife is a testament to American quality, pride, and tradition.

---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/dff08d69d3620cfa72dda01988d9e84ab1f3bf45/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)
---
**A Showcase of Elegance: The LED Display Case** The collection comes complete with a **[custom-designed wooden display case](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/131571b221f7d399ee0035b104071772c452eb31/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)** , made from premium cherry wood and featuring a shining gold strip with a hinged glass cover. The addition of **eight built-in LED lights** enhances the beauty of each knife, casting a soft glow that captures the essence of this elegant tribute.
* **Protective and Elegant** : The hinged cover provides easy access to your knives while ensuring they remain protected from dust and wear.
* **Showcase Presidential Pride** : The display case is adorned with a raised golden medallion, inspired by the American presidential seal, making it a stunning centerpiece for any home or office.

---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/dff08d69d3620cfa72dda01988d9e84ab1f3bf45/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)
---
**An Heirloom for Generations** This collection is more than a tribute to Trump’s presidency—it’s an heirloom piece that captures a moment in history with elegance and pride. Each knife's patriotic theme is carefully chosen to resonate with the values that define America: freedom, strength, and resilience. Displayed together, they create a narrative that will be admired for generations. **What Our Collectors Are Saying:**
* **“The detail and craftsmanship are unparalleled. Each knife is a conversation starter, and the display case elevates them to a true work of art.” – Lisa M., Verified Buyer**
* **“I’ve never seen anything like it. Each delivery brings a new piece of history to my collection, and the quality is outstanding.” – Tom L., Verified Buyer**

**Secure Your Place Among History’s Collectors** The **Limited Edition Trump Knife Collection** is available for a short time. With each knife delivered monthly, anticipation builds until your set is complete. This isn’t just about owning knives; it’s about curating a piece of history. **[CLICK HERE TO CHECK AVAILABILITY AND ORDER YOUR SET](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/131571b221f7d399ee0035b104071772c452eb31/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)** Sincerely,
TrumpKnifeSet.com P.S. Each knife is delivered in a custom box, making it an exquisite gift for those who hold America's values close to their hearts.
---
|
---
[](https://links.nationalgunowner.org/a/1537/click/20093/6374453/dff08d69d3620cfa72dda01988d9e84ab1f3bf45/e48b04a8f3c27b088b1ebd57e5e649e9702eaa18)
---

name: Gay Valimont
subject: GUANTANAMO BAY????
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
_**President Donald Trump plans to detain tens of thousands of immigrants at Guantánamo Bay via executive order.**_ This is Gay Valimont, running for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, and I am committed to advocating for compassionate and just immigration policies. Detaining immigrants in a facility known for human rights abuses is a stark departure from our nation's values of dignity and respect for all individuals. _**I need your help to ensure Trump does not use the Cuban island as a migrant camp.**_
---
---
_**These orders are inhumane.**_ A facility infamously used for torture is not a suitable location to host migrant families, likely separated from the family they had in the United States. We believe in comprehensive immigration reform that upholds human rights and reflects the principles upon which our country was founded, not in dumping these individuals seeking a better life onto a territory meant to be a prison.
---
**[To continue this fight, we need your support. Donating $8 will help us challenge these unjust policies and work towards a more humane immigration system. name: Jeremiah Regan
subject: You can learn from Rome’s history
body:
Their rise and fall

_**A message from our sponsor...**_ Their rise and fall | | | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1d273339b86644e0a1337082dbaecc6f&_e=_9WhVA1Xmc36aOJNw5UCtC5i-fWm3iP1esiwg9Fr8alBteJepqJJoKU_njFoe6KG-KA9i03CM55dbnv2z29JCs7R4PK396aJ6_0Ew7QpXmg4v4Xy7FDNmCIX0EFgSi6Tpxcjsh-5Sl4laNVs_xI_o_m7_FnU6v24Br5NTgcumo3OCIhKqI8sjCqWv_Ar75BP-t8zWwx9vE2rvXq0SBUjFzGPsHzzpDjtuzb9lTR7MfXPXYOyHVceFrocSMm2RWILSvdF0nkmM3riaejsRlt7NQTaIzMngdShofGmxWoEy69xt_QTd-CPaiDel2LEs-PcnF9sLM0PbH-4gfnXw36_W_xX77M9o6P7nJVs9tcymYim_UfIlqNjtVBgkPyG9w_KzC-XbQF_Y_gl4Spa_ja52A%3D%3D)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, We generally remember ancient Rome for its sprawling empire and powerful emperors. But overlooked by our fascination with the might and drama of imperial Rome is the fact that Rome reached its greatness through a far different form of government. Did you know that Caesar Augustus inherited 90% of the territory of his Empire from the Roman Republic? The story of how the Roman Republic emerged from a group of warring tribes in the middle of the Italian peninsula to dominate the Mediterranean and, later, most of Europe is a captivating narrative of achievement, political and military genius, and the perils of success.
---
| | To help tell this important story to Americans nationwide, we recently released our free online course, **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic.”** **[You can now receive your own DVD box set of “The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1d273339b86644e0a1337082dbaecc6f&_e=_9WhVA1Xmc36aOJNw5UCtC5i-fWm3iP1esiwg9Fr8alBteJepqJJoKU_njFoe6KG-KA9i03CM55dbnv2z29JCs7R4PK396aJ6_0Ew7QpXmg4v4Xy7FDNmCIX0EFgSi6Tpxcjsh-5Sl4laNVs_xI_o_m7_FnU6v24Br5NTgcumo3OCIhKqI8sjCqWv_Ar75BP-t8zWwx9vE2rvXq0SBUjFzGPsHzzpDjtuzb9lTR7MfXPXYOyHVceFrocSMm2RWILiq4EUb-Kt7LjeSRAyg4d_eq6tl_GrUg8M8VXRefmRQeQ9CGvdyW0IcnDpWhIp-Urpo00Lb272GdibMARv3T2BCDT8QOSOnFZ0wgYyeYWqpbX9CdXw0mjbvI9Oci_G5_zz6sODq1FXkuP4GZ205jj2w%3D%3D) when you make a tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. **
---
| [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1d273339b86644e0a1337082dbaecc6f&_e=_9WhVA1Xmc36aOJNw5UCtC5i-fWm3iP1esiwg9Fr8alBteJepqJJoKU_njFoe6KG-KA9i03CM55dbnv2z29JCs7R4PK396aJ6_0Ew7QpXmg4v4Xy7FDNmCIX0EFgSi6Tpxcjsh-5Sl4laNVs_xI_o_m7_FnU6v24Br5NTgcumo3OCIhKqI8sjCqWv_Ar75BP-t8zWwx9vE2rvXq0SBUjFzGPsHzzpDjtuzb9lTR7MfXPXYOyHVceFrocSMm2RWILomhbqQjhoLVl0WeRIjQ-DbAuK2iwkNqNUil6ANS2VQrMDEViI9mx2UBxJdX2RB6m5N929CFB_rJHPayu3OYpgVtZIROLpKOjFQCTw3g0EnHrgfJt7MYfRCVoPNsrsCw419Wx1toNWYkdHHfC5iN1JA%3D%3D)
---
| | And, for a limited time, we’ll also send you a free color map of the Roman world at the end of the Republic printed on high-quality paper. This map is a helpful companion to the course DVD and will illustrate many of the topics discussed in the lectures. Simply use this secure link to reserve your DVD box set of **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic,”** along with the companion map today: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/roman-republic-dvd](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1d273339b86644e0a1337082dbaecc6f&_e=_9WhVA1Xmc36aOJNw5UCtC5i-fWm3iP1esiwg9Fr8alBteJepqJJoKU_njFoe6KG-KA9i03CM55dbnv2z29JCs7R4PK396aJ6_0Ew7QpXmg4v4Xy7FDNmCIX0EFgSi6Tpxcjsh-5Sl4laNVs_xI_o_m7_FnU6v24Br5NTgcumo3OCIhKqI8sjCqWv_Ar75BP-t8zWwx9vE2rvXq0SBUjFzGPsHzzpDjtuzb9lTR7MfXPXYOyHVceFrocSMm2RWIL6viObefpTrHO9-niPRKW-TIARm_8cc4ZmHnUIxsPGaOeiKVq2RbiyRmMpOIUH28d-pl14sUJKtDm3QshDPOznn3p0UerSjLOv_25j75cXsh-eurVSrbN4wgrbTOW3ErYfwF7wEWH-ay-2fPKgcMHag%3D%3D)** Learning the fascinating history of Rome reveals the conditions necessary to preserve a republic...and how a republic may lose its way. That’s why we produced **“The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic”** and why I hope you’ll watch and share the course on DVD. Before I go, thank you for helping to preserve liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College [Unsubscribe](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_s=1d273339b86644e0a1337082dbaecc6f&_t=28BQuGh9VpMez81d-P7kNid9f4JvnvJJunLwolEpy9aOPfyb_EgfgXtmi7rlKf5q3q-JDEOklbrGnQp7XOmFnbsk9f7bMeQRZRkpnrWlXkHFvBo-hCMR6qEqERFgaaQv)

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2133d7b3-703c-41ff-80bb-4d4d2b4d0765?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
President Donald Trump **[stated on Thursday](https://substack.com/redirect/4806c434-6ed4-4d8e-8c02-6accc5112c43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that the midair collision between an American Airlines jet and an Army helicopter over the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport "looks like it should have been prevented."
The incident occurred late Wednesday when American Airlines Flight 5342, en route from Wichita, Kansas, collided with a U.S. Army Black Hawk helicopter, leading to a crash into the river. The accident involved 64 passengers and crew on the jet, and three soldiers on the helicopter.
Trump raised questions about the response, asking why the helicopter did not maneuver or why air traffic control did not provide more direct instructions to avoid the collision.
"The airplane was on a perfect and routine line of approach to the airport. The helicopter was going straight at the airplane for an extended period of time. It is a CLEAR NIGHT, the lights on the plane were blazing, why didn't the helicopter go up or down, or turn. Why didn't the control tower tell the helicopter what to do instead of asking if they saw the plane. This is a bad situation that looks like it should have been prevented. NOT GOOD!!!" **[he wrote on Truth Social.](https://substack.com/redirect/9c0b07b3-05e8-47d7-88af-11ce7907297e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9c0b07b3-05e8-47d7-88af-11ce7907297e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The crash has resulted in a significant response from emergency services, with rescue operations turning into recovery efforts. No survivors have been reported, and the search continues for all victims. The National Transportation Safety Board has initiated an investigation into the crash's cause.

# D.C. Fire Chief gives heartbreaking update to Potomac River plane crash
_"We don't think there are any survivors from this accident,..."_
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cc4868b3-e2ce-4725-8269-466ba94aa5c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Chief John Donnelly of the District of Columbia Fire Department announced Thursday that no survivors are expected from the catastrophic midair collision between an American Eagle Flight 5342 and an Army Black Hawk helicopter over the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport.
"We don't think there are any survivors from this accident," Donnelly stated during a press conference. He confirmed that 27 bodies had been recovered from the plane and one from the helicopter.
"Despite all these efforts, we are now at a point where we are switching from a rescue operation to a recovery operation," he added.
Donnelly further noted that the district office of the medical examiner is tasked with the responsibility of reuniting the recovered bodies with their families.
The tragic plane crash occurred Wednesday night involving a regional jet from Wichita, Kansas, carrying 60 passengers and four crew members, and a military helicopter with three soldiers on board. The incident has led to a significant emergency response and has grounded all flights at Reagan National Airport until further notice.
Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy said in a statement Thursday that "We are going to wait for all the information to come in from this vantage point."
"But to back up what the president said and what I've seen so far, do I think this was preventable? Absolutely," he added.
American Airlines CEO Robert Isom said Thursday that the collision involving one of his airlines' passenger jets was "devastating."
"We're absolutely heartbroken for the family and loved ones of the passengers and crew members, and also for those that were on the military aircraft," Isom said. "Our focus right now is doing everything that we can to support all of those involved, and also the PSA Airlines team. This is devastating. It's, we are all hurting incredibly."
"Here's what I can share at this early stage. American Air American Eagle Flight 5342, operated by PSA Airlines, traveling from Wichita, Kansas to Reagan National Airport, was involved in an accident just before 9 p.m. local time," Isom also said. "On final approach into Reagan National, it collided with a military aircraft on an otherwise normal approach. At this time, we don't know why the military aircraft came into the path of the PSA aircraft."

clean_body: "It should have been prevented..." | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? "It should have been prevented..." Jan 30 | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- President Donald Trump that the midair collision between an American Airlines jet and an Army helicopter over the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport "looks like it should have been prevented." The incident occurred late Wednesday when American Airlines Flight 5342, en route from Wichita, Kansas, collided with a U.S. Army Black Hawk helicopter, leading to a crash into the river. The accident involved 64 passengers and crew on the jet, and three soldiers on the helicopter. Trump raised questions about the response, asking why the helicopter did not maneuver or why air traffic control did not provide more direct instructions to avoid the collision. "The airplane was on a perfect and routine line of approach to the airport. The helicopter was going straight at the airplane for an extended period of time. It is a CLEAR NIGHT, the lights on the plane were blazing, why didn't the helicopter go up or down, or turn. Why didn't the control tower tell the helicopter what to do instead of asking if they saw the plane. This is a bad situation that looks like it should have been prevented. NOT GOOD!!!" | | ---|---|--- The crash has resulted in a significant response from emergency services, with rescue operations turning into recovery efforts. No survivors have been reported, and the search continues for all victims. The National Transportation Safety Board has initiated an investigation into the crash's cause. Featured Video: RFK Jr REFUSES to take Bernie's crap, fires right back at him! Watch RFK Jr. during yesterdays fiery confirmation hearings. " I had nothing to do with that!!" RFK snapped at Sanders. BREAKING: For the first time in American history, U.S. interest payments now exceed our entire defense budget. | | ---|---|--- The numbers are staggering: $36 trillion in national debt Every 1% rate increase = $90 billion in new costs Gold surging past $2,750 as central banks buy at fastest pace in history Over 1,082 metric tons of gold purchased by central banks in 2022 alone As Trump prepares to retake office, a showdown with the Fed could determine the fate of your retirement savings. Smart money isn't waiting - central banks are racing to accumulate gold before 2025. The Coming Battle for America's Financial Future" to learn: ✓ Why central banks are stockpiling gold at record rates ✓ How gold rose from $35 to $850 during the last debt crisis ✓ Why experts predict gold could hit $9,000 as this crisis unfolds ✓ How to protect your savings before it's too late D.C. Fire Chief gives heartbreaking update to Potomac River plane crash "We don't think there are any survivors from this accident,..." | | ---|---|--- Chief John Donnelly of the District of Columbia Fire Department announced Thursday that no survivors are expected from the catastrophic midair collision between an American Eagle Flight 5342 and an Army Black Hawk helicopter over the Potomac River near Reagan National Airport. "We don't think there are any survivors from this accident," Donnelly stated during a press conference. He confirmed that 27 bodies had been recovered from the plane and one from the helicopter. "Despite all these efforts, we are now at a point where we are switching from a rescue operation to a recovery operation," he added. Donnelly further noted that the district office of the medical examiner is tasked with the responsibility of reuniting the recovered bodies with their families. The tragic plane crash occurred Wednesday night involving a regional jet from Wichita, Kansas, carrying 60 passengers and four crew members, and a military helicopter with three soldiers on board. The incident has led to a significant emergency response and has grounded all flights at Reagan National Airport until further notice. Secretary of Transportation Sean Duffy said in a statement Thursday that "We are going to wait for all the information to come in from this vantage point." "But to back up what the president said and what I've seen so far, do I think this was preventable? Absolutely," he added. American Airlines CEO Robert Isom said Thursday that the collision involving one of his airlines' passenger jets was "devastating." "We're absolutely heartbroken for the family and loved ones of the passengers and crew members, and also for those that were on the military aircraft," Isom said. "Our focus right now is doing everything that we can to support all of those involved, and also the PSA Airlines team. This is devastating. It's, we are all hurting incredibly." "Here's what I can share at this early stage. American Air American Eagle Flight 5342, operated by PSA Airlines, traveling from Wichita, Kansas to Reagan National Airport, was involved in an accident just before 9 p.m. local time," Isom also said. "On final approach into Reagan National, it collided with a military aircraft on an otherwise normal approach. At this time, we don't know why the military aircraft came into the path of the PSA aircraft." | | POLL Has the Potomac River plane collision shaken your confidence in plane travel? | ? ? ? name: Elizabeth Nader
subject: you have a group? We have a plan.
body:
Peter, Common sense voter engagement is CRITICAL for 2025 if we are to save New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy. There are two
|
---
| Peter, Common sense voter engagement is CRITICAL for 2025 if we are to save New Jersey from Left Wing Lunacy. There are two things that absolutely must change. **#1: We need as many common sense voters as possible to vote by mail**. It’s time to beat the Left at their own game – and we can’t afford to take the risk of ALL of us voting on Election Day only to be the victim of shenanigans, malfunctions, long lines – or life happening in any number of ways. **#2: We need common sense voters to VOTE in the primary.** On average, only 22% of common sense New Jersey voters engage in our primaries, leaving the critical decision of who will be on our November ballot in the hands of the elite. Not okay. If you have a club, committee, or are a candidate for office and you want to work on getting out the vote for 2025, our [**One Less Lemon**](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/73081bc0174812dc70c299dd5cf383ab/eJyNj00LgkAURf_LW0vm18adiMSguYhax6APGhpnhvEZmfjfGytqU9D23XPP405AqLgi1kIKV7qFYQQeWGyEEago14p480jDJA6iwAMp1Hlj9WAgnb6W38ByjpJ17AGNBh2y32V5yerNsWJ16UjDrfvxnycOP55im7EK5vmnGDtBxcW5e0jJDrgsaoVbRQcrHX8iMqnva4US-15ip9Wq0Z1rcmNQta_ZJY7P_nwHZelgIA==) project can provide you with an effective get-out-the-vote (GOTV) plan.
---
| | [I’m interested in a GOTV plan](mailto:INFO@ONELESSLEMON.COM)
---
| Want to take individual action? Here’s what you can do.
* Apply to vote by mail → START [here.](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/e0881b591d242a9dd3cf369a51848836/eJyNkMsOgjAQRf9l1kgV0AU7Y4ghqAuja1NlotXSNu0IouHfrY-40sTtzLlncucGhIoryktI4ULXKIohAIs7YQQqmmhFfPfcRsNkEA8CkEKdplafDaS3r-EP8BjHw_4oAGoNemS1HE-KfDHdzPJF4UnDrb_xnyeJko8nm4_zGXTdTzFWgrLaux2kZM_4aFQK34rWVnr-QGRcyljTNKE6hntdM0eckKH0jNDKsVoT9rZtr-JChu5AlfRebgyq8v2UAtuXvbsDWtlrWQ==)
* Commit to vote in the primary AND general → PLEDGE [here.](https://xtz223.keap-link019.com/v2/click/1340fe745e28b804b67056ea60628b58/eJyNkE0LgkAQhv_LnEXzC8KbSIhoHqLOITrQ0rq7rGNm4n9vrfBU0HXmeZ_hnQkIRSUoayCCOz08zwcLNNZMMRSUSEFV_dp6YeD6rgWciWuqZa8gmr6GV2AZ--FmawGNCg1yPMRJnpXpucjK3JCq0ubGf57AC1bPbh9nBczzTzG2jHY34-4gIt3j0qhhphWdNDf8hUh1keMMw2BLgRy7jmMrhV3L1jF9HeOolELRfB6Q4_g2zU8_3mPA)

We’re seeing what happens after just 10 days of common sense in Washington D.C. Crackdowns on illegal immigration, woke ideology out of the military, back to drilling... But in Trenton, chaos still reigns. Taxpayer funding is going to gender transitions. Gas tax is up. Gas car production will be banned in 10 years. We lead the country for outbound migrations. Our taxes are among the highest in the nation. Enough. We will make our voices heard in June and November! For New Jersey, Elizabeth Nader
---
|
---
| President
Common Sense Club

clean_body: | | | | | Peter, I’m humbled to be the Republican Nominee in Florida’s 1st Congressional District. Matt Gaetz was a firebrand for the MAGA movement, and I plan to pick up where he left off. But right now, we have a MAJOR problem... We drained our campaign accounts during the primary, and now, I face a Pelosi-backed Democrat who didn’t have to spend a dime. This election could all come down to which candidate has the money to spread their message and get voters to the polls. **************************************************************************************************************************** Thank you, Jimmy Patronis | | PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF JIMMY PATRONIS, INC. | |

subject: Kennedy's comments furthered "antisemitic stereotypes going back to the Middle Ages”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pennsylvania Democratic Party
body:
| |
---
Peter,

After refusing to condemn Elon Musk for unmistakable Nazi salutes on Inauguration Day, the Trump administration doubled down on hate by sending Robert Kennedy Jr., an unqualified bigot, to the Senate for a confirmation hearing that could lead to him becoming the Secretary of Health and Human Services.

There are many reasons that Mr. Kennedy is unfit for such an important role. Still, as a Jew, I feel an obligation to sound the alarm about his sickening COVID conspiracy theory that the virus was "ethnically targeted" and claiming that the "people who are most immune are Ashkenazi Jews and Chinese."

The former head of the Anti-Defamation League, Abraham Foxman, accurately stated that Kennedy's comments furthered "antisemitic stereotypes going back to the Middle Ages that claimed Jews protected themselves from diseases."

This antisemitic trope isn't just factually inaccurate; it echoes the same sort of fascist ideology that has led to millions of deaths. When considered in the context of Nazi salutes, expansionist rhetoric about taking over foreign nations that echoed Nazi strategy, and a torrent of dehumanizing speech about immigrants, the elevation of Mr. Kennedy is yet another blinking warning sign for America.

As a Jew, I refuse to stand by and play politics as usual as Nazi rhetoric and ideology expand in American life.

[**That's why I'm urging you to take action by chipping in here to fight back against Elon Musk and other fascist sympathizers using their money to buy wins in the critical upcoming Pennsylvania Supreme Court election.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101235070/525337267/2127759877?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250130_FR_RFKJr_0_3MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2I2MjhiYy0xZmRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zN9BEwgE3uqVjsyng7wwD6KaaYEXZYVclxKUj-bIApI=) | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101235071/525337268/2127759877?amount=10&express_lane=true&source=EM_NBI_PADM_20250130_FR_RFKJr_0_3MO_MitchKates_NA_NA_NA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ3MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmM2I2MjhiYy0xZmRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=zN9BEwgE3uqVjsyng7wwD6KaaYEXZYVclxKUj-bIApI=)

Never Forget,

Mitch Kates
Executive Director, Pennsylvania Democratic Party

------------------------------------------------------------

Â
** "The Biggest Crash in History Is ComingâWill Your Savings Survive?"
------------------------------------------------------------
------------------------------------------------------------

Warren Buffett: "Be Ready For Any Stock You Buy to Plunge 50%
or More and Be OK With it."
------------------------------------------------------------

Â

My Fellow American,

Urgent warnings from financial experts like Robert Kiyosaki, Warren Buffett, and Harry Dent point to an imminent stock market crash that could devastate retirees.

Robert Kiyosaki, author ofÂ Rich Dad, Poor Dad, predicts theÂ âbiggest crash in historyâ is near, and Baby Boomers will be hit the hardest.

While theyâve historically been the wealthiest generation, their heavy reliance on stocks, bonds, and traditional portfolios leaves them dangerously exposed.

Kiyosaki advises selling these assets while prices remain high and investing in gold, silver, and Bitcoin (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueb4hIteknop5I1ITm6jspe7j&s=EMILDDKJAPAAINLD&req=l%3DD0I2xueb4bIteknop5I1ITm6jspe7j%26s%3DPMICADIEANKDHHFG âassets proven to withstand economic turmoil.

Warren Buffett shares a chilling reminder that shareholders should be prepared for âany stock you buy to plunge 50% or more.â

This kind of volatility could shatter retirement plans, forcing retirees to delay retirement, slash spending, or deplete their savings.

According to economist Harry Dent, a âhuge stock market crash is likely within 10 months.â

Michael Burry, famed for predicting the 2008 crash, has also bet billions against the market, signaling his expectation of a massive downturn.

For retirees, the stakes couldnât be higher.

A Market Crash could wipe out half or more of their savings (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueb4hIteknop5I2ITm6jspe7j&s=EMILDDKJAPAAINLD&req=l%3DD0I2xueb4bIteknop5I2ITm6jspe7j%26s%3DPMICADIEANKDHHFG , leaving them unprepared for rising healthcare costs, inflation, and potential economic instability.

Many may find themselves dependent on family or government aid, a situation no one envisions for their golden years.

Why Gold Is the Solution

Gold has long been a reliable hedge against inflation and market crashes. Unlike stocks, itâs immune to central bank manipulation and retains value during crises.

Gold prices have already surged to $2,700 per ounce in 2024, and Kiyosaki predicts they could exceed $3,700 soon.

Acting now allows retirees to protect their wealth before prices rise further.

Why Choose Monetary Gold

With over 100 years of expertise, Monetary Gold offers retirees a trusted way to safeguard their savings.

Their Complimentary Protection Guide (https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xueb4hIteknop5I3ITm6jspe7j&s=EMILDDKJAPAAINLD&req=l%3DD0I2xueb4bIteknop5I3ITm6jspe7j%26s%3DPMICADIEANKDHHFG explains how to move assets into gold IRAs and shield wealth from market volatility. Time is running out.

Donât wait until your savings are gone. Call (888) 411-GOLD(4653) (tel:888-411-4653) today to secure your guide and take control of your financial future.

Make no mistake about it. A storm is comingâact now to protect what youâve worked a lifetime to build.

name: Tom Fitton
subject: Never More Important!
body:
The work of Judicial Watch has never been more important than it is today...and your support of our work has never been more important either!

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

**The work of Judicial Watch has never been more important than it is today...and that is why I am respectfully asking you to support our work today.**
| [Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

There's a "new sheriff in town" here in Washington... _but the Left hasn 't gotten message_!

That's why last week Judicial Watch sued Chicago Mayor Brandon Johnson for records regarding _his vow to resist_ the Trump administration's mass deportation and other immigration law enforcement activities.

We will not let Chicago's mayor and its city government be outlaws on illegal immigration as they plan to _continue to help illegal aliens resist the rule of law_ (in December, Fox News reported that since August 2022 Chicago has spent $**574.5 million** on sheltering migrants), nor will we let them cover-up their actions!

Turning the tide against illegal immigration cannot be fixed with executive actions _alone_ ...it is also going to take aggressive actions in the legal system and the courts to expose and prosecute liberal cities and states that are attempting to derail Trump's immigration policies.

**[That's _one reason_ why your support of Judicial Watch today is so important!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)**

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Here's another...

We are in the legal trenches fighting liberal cities who are using taxpayer money to fund the woke racism and transgender agenda...

...and we scored a **HUGE** win when the **San Francisco City and****County Board of Supervisors** voted two weeks ago to settle the taxpayer lawsuit we filed challenging their discriminatory "guaranteed-income" program _funded by taxpayer money_ in favor of transgender individuals with a "preference for biological Black and Latino men who identify as women."

The Board agreed that they will _not_ continue this program and, very importantly, _also agreed that they will not create a new_ _guaranteed-income with the same discriminatory criteria_!

No one is fighting harder than Judicial Watch to uphold the concept of "_equal protection under the laws_ " that is enshrined in both the U.S. and California Constitutions, and we are fighting in courtrooms across the country...

...like in **San Francisco** and **Evanston, Illinois** (where we are challenging a race-based "reparations" scheme).

_These legal challenges are how we turn the tide against the woke Left_. They require a ton of research and investigations...and they are expensive!

[Which is one _more_ reason why your financial support today is so important!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Of course, we also keep fighting the Left over their non-stop efforts to steal our elections, as we ramp up our work exposing states and cities that are attempting to corrupt honest elections by permitting _non-citizen voting_.

Our caseload is enormous, and I fully anticipate it growing even larger as we launch more FOIA requests and lawsuits to expose new **Deep State** efforts to _sabotage_ Trump administration efforts to clean up the federal government and create real transparency in our government.

So, you see that our work really never has been more important...and that is why your decision to join with us today is so important.

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Your support now will help us work every day to uphold the constitutional rule of law and the American people’s right to know.

I deeply hope you will join the Judicial Watch team today!

And I thank you in advance for deciding to help us advance our work and our mission.

Thomas Fitton
President

[Contribute](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=72137&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Greg Abbott orders state agencies to cooperate with Trump's deportation efforts,** " Texas Tribune's **Pavan Achraya** -- "In a series of [executive orders](https://substack.com/redirect/5e9e8e85-6343-44fb-8978-17e4e645f808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Wednesday, Gov. **Greg Abbott** ordered state agencies to cooperate with President **Donald Trump 's **mass deportation efforts and directed the state's criminal justice agency to [identify land and facilities](https://substack.com/redirect/4624c5dc-a328-4092-9509-09b0afaaab7e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that could be used for detaining and deporting undocumented migrants.

The move comes just days after federal agents launched [immigration operations](https://substack.com/redirect/31cc52b8-14ce-4ed0-b1e4-a1a31fb91ca4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Sunday in Texas cities including Austin, Dallas-Fort Worth and San Antonio. Since Trump returned to office earlier this month, Abbott has pledged to cooperate with the new president's efforts to curb illegal border crossings and remove undocumented immigrants from the country.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/a6757531-c13a-4b7d-aa98-ad2e7296b33d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott said he ordered state agencies to work with the Trump administration to "investigate, arrest, detain, and deport illegal immigrants in Texas." The orders also direct state agencies to assist federal agents in securing the U.S.-Mexico border, share intelligence information on drug cartels with federal law enforcement and work with the federal government to "deploy any physical infrastructure to improve operational security at the southern border."

"For the past four years, Texas has worked around-the-clock to defend our southern border while former President **Joe Biden** refused to protect our country from an invasion he allowed," Abbott said in a Wednesday release. "Now, we have a Commander-in-Chief in the White House who will do what is necessary to protect Americans."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/a6757531-c13a-4b7d-aa98-ad2e7296b33d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Throughout his presidential campaign, Trump promised to launch the ["largest deportation program"](https://substack.com/redirect/de0f791f-8ef9-4343-84a3-082e9291717a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in U.S. history by using the military and working with local law enforcement agencies. Trump sent some troops to the border shortly after taking office and Abbott [deployed more than](https://substack.com/redirect/1938f9dc-c7ed-4740-938e-6f87801e6789?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 400 Texas National Guard troops to the border Monday.

Abbott launched a border security initiative dubbed [Operation Lone Star](https://substack.com/redirect/46f3c165-9356-4f7c-923e-70b3da94cdf5?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2021 shortly after Biden took office and sent state troopers and National Guard members to the border to address a rise in border crossings he blamed on the Biden administration. Texas has [spent more than $11 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/5a58c995-7b13-4093-8ba7-5c95d2db427d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the effort so far; last week Abbott asked for [a full reimbursement](https://substack.com/redirect/1ad3a13d-a7eb-4b65-9688-d5f0631399f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the federal government." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/df648265-efc3-42e9-a7e4-b4ce5787ed5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS "Greg Abbott orders state agencies to cooperate with Trump's deportation efforts, " Texas Tribune's Pavan Achraya -- "In a series of Wednesday, Gov. Greg Abbott ordered state agencies to cooperate with President Donald Trump 's mass deportation efforts and directed the state's criminal justice agency to that could be used for detaining and deporting undocumented migrants. The move comes just days after federal agents launched on Sunday in Texas cities including Austin, Dallas-Fort Worth and San Antonio. Since Trump returned to office earlier this month, Abbott has pledged to cooperate with the new president's efforts to curb illegal border crossings and remove undocumented immigrants from the country. Abbott said he ordered state agencies to work with the Trump administration to "investigate, arrest, detain, and deport illegal immigrants in Texas." The orders also direct state agencies to assist federal agents in securing the U.S.-Mexico border, share intelligence information on drug cartels with federal law enforcement and work with the federal government to "deploy any physical infrastructure to improve operational security at the southern border." "For the past four years, Texas has worked around-the-clock to defend our southern border while former President Joe Biden refused to protect our country from an invasion he allowed," Abbott said in a Wednesday release. "Now, we have a Commander-in-Chief in the White House who will do what is necessary to protect Americans." Throughout his presidential campaign, Trump promised to launch the in U.S. history by using the military and working with local law enforcement agencies. Trump sent some troops to the border shortly after taking office and Abbott 400 Texas National Guard troops to the border Monday. Abbott launched a border security initiative dubbed in 2021 shortly after Biden took office and sent state troopers and National Guard members to the border to address a rise in border crossings he blamed on the Biden administration. Texas has on the effort so far; last week Abbott asked for from the federal government." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Brad Finstad
subject: We can’t show any weakness
body:
| | | | [](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_OMBGIy40Agg7tEr53Q9fCAwFQ0Ws40DKcDZzroapb7Gfp1onuBvy5RqtN0)
---

The Democrats’ House Majority PAC has made me one of their top targets for 2026. With their sights set on flipping the House majority, they’ll exploit every weakness they can find.
That’s why it’s critical we **hit** every fundraising goal, starting with this first January deadline on Friday. Missing this first target would give them the opportunity they’re looking for to flood this race with their war chest of special interest money.
I’ve fought hard to represent southern Minnesota’s values in Washington, and I won’t back down. But staying ahead of their attacks starts with building a strong foundation right now. **[So please, make a contribution to help me defend this seat and send a message to House Majority PAC and their allies that we’re prepared to fight back.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_OMBGIy40Agg7tEr53Q9fCAwFQ0Ws40DKcDZzroapb7Gfp1onuBvy5RqtN0)******

---
The Democrats will use every resource at their disposal to try to unseat me and take control of the House majority.
Their playbook is clear: unleash their special interest donors, bombard key districts with attacks, and buy their way to victory. If we fall behind now, it will only embolden them to come after us harder.
We’ve seen what they can do when they’re fully funded. Let’s show them that southern Minnesota is ready to fight back.
By hitting this deadline fundraising goal on Friday, we can prove that we’re strong, united, and determined to protect our values. **[So please, make a contribution to help me defend this seat and send a message to House Majority PAC and their allies that we’re prepared to fight back.](https://r2.ddlnk.net/c/AQj9jBYQ_OMBGIy40Agg7tEr53Q9fCAwFQ0Ws40DKcDZzroapb7Gfp1onuBvy5RqtN0)**

clean_body: | | | | The Democrats’ House Majority PAC has made me one of their top targets for 2026. With their sights set on flipping the House majority, they’ll exploit every weakness they can find. That’s why it’s critical we hit every fundraising goal, starting with this first January deadline on Friday. Missing this first target would give them the opportunity they’re looking for to flood this race with their war chest of special interest money. I’ve fought hard to represent southern Minnesota’s values in Washington, and I won’t back down. But staying ahead of their attacks starts with building a strong foundation right now. ** | | | | | The Democrats will use every resource at their disposal to try to unseat me and take control of the House majority. Their playbook is clear: unleash their special interest donors, bombard key districts with attacks, and buy their way to victory. If we fall behind now, it will only embolden them to come after us harder. We’ve seen what they can do when they’re fully funded. Let’s show them that southern Minnesota is ready to fight back. By hitting this deadline fundraising goal on Friday, we can prove that we’re strong, united, and determined to protect our values. ** | Thank you, Brad FinstadMinnesota's 1st Congressional District | | | | | | | PO Box 923, New Ulm, MN 56073

# [Project 2025 Is Here -- How to Fight Back Starting Local](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=155970368&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1OTcwMzY4LCJpYXQiOjE3MzgyNTMxNzMsImV4cCI6MTc0MDg0NTE3MywiaXNzIjoicHViLTI1NTAyMjMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.wr15e-2quhOnS-s8Eu04cN6HohVK_CiUomwl494HsFc)
### A recap of Project 2025, how to counter its fascist policies, and a message of hope in these difficult times
| | [Qasim Rashid, Esq.](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---
| Jan 30
---
| [](https://substack.com/@qasimrashid)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2550223&post_id=155970368&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU1OTcwMzY4LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODI1MzE3MywiZXhwIjoxNzQwODQ1MTczLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMjU1MDIyMyIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.I0uw3ib4zm4KWV7ojFD0k6X6-cOZVg6GEtconaWiDJ0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
