The first 10 days of Trump's term has demonstrated how devastating Project 2025 is, how autocratic it is, and how much worse it will get. Last spring I read the 900+ page Project 2025 fascist manifesto and wrote about it in detail. Over the coming weeks and months we will see this fascist plan continue to unfold. Below, I summarize the key aspects of what to expect under Project 2025. And I offer action items on how to fight back. Indeed, MAGA Republicans have made no secret of their intent to enforce Project 2025 fascism, and we must remain informed to respond. **Let 's Address This.**
**Earnest Ask!** I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support. **Subscribe and join more than 105,000+ fellow activists.**
[ Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F3ZoqcBiHZWbULYBSQqlv9YWDzrCQbWSSsgcFmhiwNc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=155970368)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5345e0b3-24a2-4d3a-a43f-22a29fd49a10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
A supporter holds a Project 2025 fan in the group's tent at the Iowa State Fair on Aug. 14, 2023. (Photo cred: Charlie Neibergall / Associated Press)
**This article has three parts:**
1. A brief overview of Project 2025 and how it is being implemented in real time.
2. What steps we need Democratic Leadership to take (that they currently are not).
3. What steps you can take to fight back against fascism, especially locally.

## 1\. Update on Project 2025
I researched, wrote, and published most of these pieces on Project 2025 well before Biden stepped down. Below I share the link to the full article, an excerpt I wrote from each of those articles to summarize its main points, and an update on what we already know about how that aspect of Project 2025 is being deployed.
* [Project 2025 Invites Fascism to America](https://substack.com/redirect/20bb4d90-8a95-40d2-a6da-09a2f2fe6b60?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

> With Project 2025, we are beyond mere arrival of fascism in America--we are on the cusp of full blown fascism. Project 2025 seeks to fully transform the United States into a banana republic and theocracy--both concepts repugnant to a U.S. Constitution committed to secular governance and equal access under the law. And given the success these right wing extremists have had in taking over the United States Supreme Court and hundreds of members of the United States Congress, it would be unwise to dismiss them as unserious in their attempts to win back the White House.
**UPDATE:** Cleary I was not being hyperbolic when I said we were on the cusp of full blown fascism. Between 200 Executive Orders, a Muslim Ban 2.0, mass ICE raids targeting children in schools, and massive ethical conflicts between Trump's personal finances, the Presidency, and billionaire oligarchs, fascism is here and we are seeing the early stages of its impact on our nation.
* [Project 2025 Attacks Abortion](https://substack.com/redirect/4561c6a8-2f64-400f-bed1-61dc59529974?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

> Project 2025 disregards life, common sense, and science, and views essentially all abortion and reproductive access as evil. Based on what it defines as "_biblical values_ ," Project 2025 ultimately seeks to ban abortion altogether through defunding access, criminalizing access, and denying young people basic education and knowledge of how their own bodies work. It is dead set on transforming our secular government into a theocratic Christian nationalist fascist state. One in which women do not have the fundamental human right of personal autonomy, nor do physicians have the common sense ability to practice medical science according to actual science, not evangelical theocracy.
**UPDATE:** States like South Carolina have introduced legislation that would allow the state to execute women who receive an abortion--[I wrote about that here](https://substack.com/redirect/6834d2a8-29dc-4f10-9462-b3000c39f548?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Likewise, MAGA attempts to roll back healthcare revolve around limiting and eliminating access to reproductive health. And MAGAs are also [openly attacking access to contraception](https://substack.com/redirect/fb02ecaf-c7ed-4e0b-b7f6-c631ac4e248f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) by demanding a repeal of the ACA, which provides contraception access.
* [Project 2025 Attacks Diversity, Equity, and Inclusion](https://substack.com/redirect/fe7b2e52-8cd7-4fa0-af31-3876ea9818f9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

> Project 2025 views DEI as the source of all ills in America. It is dead set on returning our government and business hiring practices to the Jim Crow era, a time when Black people, Asians, Latinos, and women had no meaningful opportunity for an equal shot at admission, a job, a loan, or a promotion. A Project 2025 administration will absolutely further normalize discrimination against people of color and women, not to mention LGBTQ+ Americans. And Project 2025 absolutely will fine, punish, and arguably imprison for alleged racial discrimination anyone who even mentions the concepts of DEI. It is imperative, therefore, that we do not allow this fascist manifesto to become American policy.
**UPDATE:** Trump is purging the Federal government of anything related to diversity, equity, inclusion, or accessibility. [I wrote about this fascist purge here](https://substack.com/redirect/2f69526d-f60e-4912-928a-cc5e0c7a6839?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), which also addresses Trump's demand that federal employees snitch on each other if anyone is caught "secretly doing DEIA." Trump has also already initiated numerous anti-LGBTQ broadly initiatives and anti-Trans initiatives specifically.
* [Project 2025 Attacks Public Education](https://substack.com/redirect/02223bb1-c439-4e49-aa3a-c51bf3734669?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

> Project 2025 fears a public education system that calls for meaningful racial justice and accountability, one that holds a mirror up to the injustices of white supremacy, and one that demands equal access to education for children of all races and socio-economic classes. It not only bans teaching about DEI, it demands prosecution of universities and employers who enact DEI practices. Throughout the manifesto, Project 2025 calls for a ban on any instruction that teaches about race or racism in the United States. In short, an education system under a Project 2025 administration would mean a gutting of public education, a transfer o wealth to predominantly white, predominately wealthy families for private school vouchers, an advancement of Christian nationalist theocratic education, a ban on teachings of racial justice, a green light for even violent anti-LGBTQ discrimination, and an exacerbation of existing racial segregation and underfunding of majority Black and Latino institutions.
**UPDATE:** The Trump regime is ordering ICE to raid public schools and target children. They are set on defunding and eliminating the entire Department of Education. And they are set on removing books that teach about any form of human diversity. In the Project 2025 fascist agenda, only straight while male Christians need apply.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F3ZoqcBiHZWbULYBSQqlv9YWDzrCQbWSSsgcFmhiwNc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155970368)
## 2\. What Can Democratic Leadership Do?
Democratic leadership could be doing a lot to hold Trump accountable and slow down his fascist plans. And I, for one, am outraged that they are not living up to the power we've entrusted to them. I wrote in November [a list of things Biden could do to slow down Trump's fascist plan](https://substack.com/redirect/13b6d1b7-17ea-484a-bc05-385551972ca0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). Sadly, he did almost none of them. I still recall being flabbergasted in 2021 and 2022 when Democrats had the House, the Senate, the White House for two years, and the AGs office, and still refusing to act on that power to abolish the filibuster, expand the court, convict Trump, cancel student debt, champion economic populism through the BBB, and more.
Even now, Democrats have no clear message, no clear response to Project 2025, and no clear person leading the party. This is absolutely unacceptable. By the way, former Congresswoman [Marie Newman](https://open.substack.com/users/108375358-marie-newman?utm_source=mentions) wrote a brilliant must read piece on this issue.1
I am grateful Democrat Attorneys General have filed a lawsuit to block Trump's spending freeze. But where is the pressure on the GOP AGs to join? Where are the press conferences and media blitzes? Where are the protests by Members of Congress? Where are the guidances on what to do if your care is denied? If your food is denied? If your Section 8 is denied? I should not have to lecture Congress on stuff they should already be doing.
As Indivisible Co-Executive Director Leah Greeberg excellently [said](https://substack.com/redirect/22aaf904-7170-42c7-9453-733859496ec7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg):
> Dems can:
> * oppose all Trump nominees until this EO is withdrawn
> * deny unanimous consent to slow senate proceedings
> * vote no on all cloture -force quorum calls at every chance
>

> It's a constitutional crisis. There is absolutely no reason the Senate should be connecting business as usual.
Instead Democrat Senate Leader Chuck Schumer said he would "not stand by as Republicans defund the police" and Democrat House Leader Hakeem Jeffries tweeted that "God is on the throne."
I don't have the words to express my disappointment at this lack of urgency and self-awareness. So let's instead discuss what we as ordinary citizens can and should do.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..F3ZoqcBiHZWbULYBSQqlv9YWDzrCQbWSSsgcFmhiwNc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=155970368)
## 3\. What Should We Be Doing Right Now?
With fascism bearing down on us, we must activate, organize, and invest if we hope to enact meaningful change for justice in the next election. Let's break down what that looks like with specific action items. Here I reiterate guidance I've shared in the past on how you can get involved, even if you don't know where to begin or don't have expendable funds. I assure you, you do not need money or power to get involved--you simply need a way to channel your rage into progress. Here are some steps:
Some of these action items below have immediate effect and others take time. I ask you to engage in both types of calls to action. We must act quickly to protect our immigrant neighbors now, and build capacity to change fascist policy in the future.
### **1\. Activate**
Get involved in your local politics, which affects you more than most realize. Whether it is your local school board, your local city council, or your local immigrant rights organization--get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and understand the local issues impacting your community. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. All politics is local, and it is critical you get involved locally.
### **2\. Communicate**
Contact your member of Congress ([find them here](https://substack.com/redirect/9832d3cb-7771-4ae2-8dd7-cbcac3fb8dac?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)) and relentlessly remind them that you do not support Trump's fascist agenda. Even if they are not willing to listen to you, inundate them with calls, texts, and emails. Ensure they hear your outrage as much as possible.
### **3\. Invest**
Invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions, do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, especially local orgs, please do so. Even a few dollars a month, if you can afford it, goes a long way.
### **4\. Educate**
It is critical we remain informed on the key issues, by educating ourselves and those around us. As corporate media sadly continues to capitulate to fascism, support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. [like yours truly](https://substack.com/redirect/a9ba0b6f-809d-401b-842a-cf4416d8abbc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)). Read the work of non-profit media like ProPublica, The Appeal, and more. We may not have the billions of dollars in dark money from corporate autocrats, but we have strength in numbers and your support makes that difference.
### **5\. Organize**
Bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, next phone banking session to an elected official, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. (And when your friend comes to the second meeting, it is their opportunity to reach one more and bring them with).
[Give a gift subscription](https://substack..F3ZoqcBiHZWbULYBSQqlv9YWDzrCQbWSSsgcFmhiwNc?&gift=true)
## **Conclusion**
Let me acknowledge the reality of where we are, and offer a message of hope. Yes, Project 2025 is here. And it will do its worst to destroy our lives and install Christian nationalism and religious extremism. When in these stressful times, I reflect on history to find hope. I don't know if these words will be of comfort but here's how I think about things. **I think about the pivotal moments in history. Moments like ...**
* When Elizabeth Freeman sued for her freedom in 1780 and set a precedent that ended slavery in Massachusetts.
* When Private Mohammed Kahn immigrated from Iran/Afghanistan in 1861 and then immediately enlisted in the Union Army to help win the Civil War.
* When Congressman John Lewis faced Jim Crow police brutality marching across the Edmund Pettus bridge in 1965 and got in good trouble.

I think about the fact we all look at these icons and reflect, "How great if I could've been there as the lawyer for Elizabeth Freeman, or the soldier that had Mohammed Kahn's six, or walked lock step with John Lewis as he marched across that bridge?"
This is our moment in 2025. Our moment to demand freedom. Our moment to resist fascism. Our moment to walk across our bridge. So in the future our grandchildren will look back and say, "If only I were alive when [_your name]_ raised their voice against all odds and fought back fascism and injustice, I would have stood with them."
All this to say, if you feel like crying, don't fight back the tears, let it out. And then channel the rage to write our moment in history. This is our moment. It is ours. And we have the chance to leave our mark as one committed to justice and compassion.
Let us do so with every fiber of our being.
**Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement.**

(Photo cred: Charlie Neibergall / Associated Press) This article has three parts: 1. A brief overview of Project 2025 and how it is being implemented in real time. 2. What steps we need Democratic Leadership to take (that they currently are not). 3. What steps you can take to fight back against fascism, especially locally. 1\. Update on Project 2025 I researched, wrote, and published most of these pieces on Project 2025 well before Biden stepped down. Below I share the link to the full article, an excerpt I wrote from each of those articles to summarize its main points, and an update on what we already know about how that aspect of Project 2025 is being deployed. With Project 2025, we are beyond mere arrival of fascism in America--we are on the cusp of full blown fascism. Project 2025 seeks to fully transform the United States into a banana republic and theocracy--both concepts repugnant to a U.S. Constitution committed to secular governance and equal access under the law. And given the success these right wing extremists have had in taking over the United States Supreme Court and hundreds of members of the United States Congress, it would be unwise to dismiss them as unserious in their attempts to win back the White House. UPDATE: Cleary I was not being hyperbolic when I said we were on the cusp of full blown fascism. Between 200 Executive Orders, a Muslim Ban 2.0, mass ICE raids targeting children in schools, and massive ethical conflicts between Trump's personal finances, the Presidency, and billionaire oligarchs, fascism is here and we are seeing the early stages of its impact on our nation. Project 2025 disregards life, common sense, and science, and views essentially all abortion and reproductive access as evil. Based on what it defines as "biblical values ," Project 2025 ultimately seeks to ban abortion altogether through defunding access, criminalizing access, and denying young people basic education and knowledge of how their own bodies work. It is dead set on transforming our secular government into a theocratic Christian nationalist fascist state. One in which women do not have the fundamental human right of personal autonomy, nor do physicians have the common sense ability to practice medical science according to actual science, not evangelical theocracy. UPDATE: States like South Carolina have introduced legislation that would allow the state to execute women who receive an abortion--. Likewise, MAGA attempts to roll back healthcare revolve around limiting and eliminating access to reproductive health. And MAGAs are also by demanding a repeal of the ACA, which provides contraception access. Project 2025 views DEI as the source of all ills in America. It is dead set on returning our government and business hiring practices to the Jim Crow era, a time when Black people, Asians, Latinos, and women had no meaningful opportunity for an equal shot at admission, a job, a loan, or a promotion. A Project 2025 administration will absolutely further normalize discrimination against people of color and women, not to mention LGBTQ+ Americans. And Project 2025 absolutely will fine, punish, and arguably imprison for alleged racial discrimination anyone who even mentions the concepts of DEI. It is imperative, therefore, that we do not allow this fascist manifesto to become American policy. UPDATE: Trump is purging the Federal government of anything related to diversity, equity, inclusion, or accessibility. , which also addresses Trump's demand that federal employees snitch on each other if anyone is caught "secretly doing DEIA." Trump has also already initiated numerous anti-LGBTQ broadly initiatives and anti-Trans initiatives specifically. Project 2025 fears a public education system that calls for meaningful racial justice and accountability, one that holds a mirror up to the injustices of white supremacy, and one that demands equal access to education for children of all races and socio-economic classes. It not only bans teaching about DEI, it demands prosecution of universities and employers who enact DEI practices. Throughout the manifesto, Project 2025 calls for a ban on any instruction that teaches about race or racism in the United States. In short, an education system under a Project 2025 administration would mean a gutting of public education, a transfer o wealth to predominantly white, predominately wealthy families for private school vouchers, an advancement of Christian nationalist theocratic education, a ban on teachings of racial justice, a green light for even violent anti-LGBTQ discrimination, and an exacerbation of existing racial segregation and underfunding of majority Black and Latino institutions. UPDATE: The Trump regime is ordering ICE to raid public schools and target children. They are set on defunding and eliminating the entire Department of Education. And they are set on removing books that teach about any form of human diversity. In the Project 2025 fascist agenda, only straight while male Christians need apply. 2\. What Can Democratic Leadership Do? Democratic leadership could be doing a lot to hold Trump accountable and slow down his fascist plans. And I, for one, am outraged that they are not living up to the power we've entrusted to them. I wrote in November . Sadly, he did almost none of them. I still recall being flabbergasted in 2021 and 2022 when Democrats had the House, the Senate, the White House for two years, and the AGs office, and still refusing to act on that power to abolish the filibuster, expand the court, convict Trump, cancel student debt, champion economic populism through the BBB, and more. Even now, Democrats have no clear message, no clear response to Project 2025, and no clear person leading the party. This is absolutely unacceptable. By the way, former Congresswoman wrote a brilliant must read piece on this issue.1 I am grateful Democrat Attorneys General have filed a lawsuit to block Trump's spending freeze. But where is the pressure on the GOP AGs to join? Where are the press conferences and media blitzes? Where are the protests by Members of Congress? Where are the guidances on what to do if your care is denied? If your food is denied? If your Section 8 is denied? I should not have to lecture Congress on stuff they should already be doing. As Indivisible Co-Executive Director Leah Greeberg excellently : Dems can: oppose all Trump nominees until this EO is withdrawn deny unanimous consent to slow senate proceedings vote no on all cloture -force quorum calls at every chance It's a constitutional crisis. There is absolutely no reason the Senate should be connecting business as usual. Instead Democrat Senate Leader Chuck Schumer said he would "not stand by as Republicans defund the police" and Democrat House Leader Hakeem Jeffries tweeted that "God is on the throne." I don't have the words to express my disappointment at this lack of urgency and self-awareness. So let's instead discuss what we as ordinary citizens can and should do. 3\. What Should We Be Doing Right Now? With fascism bearing down on us, we must activate, organize, and invest if we hope to enact meaningful change for justice in the next election. Let's break down what that looks like with specific action items. Here I reiterate guidance I've shared in the past on how you can get involved, even if you don't know where to begin or don't have expendable funds. I assure you, you do not need money or power to get involved--you simply need a way to channel your rage into progress. Here are some steps: Some of these action items below have immediate effect and others take time. I ask you to engage in both types of calls to action. We must act quickly to protect our immigrant neighbors now, and build capacity to change fascist policy in the future. 1\. Activate Get involved in your local politics, which affects you more than most realize. Whether it is your local school board, your local city council, or your local immigrant rights organization--get involved. Show up to the next meeting, meet your local elected officials, and understand the local issues impacting your community. Google is your friend in finding a local calendar of events. Use it. All politics is local, and it is critical you get involved locally. 2\. Communicate Contact your member of Congress () and relentlessly remind them that you do not support Trump's fascist agenda. Even if they are not willing to listen to you, inundate them with calls, texts, and emails. Ensure they hear your outrage as much as possible. 3\. Invest Invest your time and your money into the people and organizations doing the front line work. If you have time to volunteer, make phone calls, knock doors, and sign petitions, do so. If you have the financial resources to donate to organizations working to protect our democracy, especially local orgs, please do so. Even a few dollars a month, if you can afford it, goes a long way. 4\. Educate It is critical we remain informed on the key issues, by educating ourselves and those around us. As corporate media sadly continues to capitulate to fascism, support writers and human rights lawyers working to stop fascism in America (e.g. ). Read the work of non-profit media like ProPublica, The Appeal, and more. We may not have the billions of dollars in dark money from corporate autocrats, but we have strength in numbers and your support makes that difference. 5\. Organize Bring friends with you. You are the best ambassador for justice in your friend group--lead by example. Grab even one friend and drag them with you to the next school board meeting, city council session, next phone banking session to an elected official, or town hall in your local community. We need to build organizational capacity, and means each one reaches one to get involved. (And when your friend comes to the second meeting, it is their opportunity to reach one more and bring them with). Conclusion Let me acknowledge the reality of where we are, and offer a message of hope. Yes, Project 2025 is here. And it will do its worst to destroy our lives and install Christian nationalism and religious extremism. When in these stressful times, I reflect on history to find hope. I don't know if these words will be of comfort but here's how I think about things. I think about the pivotal moments in history. Moments like ... When Elizabeth Freeman sued for her freedom in 1780 and set a precedent that ended slavery in Massachusetts. When Private Mohammed Kahn immigrated from Iran/Afghanistan in 1861 and then immediately enlisted in the Union Army to help win the Civil War. When Congressman John Lewis faced Jim Crow police brutality marching across the Edmund Pettus bridge in 1965 and got in good trouble. I think about the fact we all look at these icons and reflect, "How great if I could've been there as the lawyer for Elizabeth Freeman, or the soldier that had Mohammed Kahn's six, or walked lock step with John Lewis as he marched across that bridge?" This is our moment in 2025. Our moment to demand freedom. Our moment to resist fascism. Our moment to walk across our bridge. So in the future our grandchildren will look back and say, "If only I were alive when [your name] raised their voice against all odds and fought back fascism and injustice, I would have stood with them." All this to say, if you feel like crying, don't fight back the tears, let it out. And then channel the rage to write our moment in history. This is our moment. It is ours. And we have the chance to leave our mark as one committed to justice and compassion. Let us do so with every fiber of our being. Before you go. I am doing everything in my power to stave off fascism under this new administration. I cannot do it alone. Subscribe below and join the movement. | | ---|---|--- 1 Marie Newman Studio Substack Preface: I had an entirely different column ready and waiting for today, but this couldn't wait. Something urgent has been percolating for weeks and I can't bite my tongue any longer to avoid hurting feelings. My goal here is to help and encourage, not criticize. This column is shared with great respect, love of country and humility, but deeply grave concern... a day ago 291 likes 39 comments Marie Newman Quick Ask! I am doing everything in my power over the next four years to stave off fascism in the United States, and I need your support.Become a paid subscriber and join the movement. | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Qasim Rashid, Esq. 1552 South Route 59 #1333 Naperville, IL 60564 ? ?

Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013025_1&amount=25]
NPR: Private funding saved the 2020 election. Now, some GOP-led states are banning it [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/NPR_PrivateFunding.png]
Private sector companies and nonprofit charities often donate money and provide grants to communities across the country to help administer voting.
This includes mail sorting machines in Philadelphia, nonpartisan voter registration staff in Arizona, and cameras to verify no one tampers with ballots in Bucks County, PA. Local officials have referred to this money as a "lifeline".
Now, 14 states have banned outside funding and five other states passed a ban that was vetoed by the Governor.
We want to hear from our supporters about your feelings about this news. Will you take our quick one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you believe that private grants should be allowed to help administer elections?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.

Greg Abbott ordered state agencies to cooperate with President Donald Trump’s mass deportation efforts and directed the state’s criminal justice agency to that could be used for detaining and deporting undocumented migrants. The move comes just days after federal agents launched on Sunday in Texas cities including Austin, Dallas-Fort Worth and San Antonio. Since Trump returned to office earlier this month, Abbott has pledged to cooperate with the new president’s efforts to curb illegal border crossings and remove undocumented immigrants from the country. » Abbott said he ordered state agencies to work with the Trump administration to “investigate, arrest, detain, and deport illegal immigrants in Texas.” The orders also direct state agencies to assist federal agents in securing the U.S.-Mexico border, share intelligence information on drug cartels with federal law enforcement and work with the federal government to “deploy any physical infrastructure to improve operational security at the southern border.” "For the past four years, Texas has worked around-the-clock to defend our southern border while former President Joe Biden refused to protect our country from an invasion he allowed," Abbott said in a Wednesday release. "Now, we have a Commander-in-Chief in the White House who will do what is necessary to protect Americans.” » Throughout his presidential campaign, Trump promised to launch the in U.S. history by using the military and working with local law enforcement agencies. Trump sent some troops to the border shortly after taking office and Abbott 400 Texas National Guard troops to the border Monday. Abbott launched a border security initiative dubbed in 2021 shortly after Biden took office and sent state troopers and National Guard members to the border to address a rise in border crossings he blamed on the Biden administration. Texas has on the effort so far; last week Abbott asked for from the federal government." | FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: MassGOP
subject: MassGOP Demands Fiscal Accountability as Emergency Shelter Budget Runs Dry
body:
| | | | |
---
| | [](https://qgzxgy5ab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001UsuYlFy7Nm1DJZhKHoRvBHc-gEO-vjxaDYL9BrhvgeUjnvoNspk8SPpVXLCC_kCI5b3IX3-mjKF51xxYCo00URdls-sct9u83bZ5ZjbSDg536yNs1uadQTaW1RoGo4ltGs32_kgXSYAkLaw8EsQACQ==&c=xSPgvklAms-pNZZ9cPGnXMpfWxzQ2MSwLUDWQa_AZV6lE3jFgC9pfQ==&ch=edQnn_wZiCpH1dGbS3dUYGqV6xacVajFi5r-o6mg7zOcKn3_9YLVXQ==)
---
| MassGOP Demands Fiscal Accountability as Emergency Shelter Budget Runs Dry
---
---
| Boston, MA -The taxpayer-funded Emergency Assistance (EA) shelter system has spiraled into unchecked spending and a full-blown humanitarian crisis--all at the expense of hardworking Massachusetts residents. Tomorrow, the EA shelter budget runs out, and the Massachusetts Republican Party is calling for a halt to any additional funding until meaningful reforms are enacted to restore the program's original intent: assisting Massachusetts families facing genuine hardship.
Governor Maura Healey's recent response to critical questions from House Ways & Means Committee Chairman Aaron Michlewitz failed to provide the answers that taxpayers deserve before more money is allocated. Meanwhile, the so-called "reforms" introduced by the Healey-Driscoll administration are nothing more than half-measures that do nothing to curb the program's unsustainable spending cycle.
MassGOP Chair Amy Carnevale issued a sharp rebuke of the administration's approach, stating:
"We cannot, in good conscience, continue funding the Emergency Assistance Shelter Program without meaningful reforms that include concrete measures to scale back the program and rein in spending. Our state's revenue streams and overall budget are simply not in a position to sustain massive, unchecked expenditures."
Carnevale also pointed to the broader economic challenges facing Massachusetts:
"Massachusetts is already overly reliant on one-time revenue sources and the so-called Millionaire's Tax to fund key initiatives. Yet, we know these temporary revenue streams will eventually disappear, and the data is clear--Massachusetts is experiencing an exodus of residents, particularly those targeted by the Governor's tax on success. We cannot continue down a path of reckless spending without real solutions to curb costs and restore fiscal responsibility to the EA shelter program."
The Massachusetts Republican Party stands firm in its demand for transparency, accountability, and real reform before taxpayers are asked to foot another massive bill for a program in crisis. The time for half-measures is over--Massachusetts needs leadership that will enact lasting solutions, not continue down a path of financial irresponsibility.

### ###

| | Dear Friend, C.S. Lewis was a master at addressing life's most important questions through vivid language that is delightful and captivating to read.

His signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired countless skeptics to become believers and even more believers to renew and deepen their faith--making him the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis, we produced "[**C.S. Lewis on Christianity,**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c11fbf32577b4cba8eaf60ae92430e98&_e=z-GPObhp0O0PLc72-X0PcyAIE1QzivrAeFRTBJwPKwynBT_5Oe71T-suui6cFLhfpY6CxJG-9gOx7kDl4X3SacMGEO9RN5qIzFgzRPcRTrzN4gEjzaasTKqSrtjk5nJImhn7sTs7nwg3kvpn4FpPiWniVtqgOeZrISV9td9LzI6TThP4WsvtaYLjC6T8kTd65LtBtaGt8rLmri0BrWfshFP1zYjtXkQ_fKsjvsyxRxP-rij46K6Kx__vKFj2MkKW0xC9W_JEj0wHwm3SAp48hHInVn5ISbovkLFw5zAuzkjgvR6ejlMz08eTQkkHwx5mcs2lwCMS3o3jCqyviFkaKjN9loT8SSKjWkq82JjlLElLNBHwq8Ok9CjosEcZncIEZUJTveYNqNaA51j7Vg7pO5BhxNZz1VRlJwFy7sitYSjrBymwUK4A68WZAzyEykj1)" which you can now own on DVD.

| [](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c11fbf32577b4cba8eaf60ae92430e98&_e=z-GPObhp0O0PLc72-X0PcyAIE1QzivrAeFRTBJwPKwynBT_5Oe71T-suui6cFLhfpY6CxJG-9gOx7kDl4X3SacMGEO9RN5qIzFgzRPcRTrzN4gEjzaasTKqSrtjk5nJImhn7sTs7nwg3kvpn4FpPiWniVtqgOeZrISV9td9LzI6TThP4WsvtaYLjC6T8kTd65LtBtaGt8rLmri0BrWfshFP1zYjtXkQ_fKsjvsyxRxP-rij46K6Kx__vKFj2MkKW0xC9W_JEj0wHwm3SAp48hHInVn5ISbovkLFw5zAuzkjCCF15R2Y83i70jqlwJXJYs7bb9KRjIZsRo5kFzo1b98aaKQLLYVDLSe3BrARV8wWHyFwkkbQf_88wK4FQalCV66ZTKSdZgQTMw9xXHmcBaBSyU0i4Wxr-cw2p1NsHvxw4efU_cHZlcSrmgH-dvUaY)

| | In this course you will learn Lewis's profound insights on the central topics of Christianity, including:
* good and evil,
* conversion and faith,
* prayer and the Bible,
* suffering and death,
* heaven and hell, and much more.

The instructor, Dr. Michael Ward, is a Distinguished Visiting Professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He is the author of _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_, and the co-editor of _The Cambridge Companion to C.S. Lewis_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

This course is especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith and traces Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for us to grow in our knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

That's why I hope you'll join us in examining the eternal questions of Christianity with C.S. Lewis with [this beautiful DVD box set](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=c11fbf32577b4cba8eaf60ae92430e98&_e=z-GPObhp0O0PLc72-X0PcyAIE1QzivrAeFRTBJwPKwynBT_5Oe71T-suui6cFLhfpY6CxJG-9gOx7kDl4X3SacMGEO9RN5qIzFgzRPcRTrzN4gEjzaasTKqSrtjk5nJImhn7sTs7nwg3kvpn4FpPiWniVtqgOeZrISV9td9LzI6TThP4WsvtaYLjC6T8kTd65LtBtaGt8rLmri0BrWfshFP1zYjtXkQ_fKsjvsyxRxP-rij46K6Kx__vKFj2MkKW0xC9W_JEj0wHwm3SAp48hHInVn5ISbovkLFw5zAuzkjsC0xDOk_ok4XVl5oR0MPGIgTJo3HYf5M-3b4Am0f5gR1BmFEGQf0Bfo2bDpXwfFNN6lTbcsLEehTYY5XjUzMOw33l18_K1I6ql-hk6Q2lXC0DsNBqiNVplMWSv8HhH9I073dqXENPzoZZX7jZtqve).

Best regards,

Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D.
Executive Director of Online Learning

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 1/30/2025
body:
Colorado’s GOP U.S. House members reject state GOP’s proposed bylaw changes, as Williams wants a debate
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi friends,
I know all of us here at Rocky Mountain Voice are heartbroken over the [plane crash in D.C.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) last night. We're continuing to follow this breaking news and we'll post information as it comes out on our website and social media. As someone who has lost a loved one to a plane crash, it certainly hits close to home - my prayers go out to all the families who are dealing with an incredibly tragic time. A heartfelt thank you to all the first responders as well.
Just a reminder to come join me tonight at [Taste of The Peak](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), a fun-fundraiser for The Peak News Educational Foundation to Benefit their "Journalistic Ethics and Media Vocational Training Program" for Pikes Peak-area youth. [RSVP here.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Hope to see you there!
Here is a summary of today's top stories:
**🏛️ Colorado Legislative Session Updates...** Senate Bill 25-003, aimed at banning the sale, distribution, and transfer of certain semiautomatic firearms, has [passed a key Senate committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). And in today's legislator spotlight, for [newly-elected Rep. Ryan Gonzalez](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), R-Greeley, representing the 50th District in Weld County, it’s growing up in a household where sacrifices weren’t optional, but survival.
**🏔️ Here in Colorado...** Colorado’s Republican U.S. House members have rejected proposed [state party bylaw changes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), calling them an attempt to consolidate power under GOP Chairman Dave Williams. Williams has challenged them to a public debate. Jay Longmire [resigned from the Douglas County Planning Commission](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) in protest of mistreatment toward Commissioner Lora Thomas.
Meanwhile, at the [Colorado Farm Show](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), the Cattlemen’s Association warned of rising cattle rustling, labor shortages, and tariffs, while Senate Bill 5's union election changes remain a key concern for agricultural workers. Lastly, Buckley Space Force Base is being used as a staging and [processing facility for detained migrants](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) as the Trump administration intensifies immigration enforcement.
🇺🇸**On the National Stage...** The Trump administration's education department is investigating Denver Public Schools for converting a girls’ restroom into an “all-gender” facility, citing [discrimination against female students](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). GOP lawmakers introduced the [Educational Choice for Children Act](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), offering tax incentives to individuals and businesses to fund K-12 scholarships, increasing parental control over education.
Trump is busy making America great again. He [signed the Laken Riley Act into law](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) Wednesday, making it the first legislative victory of his second term. He is also proposing a bold and potentially controversial plan to [eliminate federal income taxes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) entirely, sparking debate among Republican allies.
This is the Mountain Minute for Thursday, January 30, 2025.
– Heidi Ganahl
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[Colorado’s GOP U.S. House members reject state GOP’s proposed bylaw changes, as Williams wants a debate](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY LINDY BROWNING, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
In what some denounce as an attempt to consolidate power for GOP Chairman Dave Williams, the Republican Party has proposed a last-minute change to the organization’s bylaws on Jan. 30.
Colorado Congressional Republicans, supported by state Senate Republicans, have written an open letter rejecting these changes.
“As Colorado’s four Republican members of Congress, we write to express our united and unequivocal opposition to the proposed bylaw amendments under consideration by the Colorado Republican Party. As a party, we should not be taking votes to radically change our rules under a lame-duck administration, additionally, these changes threaten to undermine our ability as a party to focus on the issues that matter most to the people of Colorado and advance a bold conservative agenda,” reads the letter.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Stories of struggle, hardship fuel Rep. Ryan Gonzalez’s push for practical state solutions](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Growing up in a single-parent household and facing economic struggles, Rep. Ryan Gonzalez (R-Greeley) draws from personal experience to push for policies that support working families and small businesses.
* Gonzalez is sponsoring a bill to amend Colorado’s Cottage Food Act, allowing more home-based food vendors to sell without excessive regulations, arguing that hardworking entrepreneurs shouldn’t be criminalized for making a living
* Gonzalez is a strong advocate for protecting the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights (TABOR), repealing burdensome fees like the 10-cent bag fee, and ensuring food security by proposing a suspension of Colorado’s cage-free egg law during emergencies.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Longmire resigns Douglas Co. planning post in protest of treatment Commissioner Thomas received](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Jay Longmire resigned from the Douglas County Planning Commission, citing years of alleged “bullying, abuse, and slander” against Commissioner Lora Thomas by fellow commissioners George Teal and Abe Laydon.
* Longmire criticized Teal and Laydon for stripping Thomas of board positions, revoking her county credit card, and removing her from her office before her term ended, calling it a misuse of taxpayer dollars.
* Frustrated by Commissioner Kevin Van Winkle’s silence on the matter, Longmire stated that his values no longer aligned with the leadership and that he could not serve under such conditions.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[Cattle rustling, labor and tariffs among concerns for ranchers, Cattlemen’s Association tells Farm Show audience](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* The Colorado Cattlemen’s Association highlighted a growing concern over cattle theft, citing recent cases in Rifle and Montrose where over 300 cattle were stolen, a problem dating back to the organization’s founding in 1867.
* Ranchers are pushing back against Senate Bill 5, which would remove a second vote requirement in union formation, fearing it will increase labor costs and regulatory burdens on agricultural producers.
* With upcoming farm bill negotiations, the beef industry is closely watching trade policies, while discussions continue over federal land use, including potential grazing policy changes and the delisting of the gray wolf under the Trump administration.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**[SB25-003, limiting semiauto firearm sales, passes Colorado Senate committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [FOX 31 NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* A bill banning the sale, manufacture, and transfer of specified semiautomatic firearms and accessories that increase firing rates passed the Colorado Senate State, Veterans, and Military Affairs Committee in a 3-2 vote.
* Sponsored by Democrat Senators Tom Sullivan and Julie Gonzales, the bill is part of ongoing legislative efforts following the 2013 Aurora theater shooting, which led to restrictions on high-capacity magazines.
* The bill now heads to the Senate floor for further debate and must pass additional readings before a final vote is taken.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️**
**[A full list of President Trump’s executive orders so far](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY RMV STAFF | NATIONAL | JANUARY 28** _Since returning to office, President Donald Trump has signed a sweeping array of executive orders, setting the tone for his administration’s priorities and charting a course for significant policy shifts._ __

**[Rep. Luck’s bill to increase transparency in legislation gains broad committee support](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER****| STATE | JANUARY 27** _If you are not a political insider, the two-month period between electing your state lawmakers to the General Assembly and the filing of bills as the state legislature begins might be filled with radio silence._ __
__
**[Colorado Farm Show is Jan. 28-30 at Island Grove Regional Park in Greeley](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY BRIAN PORTER****| LOCAL | JANUARY 27** _A winter rite of passage in agriculture returns this week, as the Colorado Farm Show takes place at Island Grove Regional Park in Greeley._ __

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [brian@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|

|
---

|

---

As a party, we should not be taking votes to radically change our rules under a lame-duck administration, additionally, these changes threaten to undermine our ability as a party to focus on the issues that matter most to the people of Colorado and advance a bold conservative agenda,” reads the letter. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | Growing up in a single-parent household and facing economic struggles, Rep. Ryan Gonzalez (R-Greeley) draws from personal experience to push for policies that support working families and small businesses. Gonzalez is sponsoring a bill to amend Colorado’s Cottage Food Act, allowing more home-based food vendors to sell without excessive regulations, arguing that hardworking entrepreneurs shouldn’t be criminalized for making a living Gonzalez is a strong advocate for protecting the Taxpayer’s Bill of Rights (TABOR), repealing burdensome fees like the 10-cent bag fee, and ensuring food security by proposing a suspension of Colorado’s cage-free egg law during emergencies. | Jay Longmire resigned from the Douglas County Planning Commission, citing years of alleged “bullying, abuse, and slander” against Commissioner Lora Thomas by fellow commissioners George Teal and Abe Laydon. Longmire criticized Teal and Laydon for stripping Thomas of board positions, revoking her county credit card, and removing her from her office before her term ended, calling it a misuse of taxpayer dollars. Frustrated by Commissioner Kevin Van Winkle’s silence on the matter, Longmire stated that his values no longer aligned with the leadership and that he could not serve under such conditions. | The Colorado Cattlemen’s Association highlighted a growing concern over cattle theft, citing recent cases in Rifle and Montrose where over 300 cattle were stolen, a problem dating back to the organization’s founding in 1867. Ranchers are pushing back against Senate Bill 5, which would remove a second vote requirement in union formation, fearing it will increase labor costs and regulatory burdens on agricultural producers. With upcoming farm bill negotiations, the beef industry is closely watching trade policies, while discussions continue over federal land use, including potential grazing policy changes and the delisting of the gray wolf under the Trump administration. | A bill banning the sale, manufacture, and transfer of specified semiautomatic firearms and accessories that increase firing rates passed the Colorado Senate State, Veterans, and Military Affairs Committee in a 3-2 vote. Sponsored by Democrat Senators Tom Sullivan and Julie Gonzales, the bill is part of ongoing legislative efforts following the 2013 Aurora theater shooting, which led to restrictions on high-capacity magazines. The bill now heads to the Senate floor for further debate and must pass additional readings before a final vote is taken. | ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ RMV STAFF | NATIONAL | JANUARY 28 Since returning to office, President Donald Trump has signed a sweeping array of executive orders, setting the tone for his administration’s priorities and charting a course for significant policy shifts. BRIAN PORTER| STATE | JANUARY 27 If you are not a political insider, the two-month period between electing your state lawmakers to the General Assembly and the filing of bills as the state legislature begins might be filled with radio silence. BRIAN PORTER| LOCAL | JANUARY 27 A winter rite of passage in agriculture returns this week, as the Colorado Farm Show takes place at Island Grove Regional Park in Greeley. Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to mailto:brian@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\)) or send us a message on social media to chat! | | 🍕 DID YOU KNOW? **Americans' love for pizza is undeniable, but you might be surprised to learn we consume enough each day to cover 100 acres—adding up to 3 billion pizzas a year. | CARTOON OF THE DAY | QUOTE OF THE DAY** "I've learned that you shouldn't go through life with a catcher's mitt on both hands; you need to be able to throw something back." — Maya Angelou | | | | ---|---|--- Did a friend forward you this email? | A product of Rocky Mountain Voice, Inc. 8200 S Quebec St, STE A3601 Centennial, CO 80112 This message was originally sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com Be sure to put “RockyMountainVoice.com” on your safe-senders whitelist. If you ever stop receiving our emails, it might be because someone to whom you forwarded the email unintentionally removed you from the list. No worries; it is easy enough to reactivate your subscription immediately by visiting: Before you click the link below... If someone forwarded this email to you, please don’t! Clicking the link will end the subscription of dpwillis67@gmail.com []()

name: Care in Action
subject: Chaos and Confusion: Medicaid is at risk
body:
Republicans are trying to take away our health care to pay for tax breaks to the rich.
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242290/525353151/664783965?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787)
Hi Peter,
This week, **Medicaid portals in all 50 states went down** , leading to chaos and fears that Medicaid payments could be cut off amidst the Trump administration’s sudden federal funding freeze.
Because of public outcry and collective action from supporters like you, the White House rescinded the freeze, but made clear that this will be an ongoing fight. This is not over — President Donald Trump and Congressional Republicans want to gut Medicaid to pay for **tax breaks for big corporations and the ultra‐wealthy.**
**[**_We need your voice now, because we know Republicans want to take away our health care. Take a moment to contact your representatives and demand they protect Medicaid:_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242292/525353152/29127930?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787) **
**********__[Contact your representatives >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242293/525353153/29127930?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787)__**********
Medicaid provides millions of children, seniors, and people with disabilities — **including care workers and families in our community** — with life‐saving health care and services.
Halting this funding would force states to reduce care services, potentially eliminate programs that ensure seniors and people with disabilities can receive care at home, or drop people from their health care coverage entirely — _leaving millions vulnerable._
**Attacks on Medicaid will have devastating consequences for caregivers, domestic workers, seniors, and the millions of families who depend on Medicaid for essential health care.**
Millions of Americans could lose access to health care and the home care services they need.
**[**_Can you take a minute to contact your representatives and demand they protect Medicaid from Donald Trump’s anti‐care agenda?_**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242294/525353154/29127930?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787) **
**********__[Contact your representatives >>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242295/525353155/29127930?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787)__**********
Every message to Congress that we send will make a difference, so contact your representatives today.
Care in Action
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242296/525353156/-1554439957?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242297/525353157/326371895?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787) [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101242298/525353158/955979663?ms=013025_medicaid_CiA&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNV08vMS83NjczNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTk3MmZhZi0yN2RmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aaxk52Z_B_c_J3qHNTn6G9_y1zenSSgjCZVtac-zJEE=&emci=191d0558-bbdd-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c5972faf-27df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=864787)

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Greg Abbott orders state agencies to cooperate with Trump's deportation efforts,** " Texas Tribune's **Pavan Achraya** -- "In a series of [executive orders](https://substack.com/redirect/8ea03a87-e15a-4021-8a35-6025e68d0027?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Wednesday, Gov. **Greg Abbott** ordered state agencies to cooperate with President **Donald Trump 's **mass deportation efforts and directed the state's criminal justice agency to [identify land and facilities](https://substack.com/redirect/0f75920f-4754-47ab-b688-1c3cc34cb507?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) that could be used for detaining and deporting undocumented migrants.

The move comes just days after federal agents launched [immigration operations](https://substack.com/redirect/426c5ae4-8a7f-44d5-ab4f-d8133f9f0072?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on Sunday in Texas cities including Austin, Dallas-Fort Worth and San Antonio. Since Trump returned to office earlier this month, Abbott has pledged to cooperate with the new president's efforts to curb illegal border crossings and remove undocumented immigrants from the country.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/192049b7-54fb-433b-8768-37a549fe34d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Abbott said he ordered state agencies to work with the Trump administration to "investigate, arrest, detain, and deport illegal immigrants in Texas." The orders also direct state agencies to assist federal agents in securing the U.S.-Mexico border, share intelligence information on drug cartels with federal law enforcement and work with the federal government to "deploy any physical infrastructure to improve operational security at the southern border."

"For the past four years, Texas has worked around-the-clock to defend our southern border while former President **Joe Biden** refused to protect our country from an invasion he allowed," Abbott said in a Wednesday release. "Now, we have a Commander-in-Chief in the White House who will do what is necessary to protect Americans."
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/192049b7-54fb-433b-8768-37a549fe34d4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Throughout his presidential campaign, Trump promised to launch the ["largest deportation program"](https://substack.com/redirect/33372c70-ed57-4f11-8a04-d305925a55a4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in U.S. history by using the military and working with local law enforcement agencies. Trump sent some troops to the border shortly after taking office and Abbott [deployed more than](https://substack.com/redirect/d11a12f3-7b97-4d4e-9ccc-d3250d911c0b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) 400 Texas National Guard troops to the border Monday.

Abbott launched a border security initiative dubbed [Operation Lone Star](https://substack.com/redirect/c3111b96-268d-4303-8ac8-aec1b2f90171?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) in 2021 shortly after Biden took office and sent state troopers and National Guard members to the border to address a rise in border crossings he blamed on the Biden administration. Texas has [spent more than $11 billion](https://substack.com/redirect/31a892ab-6c6d-4f06-b6d7-acf27a3cfc97?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on the effort so far; last week Abbott asked for [a full reimbursement](https://substack.com/redirect/f09d14d5-2fe3-41ab-9fe6-9763aec8a2f8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) from the federal government." [Texas Tribune](https://substack.com/redirect/8f0f7033-02cb-4a36-8527-c5e9e8474489?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

TOP NEWS "Greg Abbott orders state agencies to cooperate with Trump's deportation efforts, " Texas Tribune's Pavan Achraya -- "In a series of Wednesday, Gov. Greg Abbott ordered state agencies to cooperate with President Donald Trump 's mass deportation efforts and directed the state's criminal justice agency to that could be used for detaining and deporting undocumented migrants. The move comes just days after federal agents launched on Sunday in Texas cities including Austin, Dallas-Fort Worth and San Antonio. Since Trump returned to office earlier this month, Abbott has pledged to cooperate with the new president's efforts to curb illegal border crossings and remove undocumented immigrants from the country. Abbott said he ordered state agencies to work with the Trump administration to "investigate, arrest, detain, and deport illegal immigrants in Texas." The orders also direct state agencies to assist federal agents in securing the U.S.-Mexico border, share intelligence information on drug cartels with federal law enforcement and work with the federal government to "deploy any physical infrastructure to improve operational security at the southern border." "For the past four years, Texas has worked around-the-clock to defend our southern border while former President Joe Biden refused to protect our country from an invasion he allowed," Abbott said in a Wednesday release. "Now, we have a Commander-in-Chief in the White House who will do what is necessary to protect Americans." Throughout his presidential campaign, Trump promised to launch the in U.S. history by using the military and working with local law enforcement agencies. Trump sent some troops to the border shortly after taking office and Abbott 400 Texas National Guard troops to the border Monday. Abbott launched a border security initiative dubbed in 2021 shortly after Biden took office and sent state troopers and National Guard members to the border to address a rise in border crossings he blamed on the Biden administration. Texas has on the effort so far; last week Abbott asked for from the federal government." FREE SUBSCRIPTIONS HAVE ENDED : As of July 11, 2022, we have moved to a paywall for free subscribers. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Unacceptable
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

President Trump halted federal funding for public loans and aid, throwing programs like Head Start and Medicaid into chaos as states and non-profits were locked out of their payment systems.

It’s unacceptable.

Congress allocates funding, not the president. Trump has no power to suspend these funds, and holding them hostage is unconstitutional.

https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1884318316510208094 [https://x.com/RoKhanna/status/1884318316510208094]

This is worse than Project 2025.

Suspending this funding will devastate middle- and working-class families, including:

* 72 million Medicaid recipients;
* 20 million children receiving free or reduced-price school meals;
* 10 million people using rental assistance; and
* 800,00 students in Head Start programs.

We need to keep fighting back against Trump’s radical agenda.

Thank you for your support, your activism, and everything you do.

– Ro

Wait! One more thing–

Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.

If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

| | Dear Fellow Conservative, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when doctors at Kaiser Permanente fast-tracked her into "transitioning" from a girl to a boy. Chloe was given weekly testosterone injections.She was given experimental drugs used to chemically castrate sex offenders.And finally, at age 15, doctors removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.These doctors never once told Chloe's parents that roughly 80% of kids suffering from "gender dysphoria" grow out of it by the end of puberty......or about the horrifying, life-long side effects of these experimental treatments and mutilating surgeries.**Chloe Cole and hundreds of children like her have been used as lab rats by the gender industrial complex.** It's horrifying. But today you can help me stop this from happening by completing the**[Informed Citizens Survey on Transgender Ideology:](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d359e2f025d5405796c7a9714ea2ba2b&_e=5w-RXE0sjX9z5SLgNDXCkt8buLTdcroG8sqLimuv-zR5rA5n87Hj390qmRArxbsYEMrUCA-UAGaRHExpRaOoj_0nbev4fq3oAC6MJt-lJmhtQ9-HybIGzXelK1F5S5Z5_IvJE91V-nQeZRbMLuxWPlxBPDYIeFFWS-9fSupXQNeSrEbunx_sEwkNzto9x_qApwhZE-2ZigYl_wrjl4P0F7FXyfKiIDYoaykYhykRFU7ezUzXL3t0fjt6jCdba2YjdyjVOrR7RAmPQNcXkIyOVDS7bJGQKTjieISgnQjyTHpgUopUu0yWdaCX7ivokzDY8cuinEGLXqaY-4fwaC9y-LNByBlJ-n_X-IwED-EDQhOzWxfETTVcGCFmmDbYD3d1UGX-_k5JSy9E3AaUQ1tW_bQ3hjBprc5zqfiktbRydEYs-j7bgBHuHrX5JNLiFuaP)**

[](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d359e2f025d5405796c7a9714ea2ba2b&_e=5w-RXE0sjX9z5SLgNDXCkt8buLTdcroG8sqLimuv-zR5rA5n87Hj390qmRArxbsYEMrUCA-UAGaRHExpRaOoj_0nbev4fq3oAC6MJt-lJmhtQ9-HybIGzXelK1F5S5Z5_IvJE91V-nQeZRbMLuxWPlxBPDYIeFFWS-9fSupXQNeSrEbunx_sEwkNzto9x_qApwhZE-2ZigYl_wrjl4P0F7FXyfKiIDYoaykYhykRFU7ezUzXL3t0fjt6jCdba2YjdyjVOrR7RAmPQNcXkIyOVDS7bJGQKTjieISgnQjyTHoaGQaZbtRMN1lNngFcDLh1ZBZyrONthVtw7BQaageBk7r7DZSjmb8TrsGWvkd57sNtq_45cZsQzcP4EZgkHuPIOTcnDUnxrOhOKlrFnJJQz_AU7uM9qof0FMWBca2YkTxjXaR1xGp-3H34jQDT4HQo)

My name is Mark Trammell and I'm the General Counsel and Executive Director of the Center for American Liberty -- the non-profit law firm leading the charge to defend the rights of parents, children, and families to SAY NO to the transgender agenda.As the father of two young children -- a girl and a boy -- I'm very concerned about how deep the radical transgender ideology is infiltrating our country. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- it's everywhere. That's why I'm so proud the Center for American Liberty represents Chloe Cole and two other girls in their legal battles against the doctors and hospitals that mutilated them without informed consent.We also represent parents whose children have been secretly "socially transitioned" at school. Our cases are at various stages of the legal process. But we've already won a major parental rights case in California and have another pending on appeal at the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. And while President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he can't change state and local policies like California's 2024 law that bans school districts from passing parental notification laws when their child begins using different pronouns at school. That's why I'm seeking 1,000 patriots from each state to complete the **[**Informed Citizens Survey on Transgender Ideology**](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d359e2f025d5405796c7a9714ea2ba2b&_e=5w-RXE0sjX9z5SLgNDXCkt8buLTdcroG8sqLimuv-zR5rA5n87Hj390qmRArxbsYEMrUCA-UAGaRHExpRaOoj_0nbev4fq3oAC6MJt-lJmhtQ9-HybIGzXelK1F5S5Z5_IvJE91V-nQeZRbMLuxWPlxBPDYIeFFWS-9fSupXQNeSrEbunx_sEwkNzto9x_qApwhZE-2ZigYl_wrjl4P0F7FXyfKiIDYoaykYhykRFU7ezUzXL3t0fjt6jCdba2YjdyjVOrR7RAmPQNcXkIyOVDS7bJGQKTjieISgnQjyTHpDGRY__L4JWCJgiZsZMk1egvSNBJEo7jbW1RQqkeGPEdeLqaYCYDkGMSsg_CDHmIgsRaBJjm0yfk5o5eiU8x05dbYJxFPBeJ1kHeXPfh-1ICJsYmD8YwAFSP3pyAdQzWQcp4eG_bnusNQxQ8zve-vp)** today. As a non-profit organization, the Center for American Liberty does not receive a dime from the government. And we don't have the deep pockets of the ACLU. That's why it's critical we reach more Americans with the truth about radical transgender ideology -- and what your rights are. In fact, we rely on the support of grassroots American patriots like you to power our efforts inside the courtroom -- from fighting the gender industrial complex to protecting your constitutional rights.So, after completing the survey, I pray you'll make a tax-deductible donation to help us win critical cases on behalf of Chloe Cole and so many others. No matter what, I'm counting on you to help by sharing your opinion in the [**Informed Citizens Survey on Transgender Ideology..**.](http://links.conservativeum.com/u/click?_t=26c2e4aa9bbe40418f61e26972138f21&_m=d359e2f025d5405796c7a9714ea2ba2b&_e=5w-RXE0sjX9z5SLgNDXCkt8buLTdcroG8sqLimuv-zR5rA5n87Hj390qmRArxbsYEMrUCA-UAGaRHExpRaOoj_0nbev4fq3oAC6MJt-lJmhtQ9-HybIGzXelK1F5S5Z5_IvJE91V-nQeZRbMLuxWPlxBPDYIeFFWS-9fSupXQNeSrEbunx_sEwkNzto9x_qApwhZE-2ZigYl_wrjl4P0F7FXyfKiIDYoaykYhykRFU7ezUzXL3t0fjt6jCdba2YjdyjVOrR7RAmPQNcXkIyOVDS7bJGQKTjieISgnQjyTHr2N_QP77buTOIBRYxfRoDlCZ7xqVuxVNnIVNL-kdKVDnWdsUC2aw4SapKvbfmkGnflQYsz87pAA-wdMYwJcC1IKpgfed5GcwRItmpcTuLN9zpmNHTzaDcYLb6OJv-GiBFOnhAWS_LfCxFk_GDBUjyg) To protect children from the radical transgender ideology, we need to inform our fellow patriots and sound the alarm. And that starts today with your answers to this survey.Thank you in advance for your help.
---
| | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel

clean_body: | | | | But today you can help me stop this from happening by completing the Informed Citizens Survey on Transgender Ideology. | | | | Dear Fellow Conservative, Chloe Cole was just 13 years old when doctors at Kaiser Permanente fast-tracked her into "transitioning" from a girl to a boy. Chloe was given weekly testosterone injections.She was given experimental drugs used to chemically castrate sex offenders.And finally, at age 15, doctors removed Chloe's healthy breasts in a radical double mastectomy.These doctors never once told Chloe's parents that roughly 80% of kids suffering from "gender dysphoria" grow out of it by the end of puberty......or about the horrifying, life-long side effects of these experimental treatments and mutilating surgeries.Chloe Cole and hundreds of children like her have been used as lab rats by the gender industrial complex. It's horrifying. But today you can help me stop this from happening by completing the My name is Mark Trammell and I'm the General Counsel and Executive Director of the Center for American Liberty -- the non-profit law firm leading the charge to defend the rights of parents, children, and families to SAY NO to the transgender agenda.As the father of two young children -- a girl and a boy -- I'm very concerned about how deep the radical transgender ideology is infiltrating our country. From the classroom to social media and seemingly innocuous children’s television shows -- it's everywhere. That's why I'm so proud the Center for American Liberty represents Chloe Cole and two other girls in their legal battles against the doctors and hospitals that mutilated them without informed consent.We also represent parents whose children have been secretly "socially transitioned" at school. Our cases are at various stages of the legal process. But we've already won a major parental rights case in California and have another pending on appeal at the Ninth Circuit Court of Appeals. And while President Trump has directed the federal government to recognize only two sexes -- male and female... ...he can't change state and local policies like California's 2024 law that bans school districts from passing parental notification laws when their child begins using different pronouns at school. That's why I'm seeking 1,000 patriots from each state to complete the today. As a non-profit organization, the Center for American Liberty does not receive a dime from the government. And we don't have the deep pockets of the ACLU. That's why it's critical we reach more Americans with the truth about radical transgender ideology -- and what your rights are. In fact, we rely on the support of grassroots American patriots like you to power our efforts inside the courtroom -- from fighting the gender industrial complex to protecting your constitutional rights.So, after completing the survey, I pray you'll make a tax-deductible donation to help us win critical cases on behalf of Chloe Cole and so many others. No matter what, I'm counting on you to help by sharing your opinion in the To protect children from the radical transgender ideology, we need to inform our fellow patriots and sound the alarm. And that starts today with your answers to this survey.Thank you in advance for your help. | | Sincerely,Mark Trammell Executive Director & General Counsel | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization fighting against growing anti-free speech and anti-civil liberties trends. © The Center for American Liberty | PO Box 200942, Pittsburgh, PA 15251 | |

Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
