clean_body: | = Peter, The new year has already presented many challenges – from the devastating wildfires close to home to Republicans taking control of Congress and the White House. And while it might seem far off, especially after the inauguration and Trump’s flurry of executive orders, I’m keeping a close eye on 2026. As a reminder, we were one of the few Democratic campaigns to flip a House seat from red to blue in a difficult election year – and we did with just over 2.5% of the vote. That makes us an early target for national Republicans. We’re preparing right now to protect this seat as extremists look to expand their grip on Congress. You helped us make history last cycle, and it’s essential that this team sticks together if we’re going to do it again. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you, George | = = = George has spent his career solving problems. Hey team,
While the Economist is publishing gross articles like this...
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101254472/525377398/-1227073690?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmI5YjY5My0zNGRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Cv4I6_iYDxio_zboN8UPzIRTNRKdOML34TgNbIcc9c=&emci=50331744-26df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=6fb9b693-34df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=6787172)
...Whole Foods workers in Philadelphia just won the first Whole Foods union under Amazon!
If this doesn’t seem like a big deal, let us break it down for you:
**Since Amazon bought Whole Foods, workers have lost out on benefits and wage increases.** While Amazon has been fighting to keep its warehouse employees under its thumb, Whole Foods workers are standing strong and organizing under the United Food and Commercial Workers union.
The fight for workers’ rights isn’t slowing down. In fact, it’s only ramping up!
The PRO Act is our best bet at defending workers’ rights. If it gets passed, the PRO Act would restore the right to join a union and help workers negotiate safer workplace conditions, higher wages, and better benefits.
[Send a message directly to Congress demanding that they pass the PRO Act and defend workers’ rights!](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101254473/525377399/1501809665?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTkcvMS81NjE1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmI5YjY5My0zNGRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-Cv4I6_iYDxio_zboN8UPzIRTNRKdOML34TgNbIcc9c=&emci=50331744-26df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=6fb9b693-34df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=6787172)

Donald Trump just fired pro-union NLRB General Counsel Jennifer Abruzzo AND NLRB Board Member Gwynne Wilcox. That only makes it harder for workers to fight back and win when bosses break the law.
**That’s why we have to use this critical moment to put pressure directly on Congress to use their authority to protect workers.**
[It only takes a second to send a message to Congress. body:
HELP DEMS WIN TWO HOUSE SEATS IN FLORIDA >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Peter, we’ve just received breaking news out of Florida:
Governor Ron DeSantis has officially called on the Secretary of State to schedule TWO special elections on a RAPIDLY accelerated timeline.
To put it simply: Democrats now have a limited time to prepare to win TWO MORE HOUSE SEATS being vacated by Trump cabinet appointments
These special elections will determine the future of FL-01 , vacated by Matt Gaetz (reportedly stepping up as Trump’s pick for Attorney General), and FL-06 , soon to be left by Mike Waltz (rumored to become Trump’s National Security Advisor).
Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?express_lane=true&refcode=111724_1&amount=5]

Make no mistake: DeSantis and his allies are trying to fast-track these elections to catch Democrats off guard.
They know they need to secure these seats quickly to maintain their MAGA control of Congress.
We CANNOT let them get away with it!
Chip in NOW so we can have a stash of funds ready to go when Democrats put up a candidate for these seats >>> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]
Thanks for taking action,

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. name: Charlie Kirk, TPUSA
subject: We’re going to win the American Culture War
body:
What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point’s AMERICAFEST

| | | [](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B4Mu39V7mSNUFD-hvjTkzg~~/AARclBA~/ixUFTKVTHICOWdWGVhZb9I2YesLdfyTXxK3dCc9LLcZ3ygJSwsz6igawMVcXzqEYQnGd7_hC_KZP-19SoCoenmMV__BAYBVkT35SlrmGp10g3N6e1U4q8W4lO3IAvnuxCgBqH_Y-ZLU-7OEWhSKu9IGR6FK2cwYR2AReWwdoGorIB0Prs_-kwETsD6oNrUSgaOVfybrwjJsLX54F3MalMw~~)
---
Fellow American, What an honor to welcome President DONALD TRUMP as the keynote speaker at Turning Point's AMERICAFEST, the biggest and boldest celebration of our country and our freedoms! Fellow American, thanks to YOU, thousands of young people have been inspired by the President's message of FREEDOM, PATRIOTISM, and AMERICAN GREATNESS... **... and the Turning Point Generation -- as I call these high school and college students -- are leading MASSIVE GENERATIONAL CHANGE among young people.**
---
[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B4Mu39V7mSNUFD-hvjTkzg~~/AARclBA~/ixUFTKVTHICOWdWGVhZb9I2YesLdfyTXxK3dCc9LLcZ3ygJSwsz6igawMVcXzqEYQnGd7_hC_KZP-19SoCoenmMV__BAYBVkT35SlrmGp10g3N6e1U4q8W4lO3IAvnuxCgBqH_Y-ZLU-7OEWhSKu9IGR6FK2cwYR2AReWwdoGorIB0Prs_-kwETsD6oNrUSgaOVfybrwjJsLX54F3MalMw~~)
---
To celebrate this PRO-AMERICA MOMENTUM, I wanted to send you a LIMITED EDITION "47" hat to honor our 47th president: DONALD TRUMP. _**[_**All I ask for in return is a gift of ANY amount to help Turning Point USA inspire MILLIONS MORE kids to LOVE AMERICA again in the year ahead!**_](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B4Mu39V7mSNUFD-hvjTkzg~~/AARclBA~/ixUFTKVTHICOWdWGVhZb9I2YesLdfyTXxK3dCc9LLcZ3ygJSwsz6igawMVcXzqEYQnGd7_hC_KZP-19SoCoenmMV__BAYBVkT35SlrmGp10g3N6e1U4q8W4lO3IAvnuxCgBqH_Y-ZLU-7OEWhSKu9IGR6FK2cwYR2AReWwdoGorIB0Prs_-kwETsD6oNrUSgaOVfybrwjJsLX54F3MalMw~~)**_

[ **Make your gift & claim your "47" hat!**](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B4Mu39V7mSNUFD-hvjTkzg~~/AARclBA~/ixUFTKVTHICOWdWGVhZb9I2YesLdfyTXxK3dCc9LLcZ3ygJSwsz6igawMVcXzqEYQnGd7_hC_KZP-19SoCoenmMV__BAYBVkT35SlrmGp10g3N6e1U4q8W4lO3IAvnuxCgBqH_Y-ZLU-7OEWhSKu9IGR6FK2cwYR2AReWwdoGorIB0Prs_-kwETsD6oNrUSgaOVfybrwjJsLX54F3MalMw~~)

[](https://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/B4Mu39V7mSNUFD-hvjTkzg~~/AARclBA~/ixUFTKVTHICOWdWGVhZb9I2YesLdfyTXxK3dCc9LLcZ3ygJSwsz6igawMVcXzqEYQnGd7_hC_KZP-19SoCoenmMV__BAYBVkT35SlrmGp10g3N6e1U4q8W4lO3IAvnuxCgBqH_Y-ZLU-7OEWhSKu9IGR6FK2cwYR2AReWwdoGorIB0Prs_-kwETsD6oNrUSgaOVfybrwjJsLX54F3MalMw~~)
---
Thanks to generous patriots like YOU, Turning Point USA:
* **Leads the BIGGEST and MOST IMPACTFUL patriotic student movement** in American history, with 820,000+ student activists in ALL 50 states,

| Peter, just a few weeks into Donald Trump’s second presidency, we’re already witnessing attacks on the major progress we’ve made these past four years. Be it rescinding a Biden-era executive order lowering prescription drug costs for everyday Americans or directing the Department of Justice to investigate his political opponents, Trump’s Project 2025 is in full swing — and we have to fight back. Here in Georgia, that means re-electing Jon Ossoff next year and taking back control of the Senate to issue a critical check on Trump’s power, but we can’t do it alone. [This Friday, we’re facing our first major deadline since Donald Trump was inaugurated, and as we’re writing this, we’re just 34% to our goal of $30,000. Hey Peter, it’s Ritchie.

I recently sent over a poll on the No Kings Act to gauge where voters (like you!) stand — **and I’m still waiting on your response.**

We have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support: [**If you could take 1 minute to complete this poll, I would really appreciate it! »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101257647/525387610/1821162934?refcode=RTFC_20250130_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTk5Yzk0Zi0zYWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QaPI_FjNKnuLEkRZYqamDqT7KvdjTR1XYeQp614URw=&emci=f5ca6659-2bdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=7a99c94f-3adf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=34594689) | [CLICK HERE TO TAKE THE NO KINGS ACT POLL »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101257648/525387611/1821162934?refcode=RTFC_20250130_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTk5Yzk0Zi0zYWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QaPI_FjNKnuLEkRZYqamDqT7KvdjTR1XYeQp614URw=&emci=f5ca6659-2bdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=7a99c94f-3adf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=34594689)

Thank you so much,
_Ritchie_

(You can read my original message below.)
**Peter, in July, the Supreme Court ruled in _Trump vs. the United States_ that Presidents and Vice Presidents, from here on out, will have unlimited authority and immunity from prosecution.** _I don’t have to tell you how dangerous this could be, Peter!_

**In September, Senator Chuck Schumer introduced the _No Kings Act_ in response** to ensure that no President is above the law, because no one — much less the President of the United States — should be free from accountability or consequences.

**But in November, Trump won the presidency...** and with it, immunity and unchecked authority.

Now, we have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support:
[**That’s why I need to know, Peter: Do you support the No Kings Act?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101257649/525387612/1821162934?refcode=RTFC_20250130_EMPOLL_E1_T0_NS_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3YTk5Yzk0Zi0zYWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0QaPI_FjNKnuLEkRZYqamDqT7KvdjTR1XYeQp614URw=&emci=f5ca6659-2bdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=7a99c94f-3adf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=34594689)

Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in.

clean_body: | = Hey Peter, it’s Ritchie. I recently sent over a poll on the No Kings Act to gauge where voters (like you!) stand — and I’m still waiting on your response. We have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support: | Thank you so much, Ritchie (You can read my original message below.) Peter, in July, the Supreme Court ruled in Trump vs. the United States that Presidents and Vice Presidents, from here on out, will have unlimited authority and immunity from prosecution. I don’t have to tell you how dangerous this could be, Peter! In September, Senator Chuck Schumer introduced the No Kings Act in response to ensure that no President is above the law, because no one — much less the President of the United States — should be free from accountability or consequences. But in November, Trump won the presidency... and with it, immunity and unchecked authority. Now, we have limited time to act on the No Kings Act and stop Presidents from becoming above the law — but we need massive public support: Thank you for your response, — Ritchie | | Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458 www.torres.nyc Ritchie Torres represents the future of the Democratic Party. Raised by a single mother in public housing, Ritchie personally understands the hardships that working families endure. At age 25, Ritchie made history as the youngest elected official to serve on the New York City Council. He fought tirelessly for the working families of The Bronx, and now, he's fighting for those families and for progressive values in Congress. He is the first openly gay Afro Latino ever elected to Congress. Ritchie is a champion for progressive policies to fight poverty and to improve the lives of families just like the one he was raised in. Peter, please, consider making a =. name: campaign@keithellison.org
subject: Keith has our back, Peter
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

Our first end-of-month deadline of the year is tomorrow at 11:59 pm. We need your support to close our fundraising gap and keep our budget on track.

You’re eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program, so you can donate $75 (or $150 for couples) to our campaign and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Peter, will you make your fully refundable $75 donation right now to help us reach our first big fundraising goal of the year?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?refcode=other]

We have an incredibly tough fight ahead of us, Peter. Donald Trump is back in the White House, and he’s pushing extreme and dangerous policies that threaten Minnesotans’ rights and freedoms.

We know that Keith will always have our back, no matter what challenges come our way. But to make sure we’re able to have his, we need a powerful surge of support right now.

Make your refundable $75 donation by 11:59 pm tomorrow to help our team stay on track and push back against Trump’s damaging agenda.

Thank you,

Team Keith

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250130ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

Prepared and paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
Keith Ellison for Attorney General
PO Box 17224
Minneapolis, MN 55417
United States

body:
Texas Organizing Project (TOP) PAC’s aim is to further push the state toward a progressive future that will deliver substantive change and shift more power into the hands of Black and Latino Texans. # [#]
Hi Peter,

We reached out yesterday to tell you about our January end-of-month fundraising deadline and $3,000 fundraising goal. If you’d like, you can pitch in before Friday with a donation of any amount right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25]

But if you need convincing, here’s exactly what’s on the line. Donald Trump has only been in office for a little over a week, but he’s already damaging our country and sowing chaos. To name just three of his despicable executive orders:

❌ Trump has moved to end birthright citizenship in an executive order that stands in DIRECT opposition to the 14th Amendment.
❌ Trump has called to eliminate certain environmental justice programs that protect low-income, Black, and Latino Americans.
❌ Trump is terminating all diversity, equity, and inclusion programs across the federal government — impacting thousands of federal jobs.

We’re fighting back against the Trump regime, but we need YOUR support to do so. Can you pitch in just $7 towards our end-of-month fundraising push today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/top-em-jan25?amount=7]

If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Fellow American,

We’re not even one month into 2025, and I already have my first Democrat opponent for what will be one of the most contested Senate races of 2026. Now I’m just 36 hours away from my first deadline of 2025.

My Democrat opponent, backed by Chuck Schumer, is poised to raise millions to flip this seat and end our Republican Majority.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: If the past 10 days have shown us anything
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project Logo [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013025_2&amount=25]
2025 has been a handful so far folks. Thankfully we have opportunities on the horizon to fight back for our fundamental rights.
There are upcoming elections in Virginia, New York, New Jersey, Wisconsin, Florida, and more.
This whirlwind of executive orders, legislation, and court cases showcase why we must do the work to connect with voters every day, not just during the time people consider to be “election season.” There are no “off years” in our fight for voting rights.
We must provide voters with resources to help them plan to vote, access sample ballots, find their polling locations, and learn what they need to make their voice heard. We’re counting on your help to reach as many people as we can to help stem this tide.
Team, will you pitch in $22 (our average donation) to fuel our efforts? We have to pull out all the stops to inform and turn out voters across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013025_2&amount=25]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013025_2&amount=15]
GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013025_2&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013025_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013025_2&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=013025_2&amount=250]
Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=013025_2&amount=35]
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013025_2&amount=25 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013025_2&amount=25]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013025_2&amount=25]
Donate Now [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-weekly?refcode=013025_2&amount=25]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

name: JAMIE RASKIN ANNOUNCEMENT (via Raja Krishnamoorthi)
subject: Jamie Raskin’s STUNNING announcement
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Raja for Congress
body:
Please stop what you’re doing and read this, Peter: Jamie Raskin just called on every single one of us to step up and mobilize for this next election cycle. He knows Trump and Republicans are going to pour millions of dollars into these upcoming special elections, and he knows it’s going to take all of us banding together to lead Democrats to victory. Before my first End of Month Deadline in 24 hours: I need 1,092 gifts to mobilize our Democrats and make Jamie proud. Will you rush $14 to answer Jamie’s call? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]

FIRST: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Jamie fought tirelessly with me on the Oversight Committee to PROTECT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] our Democracy and hold Donald Trump accountable.

BUT THEN: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Mike Johnson spent $141 MILLION [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14] to buy back the House Majority and put Donald Trump back in the White House.

AND NOW: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/raja-email-2025?amount=14]
Jamie just called on all of us to step up and fight back against Trump’s extreme agenda:

name: Senator Vincent Hughes
subject: Important Update! REAL ID Enforcement Begins May 7, 2025
body:
If you are having trouble viewing this message or would like to share it on a social network, you can [view the message online](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?gpiv=2100169387.172902.26&gen=1).
| Share On | [](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=share&piv=2100169387.172902.26&snid=2)
---|---
[](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169387.172902.26&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13439)
## Important Update!
## REAL ID Enforcement Begins May 7, 2025
Starting May 7, 2025, REAL ID will be required for certain activities. Here's what you need to know:

_What Do I Need a REAL ID For?_
* Boarding domestic flights
* Entering federal buildings or other locations requiring ID
* Accessing military bases

_How Much Does it Cost?_
* A one-time fee of **$30**
* Renewal fee of **$30.50** for four-year non-commercial driver's license or photo ID

_What You 'll Need to Apply: _
* **Proof of Identity:** Birth Certificate or valid passport
* Social Security Card
* **Two Proofs of Current Address** : Recent utility bill, bank statement, or unexpired PA license/ID
* **Proof of Name Charges (if applicable)** : Marriage certificate, divorce document, or court order

**Note:** A REAL ID is **not required** to drive, vote, receive federal benefits, access hospitals, or visit the post office. For more details and resources, visit [Pennsylvania Senate Democrats REAL ID Information](http://enews.senatorhughes.com/mail/util.cfm?mailaction=clickthru&gpiv=2100169387.172902.26&gen=1&mailing_linkid=13440). Don't wait - prepare for the change today! As always, if you need help with the process, please don't hesitate to contact my district office at 215-879-7777.
| Offices of Senator Vincent Hughes

Philadelphia, PA 19131

name: Gay Valimont
subject: Stand with Us Against Educational Censorship.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gay Valimont Gay Valimont For Congress
body:
| | |
---
**Trump aims to restrict the teaching of critical race theory and gender studies in K-12 schools, threatening to withhold federal funds from institutions that include these topics in their curricula.** Hello from Gay Valimont, Democratic candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, and I firmly oppose these measures. Our classrooms should be spaces that encourage critical thinking, inclusivity, and a comprehensive understanding of our nation's history and diversity. Censoring educational content deprives our students of essential knowledge and undermines the principles of academic freedom. **Will you help me before special elections roll out to ensure our students are not fed politics?**
---
---
Our campaign is dedicated to promoting an education system that embraces diversity, equity, and inclusion. We believe that students should learn in environments that reflect the rich tapestry of our society and encourage them to think critically about complex issues.
---
**[We need your support. Your contribution of $7 will help us advocate for educational policies that uphold academic freedom and prepare our students for a diverse world. clean_body: | | | Trump aims to restrict the teaching of critical race theory and gender studies in K-12 schools, threatening to withhold federal funds from institutions that include these topics in their curricula. Hello from Gay Valimont, Democratic candidate for Florida’s 1st Congressional District, and I firmly oppose these measures. Our classrooms should be spaces that encourage critical thinking, inclusivity, and a comprehensive understanding of our nation's history and diversity. Censoring educational content deprives our students of essential knowledge and undermines the principles of academic freedom. Will you help me before special elections roll out to ensure our students are not fed politics? Our campaign is dedicated to promoting an education system that embraces diversity, equity, and inclusion. We believe that students should learn in environments that reflect the rich tapestry of our society and encourage them to think critically about complex issues. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = Ensure that our education system remains a place of learning, growth, and opportunity for all. # You're Invited - Nancy Mace
in Myrtle Beach, SC Tomorrow Night!
---
| **Did you hear?!**

Congresswoman Nancy Mace announced she is considering a run for **Governor of South Carolina in 2026. **

Congresswoman Mace will visit Myrtle Beach for the first time since making her announcement. She will speak at the Myrtle Beach Republican Women’s event on Friday, January 31st. During her remarks, she’ll reflect on the first two weeks of Trump’s presidency and share her vision for South Carolina’s future.

**When:** Friday, January 31st
**Time:** 4:45 PM
**Where:** 357 Raw Coastal Bar.
8205 Marina Pkwy, Myrtle Beach, SC 29572

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: We’re running out of time
body:
Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ef13cf3d97294b119a575fcf2289d0bd&_e=7QR-IjnBuZLd0CX9Ig-210aR7j6CCrP4LZhPwtfxTr2cEB4_1hgnpBgc9J2Y7KjtvZDKiMg7c8CBFran0QBjH8CFzh2UOnVFdtt-h_ZEfQ90pjlTR36fOAwdC15gzXAjk7-YTdrs_ihaIT2wvzOaCmW9rlNkWkYfO-rU73Uhl1AK1RMFONe4rH9VMviiQDUVKmgDjuO-o0MWLdL9rTGWo72KVP5jTpUx6lP0qIp-8tMMl9BngsQ4LRp-NxQ6NKCCvmSbBQXOK75T9qs8ushe9xV1iTx-2-HQ62pFF4TINCVz6xD3RkJttJ--j6JYnulOfC7_r-4VajECVN9RbOCG1yYG_l8LbEN8pFY-KfblctXMiVM0EP2wIJ98t6cbpMNc)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ef13cf3d97294b119a575fcf2289d0bd&_e=7QR-IjnBuZLd0CX9Ig-210aR7j6CCrP4LZhPwtfxTr2cEB4_1hgnpBgc9J2Y7KjtvZDKiMg7c8CBFran0QBjH8CFzh2UOnVFdtt-h_ZEfQ90pjlTR36fOAwdC15gzXAjk7-YTdrs_ihaIT2wvzOaCmW9rlNkWkYfO-rU73Uhl1AK1RMFONe4rH9VMviiQDUVKmgDjuO-o0MWLdL9rTGWo72KVP5jTpUx6lP0qIp-8tORclJ2PQMgKZ0jnmGtMy3DkxyLwBPxLm-twiG1w7tNr96WrVvBV00-uswJb5Fas24k_INlAS1TrAmIJgHahOcSx-GLdxb-s-rlhKQfhg7n_8l8ksGK9KSGZ6wWZTPTgJeh1fEHkWAUbtV_EKUwgXrz)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ef13cf3d97294b119a575fcf2289d0bd&_e=7QR-IjnBuZLd0CX9Ig-210aR7j6CCrP4LZhPwtfxTr2cEB4_1hgnpBgc9J2Y7KjtvZDKiMg7c8CBFran0QBjH8CFzh2UOnVFdtt-h_ZEfQ90pjlTR36fOAwdC15gzXAjk7-YTdrs_ihaIT2wvzOaCmW9rlNkWkYfO-rU73Uhl1AK1RMFONe4rH9VMviiQDUVKmgDjuO-o0MWLdL9rTGWo72KVP5jTpUx6lP0qIp-8tPcepK1dAJiXhUDSbmJE46vxqR2pBhpirrQ9ZPedAQa7RnH_NTE-RNCrektlboub8rvOT6YXSK468ezzWDP7QyoA703LaDT6dXTKox6DBumFdiHl69iFqyL6APIFvFk5bBJ9L0s-JhhlT7SQHucqdmG)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in just days and the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ef13cf3d97294b119a575fcf2289d0bd&_e=7QR-IjnBuZLd0CX9Ig-210aR7j6CCrP4LZhPwtfxTr2cEB4_1hgnpBgc9J2Y7KjtvZDKiMg7c8CBFran0QBjH8CFzh2UOnVFdtt-h_ZEfQ90pjlTR36fOAwdC15gzXAjk7-YTdrs_ihaIT2wvzOaCmW9rlNkWkYfO-rU73Uhl1AK1RMFONe4rH9VMviiQDUVKmgDjuO-o0MWLdL9rTGWo72KVP5jTpUx6lP0qIp-8tOxkDI193s__JE8jznD8qhK0ArcbYqPrqsQqqVAeeQA7NMb2HWyE9yKsgvfdLGmhO3SdaNs9CxmZW9Izk2fchltjgMBhpfTivCD9W7vhKR3vsMsf0V52ltqce313ezC9djuP-W1mZARbtMCjZh-C-Se)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ef13cf3d97294b119a575fcf2289d0bd&_e=7QR-IjnBuZLd0CX9Ig-210aR7j6CCrP4LZhPwtfxTr2cEB4_1hgnpBgc9J2Y7KjtvZDKiMg7c8CBFran0QBjH8CFzh2UOnVFdtt-h_ZEfQ90pjlTR36fOAwdC15gzXAjk7-YTdrs_ihaIT2wvzOaCmW9rlNkWkYfO-rU73Uhl1AK1RMFONe4rH9VMviiQDUVKmgDjuO-o0MWLdL9rTGWo72KVP5jTpUx6lP0qIp-8tP_emCyGqLONEWtJ2PdaTuNkSnwFr9E6Nah8YdpUNWYPNVnN3_Uw6sHa4UgRwTNmCANdkDMczxoKvb5aAFqmhxB5mGAssdP4JKEOHpduXCAcRNXjhMBSIzbp3Ue0t9q62Fnq-zm87Fj5tf1nQ870SiM) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,

Lacy Lunsford

clean_body: Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s. | | Dear Peter,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for 11 years. Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys. Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a Soros-funded , anti-police prosecutor. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge. Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in just days and the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Lacy Lunsford | | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor! | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

# AMANDA CHASE
---
|
# VIRGINIA'S HONEY BADGER
---
|
# SESSION BEGINS AT 10am
---
| Dear Hello The General Assembly usually gavels in at noon each weekday with the exception of Fridays, when each body gavels in early, so legislators can head back home for the weekend. Many have to travel a number of hours to return home. So please be sure to tune in tomorrow at 10am, instead of noon.
As Virginia Senators finish voting on all Senate bills in committee, you will see a number of committees cancelled. This simply means that a particular committee has finished reviewing all Senate bills in the committee. Soon, all bills will be on the Senate floor for their final hearing. Senators have until midnight on Tuesday to finish up their work on Senate bills.
Tuesday is crossover. Think of this as halftime in a football game. Crossover is the last day the Senate is able to deal with Senate bills before they head to the Virginia House. After crossover, the Senate will only deal with House bills and the House will only deal with Senate bills.
Make sense?
There are many bad bills that have passed the Democrat controlled Senate and the Democrat controlled House. We're not surprised by this. All the committees are stacked to favor Democrats. So, of course the majority of their bills will pass.
Here's the part that allow me to sleep at night. Governor Glenn Youngkin can veto all but the Constitutional Amendments. Hopefully, knowing that allows you to sleep at night as well.
---
| |
---
Here are some updates from today.
Republican Senator Bill Stanley's [SB1284](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlcA_kSqMcA5VW8d1U_nU0JkubJ5t4zOuyNFUgZedWjsvQ-cva-sJ19RGhJXpnQz-KlQ65MEEI0ljlyiuxYNNgWnRDhwyVictlNt0mgOHXUExWAYQ84huYBsCowYLWCuLd1guRR14gXdE31k6VPBZpYzV_sr1INnb0121vm19o8yKLEugRnEtpea2UE8PrGW&c=p5vqE25zKfZ-F5OjKLTcnw0jMaYL0ITBXHo4gDv92etY8ZfGFS78xA==&ch=7ijzbPQPNxjpqLAFfH0jVF96nECEyR5woU_kQdlcjwgm1dDcyb9x3Q==) failed 9 to 5 on a party line vote in the Committee on Education and Health. This bill would have prohibited any terrorist organization from soliciting students to become members of their terrorist organization while on any public college campus. Unfortunately, in this day and time.
That Democrats would unanimously veto this bill is very telling of today's Democrat Party. Why would anyone, regardless of party, veto a bill to stop the recruitment of students into terrorist organizations? Why would anyone support terrorism?
To watch the debate click [here](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlcA_kSqMcA5VW8d1U_nU0JkubJ5t4zOuyNFUgZedWjsvQ-cva-sJ9rEt8t98misKicxXh8sqILE_NmP_Yk2TUZKwT85-XEgrNUufhTNo9cpTcYjSBSNHwlsdFjPDnzq6QyOnVBiz845H8USkI_uJh2Kd6NGpYnaKN3GVa_QBX5CW_s8IdmlIzaboXqgbXTXKMZwBuUkhK0tdSdCkRvNcA==&c=p5vqE25zKfZ-F5OjKLTcnw0jMaYL0ITBXHo4gDv92etY8ZfGFS78xA==&ch=7ijzbPQPNxjpqLAFfH0jVF96nECEyR5woU_kQdlcjwgm1dDcyb9x3Q==). Click on the the Committee on Education and Health for Wednesday, January 30.
Democrat Senator Srinivasan introduced[ SB1352 ](https://byh4wqwab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001dlcA_kSqMcA5VW8d1U_nU0JkubJ5t4zOuyNFUgZedWjsvQ-cva-sJ19RGhJXpnQzsrb6ob1ds06WFyHuHWVthjPV4kB-cJl-N-X0Qm58pTyAxDSK9xLmZArf1Q8uNWUoG2SBbSd7L6z12KMYKLHSzrr5qslsnsc4SMlBzJOLpcr_GI_CaPfd_NXqoHbnJFDp&c=p5vqE25zKfZ-F5OjKLTcnw0jMaYL0ITBXHo4gDv92etY8ZfGFS78xA==&ch=7ijzbPQPNxjpqLAFfH0jVF96nECEyR5woU_kQdlcjwgm1dDcyb9x3Q==)which permits licensed certified midwives who have completed 1,000 hours of practice under a licensed physician to practice independently. This bill passed unanimously on a 15-0 vote.
For more updates, simply click on the link below to search for a particular bill and check out the bill history.
Thank you in advance for staying engaged in your state government.
Have a great weekend! For God and Country, Amanda Chase

For God and Country, Amanda Chase | | | | | | | | | IMPORTANT DATES | 2025 LEGISLATIVE SESSION IMPORTANT DATES Begins: Wednesday, January 8 at noon Crossover: Tuesday, February 4 Ends: Saturday, February 22 Last Day for Governor's Actions: Monday, March 24 Reconvene: Wednesday, April 2 | IMPORTANT LINKS | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | | == | SUPPORT AMANDA HERE | While this publication is free, your contributions are greatly appreciated. As long as my costs are covered, I can continue to provide this service to you. For starters, my email service costs about $300 per month. So please help out financially if you can. I do my own research and writing. So I promise there will be typos. Thanks in advance to all of my grammar hawks for your grace regarding this. I'm currently publishing this on a voluntary basis and to help you hold your government accountable. While this is a labor of love, I do have hundreds of dollars in expense each month to bring this service to you. Any contribution is greatly appreciated to offset the cost of providing it. subject: Incompetent Trump falsely blames DEI for plane crash tragedy

Donate to RESIST racist, ableist Trump and his incompetent MAGA minions!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQshfxOMHBXLnsHYw0j60qSdRgDiMik5t7pSMY0qu0aw9THQ9bGsQR8G2U9-_AZkLFcSzgOvaKukkllACdq2W1Gjs-7JDFSjEWGWeFXWwK5zE6QAfKeBjFi1TceZF5zzQ1Wtj4ZWliPdQi1anhWp3SdeWvZhfCtH0pxJUKOunQGcPWpc0aZefP4Uf4J3UbN5HB6QE2v5L91RQcQh10bK6JwtpqMqZlgAZNswDc9MvseR21QvTX3oQ2Pfz9JN_TsIy69Se5hk0G1FdxlJ7n6X_KTAe5XgkV-YJZJsH3wCK0xT7LrumUt03Ujb863cUtFNResuZipwuPHAH8A4rFkiKiQzk/4dl/pQUvsY-OS_Ohbxq-aSFJbw/h1/h001.4ENmfL25grQi10xmzuxgrrXAI3hc7m95jDUxtWdHfGo)
* * *
What a truly outrageous spectacle to witness felon Trump immediately turn this tragic plane crash into a political circus. While people are mourning, Trump attacked people with disabilities for causing the DC plan crash, who he claims were DEI hires. How dare he! As someone with an intellectual disability, I am disgusted by his vile ableism. People with disabilities are capable, damn it! Trump's reckless words not only insult those of us who contribute to society every day, but they also reveal his complete disregard for a multicultural democracy that values every individual's potential. **This is not only outrageous but a disturbing reflection of his desperate need to scapegoat marginalized communities for his own failures.** [**We are mobilizing to TACK BACK Congress in the midterms and reclaim what is ours - an inclusive multicultural democracy. Will you chip in to help us elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsv6G13xDJkcAT3eWN2WUkZ5RZdU1bDt9STNIU2detLRXk_xEiRU5N_PG5ec77Ha8Qh9jkKzoHgDlenfIyxDNP3XkAfF25aW5oKSc_lziw9BgmCzHS995QqBWR021asyztf5x1ioQO0yfsM9WffCircz0tazN8bulXuPD4-1AbPGRFumUF-JU_EnBWvh4GcmhVoiqYaE77W_DX6YtqIb7EdpzJpho-bndyEpQGJmZh9EdflWbnhYEjSjro0Iu9C63vXQKNgJGvGDkT0eGR7B-QID_YP5rJk-2dffl4X7g-eXXA5UT56-hx0YMrsjSm6o2mhUVfInKGa-9iiJN_YnELE4/4dl/pQUvsY-OS_Ohbxq-aSFJbw/h2/h001.O9Mem0WEYvuPz3usR92607ELeXh7JGj2XT4UP9iRKJA) [****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsuACinv7O4Qklf4XmypE-q1VXBmLsuiSQMbsBzKUraEq9O5ZZi5pktp6oERprrQiTO9KySzOKoHWC2zeGvl5cWhquzArcxl5CumzQDhl2kBldbcsjYDjMlc3p3lrjVX28XFdbEWc8MbOStcRhmVUv1hS88pUAZi7SjKyqOeMiVCAaugOLPWlMoU13TAagDmHWqVP18MOT4G-a6HHBgF4QqBqKdH7OljVN-Z9PqalzF1VUAngIIBEz-MLpxvDAxJQJG4mplCZg6AVAsph8M-yMAm2fF-tYPSPS4WHZC6QUwnyImERChT5218PADUt0Y5lLH7FPBEd4-7d9EYKYuHaGFU/4dl/pQUvsY-OS_Ohbxq-aSFJbw/h3/h001.3McW8jl3Vz1wb8VAxyUuumCHCQd-CcmH730WK3jPJuo)[****](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQsrzvnublG4NQmalpPnemC9NNCo6VpjUku_tXBMW690v10M-8svsYtMHdyj2HrS2VLN8qlCcjVoosxbL905XdwYqGyU1u81fbe4mGYhorR0rvBWXyd1z_qFAr9sGPSkFBbLA912qXBtvR8mURMxf8UA-iJIpF9ATz-KgJYKr8lfThl3oww6-AKAgvqEGcbaUTfCA9lkcjKmzMADHJiWDx-6c0B6B-4hpUkVBh0JRDOt15FrXXzWJcKZ0eUI-Gow56sd-9g-fcXUhYTYxjLzh95H-WY_85bJrETq71pRt44ApIPh2w6RCsAU5a1vwFjJ6lTAPGJoRa-mMKXPon6U4Bg2o/4dl/pQUvsY-OS_Ohbxq-aSFJbw/h4/h001.NEk4ugQq0CLTieWw0Y8KV3e8zphXt0hE6I3h4P59uS8) **** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

Seriously?! No one knows what caused this tragedy yet, but our conman “president” launched a baseless blame game! HE dismantled the Aviation Security Advisory Committee, froze FAA hiring, fired TSA and Coast Guard leaders, and even let Elon Musk oust the FAA chief! **The buck stops with HIM, and yet he’s trying to shift the blame to the disability community. It’s infuriating!** [**FIGHT BACK and donate to help Able Dems elect Democrats with disabilities and our allies!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOd0KsCyQ6NLH2vKJToAIQslrhPx8FzDCUdB-l4Jjco-N7LgHdK5ODEmM6BGgSQuqUiewWpMin44Hvlfx_R74vwQa_U2ZUhCWtH_hRlrn_RMwZxxJglaCrsBAjoJnvG0l5k2IXDVdXw9BHfJQ0eH-ZSY5tPho0HnV_JP2Xg084s9DPick5vu1TmsA6f2n7KPQTiTcZzuxcikgdn9H1QNsbUiMza-D3PO0YXzfK6TCR7qRwK8JQ_X131lg79LkKpkiNvjqQeHYSmhq9Iuo_93xpD-dq8DcDPZryyKwM-r9pwSiL5w3-2lXxxkItwjvaE4-TQzqmVVKD4dKpb4MpSNS3sgAkmefw2VgXwFQ0BdUVyto/4dl/pQUvsY-OS_Ohbxq-aSFJbw/h11/h001.LcBoLTJbzCfShkmLt12ZHT3kw-fmuygnoXM9rR7Ilhs) Thanks for your support.

clean_body: | | | In the face of an airline tragedy, conman Trump exploits it to blame DEI and dodge accountability. What a truly outrageous spectacle to witness felon Trump immediately turn this tragic plane crash into a political circus. While people are mourning, Trump attacked people with disabilities for causing the DC plan crash, who he claims were DEI hires. How dare he! As someone with an intellectual disability, I am disgusted by his vile ableism. People with disabilities are capable, damn it! Trump's reckless words not only insult those of us who contribute to society every day, but they also reveal his complete disregard for a multicultural democracy that values every individual's potential. This is not only outrageous but a disturbing reflection of his desperate need to scapegoat marginalized communities for his own failures. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Rather than offering condolences or focusing on the victims of the plane crash, Trump blamed the FAA's diversity hiring plan, claiming that people with disabilities aren’t qualified. Seriously?! No one knows what caused this tragedy yet, but our conman “president” launched a baseless blame game! HE dismantled the Aviation Security Advisory Committee, froze FAA hiring, fired TSA and Coast Guard leaders, and even let Elon Musk oust the FAA chief! The buck stops with HIM, and yet he’s trying to shift the blame to the disability community. It’s infuriating!** Thanks for your support. -Jeff Person, Founder, Able Dems | elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: House GOP [Trump Cabinet Alerts]
subject: RFK Jr. needs our help to Make America Healthy Again
body:
HHS Senate Confirmation Hearings Have Begun

| | | | [](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
---
Fellow patriot, the confirmation hearings to appoint RFK Jr. as the Secretary of Health and Human Services has begun.
Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be one of the most transformative political appointees in American history.
He will **hold the government bureaucrats accountable**.
He will take action to **stop the chronic disease emergency** ravaging our country.
He will **restore integrity and transparency** to our nation’s health policies.
RFK Jr. will be President Trump’s fighter at the head of HHS to **demand the truth from government agencies** , hold public health officials to the highest standards, and put the well-being of the American people above all else.
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[MAKE AMERICA HEALTHY AGAIN](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
But none of these achievements are possible if let the Radical Left tarnish the reputation of President Trump’s cabinet nominees and apply pressure to obstruct their appointments.

We have already seen what the liberal media and special interests have done in their vicious attempts to derail the appointment of Pete Hegseth as Secretary of Defense.__
_The final vote to confirm Hegseth ended in a 50-50 tie with Vice President J.D. Vance needed to break the tie in the Senate._****
**To confirm RFK Jr. and begin the work to Make America Healthy again we cannot afford to lose a single vote.****__**
**_[That’s why we are calling on America First patriots to help us hold the line today by showing your support for RFK Jr. and contributing to the fight against the Swamp who are attempting to undermine the Trump administration](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_**.
[SUPPORT RFK JR.](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
This is our chance to reject the corruption, the lies, and the unchecked power of special interests.

The Democrats in the United States Senate need to know, beyond any doubt, the American people demand that Robert F. Kennedy Jr. will be confirmed.

They need to know that the era of appointing those that promote the status quo to run our nation’s healthcare is over.

And with your support we can help get President Trump’s choice over the finish line to finally begin a new era of accountability in public health.**__**
**_[Please, if you are able, stand with us right now and help make sure that RFK Jr. becomes our nation’s next Secretary of Health& Human Services](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)_****.**
_To Victory,_
**HOUSE GOP**
[](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)
[STAND WITH THE HOUSE GOP](https://go.vbtrb.com/r/9UUU/?__vbtrk=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNjpuZXdzbGV0dGVy&_uax=MjcyNzc1OjEwMjk5MDQwNg&ct)

name: George Latimer
subject: How far he’ll go
disclaimer_text: Paid for by George Latimer for Congress
body:
Since Donald Trump was inaugurated, we’ve seen just how far he’s willing to go over the next four years.

George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/-Phg2RhDIEGJVPbb5vK87g2?unsubscribedata=8diJX0ghuTlmPU42%2BwEcDqyLewmWsJrlj6WC3pchxiSeocAAUAiOjss44LgAm%2F6Zts9zdl6%2F5OD3mOMTak7r8GLMRDaXl79vHvHbbEJ7N4Xsum0mj0A6Ws7ZmoIhmwNg7CwjpgxN5cEDuU68lUAOhwxuudrGMGFv%2F9d6FRMMZOc0sKRcGTnkO0eW67bEC22wlE9Kx2x2Zy0a3Gdn4JnDBik6Ytu6qquMLTdyIYJiuAd58CTp87mQ0GOpmN3%2FSi0KkEntmmgA7%2BD6UUrjePuzctx%2FmC0rqQa3ZLrC5immAQxj7CRuf9wY44tTuBjXDshdGRgczxqN5D%2BpWwK%2FgWbs3oGY4Glb8mPpidyh%2BsjOc2wRu5WJP8yx5zh5DcoSWFr%2F1pG7OK1Ssu2frbK4E3N5gatGRn2gsURD5XwBv%2F%2F2ldytLqWq9hT69q6YXJoHJyUD)
---
| |
---
Peter, it’s George. Since Donald Trump was inaugurated just under two weeks ago, we’ve seen just how far he’s willing to go over the next four years. Be it his immediate attack on efforts to lower prescription drug costs for Americans or his dangerous and unprecedented pardon of the January 6th insurrectionists, it’s clear that we’ve got a long road ahead of us. But Peter, there’s also good news: **_I’m no stranger to this fight._** 12 years ago, I won a tough battle to win a seat in the State Senate in November 2012, before defeating a MAGA Republican in 2017 to become Westchester County Executive. Throughout my time as County Executive, I successfully led the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican county, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves. So rest assured, Peter, I’m committed to fighting for you and to take back the House majority. As we approach our first test of strength under the Trump administration, I need to know that you’re by my side. [Before our month-end fundraising deadline tomorrow at midnight, can I count on you to help us raise $15,000 by chipping in $10 or any amount you can today? ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101264141/525406799/1465465161?amount=10&source=SBD_GL_EM_FR_NTLNDRS_013025_1_3_EOM&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQwMzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTRiMmMwZmUtNDVkZi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=y5Vw88Eb4-czbCkNfACk7hVNRMC5-kZ9jvbP3Mqysjc=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now.

clean_body: Since Donald Trump was inaugurated, we’ve seen just how far he’s willing to go over the next four years. George Latimer is a lifelong Westchester resident who has built a career in public service by delivering unparalleled progressive results for local residents. Now, he's taking that work to the next level by running to represent New York's 16th District in Congress. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | Peter, it’s George. Since Donald Trump was inaugurated just under two weeks ago, we’ve seen just how far he’s willing to go over the next four years. Be it his immediate attack on efforts to lower prescription drug costs for Americans or his dangerous and unprecedented pardon of the January 6th insurrectionists, it’s clear that we’ve got a long road ahead of us. But Peter, there’s also good news: I’m no stranger to this fight. 12 years ago, I won a tough battle to win a seat in the State Senate in November 2012, before defeating a MAGA Republican in 2017 to become Westchester County Executive. Throughout my time as County Executive, I successfully led the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican county, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves. So rest assured, Peter, I’m committed to fighting for you and to take back the House majority. body:
|
#
Friend, I hope you're doing well and managing to catch your breath between the headlines these days. I know there’s been a lot to keep up with lately, and the last thing on your mind is making a political donation, but I want to pull back the curtain a bit and explain why your [**$3**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101264498/525407732/-1606559029?refcode=em-1.30.25-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNjFmOTJlMC00NmRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=urZhbvVFbN6Rq9JaMqofV4npRQXi4xSGGnNTzptvWAg=)** ** support is so important. Tomorrow marks our January fundraising deadline. This is our first fundraising benchmark since being sworn in, and how we perform will set the tone for the next two years. **I know it seems early to chip in, but unfortunately, House Republicans are already fundraising to expand their majority next year – and MI-08 is at the very top of their list. ** This is a Trump-won district, and we know from the last election that this will not be an easy road ahead. The good news is your support – right now – will help set us on the right foot and help us reach our January fundraising goal. [**So please, can I count on you to chip in? clean_body: | Friend, I hope you're doing well and managing to catch your breath between the headlines these days. I know there’s been a lot to keep up with lately, and the last thing on your mind is making a political donation, but I want to pull back the curtain a bit and explain why your = support is so important. Tomorrow marks our January fundraising deadline. This is our first fundraising benchmark since being sworn in, and how we perform will set the tone for the next two years. I know it seems early to chip in, but unfortunately, House Republicans are already fundraising to expand their majority next year – and MI-08 is at the very top of their list. This is a Trump-won district, and we know from the last election that this will not be an easy road ahead. The good news is your support – right now – will help set us on the right foot and help us reach our January fundraising goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | = | | = | = | | = | = ** Thank you, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

name: Tobias Read
subject: Grateful for your support
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250130em-grateful [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250130em-grateful]
The first month of my term as Oregon’s Secretary of State is coming to a close, and I am grateful to all of you for supporting me.
Thanks to you, we are already working on some of the key issues areas that matter most to this state:
1. Protecting the integrity of our elections and encouraging full participation in our representative democracy.
2. Ensuring accountability to build a more efficient, transparent, and impactful government.
3. Facilitating a healthy democracy with robust participation across the aisle and from every walk of life.
I’m not wasting time getting to work because I know our problems won’t be solved easily.
To help power my work, I’m setting a goal of raising $10,000 before midnight tomorrow, January 31. This is my first end-of-month fundraising deadline since I took office, and I need your help to reach it. Can I count on you to help me start my term on the right foot by contributing $20 or more? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250130em-grateful]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=250130em-grateful]
Thank you,
Tobias Read
P.S. Don’t forget! The Oregon Political Tax Credit allows you to donate $50 (if you file single) or $100 (if you file joint) to a candidate, PAC, or party, which will be fully credited back as a rebate — so it’s free to donate! For more information, click here. [https://www.oregon.gov/omd/ONG/Documents/SMFS/Personal%20Financial%20Counselor/Political-Tax-Credit.pdf?]

name: Team Fetterman HQ
subject: Sharing some calculations before the weekend 🤓
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
It’s a big effort to keep PA’s Senate seat 🔵
#
We’re already facing our first end-of-month deadline under the new administration, Derek — so we wanted to quickly share some calculations we did as we head into the weekend. 🤓
We’ve been crunching the numbers, and **we’re seeing that we’re going to need another 300 grassroots donations to meet our goal before tomorrow night.** We know — that’s a lot of people. 🥵 But we’ve got about 36 hours left to do it, and we think with your help we can make it.
It’s a big effort to keep PA’s Senate seat 🔵, but that’s why we want to be honest with you about what it takes to get there every step of the way.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250130?refcode=em20250130-9846&refcode2=9846_434096_VIKuC7&akid=9846%2E434096%2EVIKuC7)
Because math is math, Derek. And this is exactly what we need to do to meet our goal. And as we run the numbers, we wanted to show you what we came across when your record popped up.👇
**Derek's Official Team Fetterman Record** **Email:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2025 Donor:** No — not yet! **Suggested Donation: $5** **[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250130?amount=5&refcode=em20250130-9846&refcode2=9846_434096_VIKuC7&akid=9846%2E434096%2EVIKuC7)**
---
On behalf of John and our entire campaign, we’re so grateful for the support you’ve shown so far. We all know that John’s in the Senate thanks to our uniquely dedicated online supporters, and we can’t thank you enough.
John's refused to take a penny from corporate PACs or the shady special interests. _But that also means we’re relying on online supporters like you in an especially big way._
[**Can we count on your support ahead of tomorrow’s end-of-month fundraising deadline? If you’re in a place to do so, please make an online contribution to John’s campaign for U.S. Senate today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250130?refcode=em20250130-9846&refcode2=9846_434096_VIKuC7&akid=9846%2E434096%2EVIKuC7)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20250130?amount=5&refcode=em20250130-9846&refcode2=9846_434096_VIKuC7&akid=9846%2E434096%2EVIKuC7)**
—Team Fetterman HQ 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20250130-9846-footer&t=1&refcode2=9846_434096_VIKuC7&akid=9846%2E434096%2EVIKuC7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)

name: The Squad
subject: An all-out assault on our country
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250130-1204-foote&t=1001&akid=1204%2E342411%2Eypzjo_ ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We’ve seen unfathomable chaos from the White House over the last 10 days.

Trump has prioritized splitting up families, slashing critical federal
funding, pardoning violent insurrectionists, and attacking transgender
people. And we know he’s just getting started.

The Trump administration is determined to shock our nation into
submission, but we will NOT back down. Our Squad is fired up and ready to
fight back against this all-out assault on our country — and we need your
help to keep this fight going.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250130-movement.LXKn8e&refcode=em20250130-1204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1204%2E342411%2Eypzjo_ ]Will you chip in $5, $10, $50 or whatever you can to help us close the
gap on our $75,000 January fundraising goal?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250130-movement.LXKn8e&refcode=em20250130-1204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1021&akid=1204%2E342411%2Eypzjo_ ]Contribute ››

Peter, Trump
wants us to feel overwhelmed, underprepared, and helpless. He’s counting
on us to give in to his shock doctrine and feel so immobilized by his
attacks that we don’t rise up and fight back.

Trump’s vision for America serves to further enrich himself and his
wealthy friends.

We’re up against powerful, dangerous forces, but our movement is fueled by
people like YOU. We are stronger together, and we have the power to fight
for our rights, our future, and our communities.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250130-movement.LXKn8e&refcode=em20250130-1204&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1204%2E342411%2Eypzjo_ ]We need the resources to organize, mobilize, and fight for justice and
we’re so close to hitting our $75,000 January fundraising goal. Chip in
$3 to help us continue pushing back,
Peter.

Together,

The Squad

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1204%2E342411%2Eypzjo_

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

Peter,

**Well, it’s been quite the month. I know it can be overwhelming to keep up with the flurry of headlines coming out of the other Washington, so I want to offer you a bit of reassurance as we all figure out how to navigate this new political landscape.**

Serving Southwest Washington in Congress is an honor I don’t take lightly, and I strive every day to make good on my promise to find common ground in order to address the issues that matter most to you.

Peter, I remain committed to fighting for our shared values and against clickbait political agendas. But, that commitment has made me a target for far-right extremists whose only aim is to advance their dangerous, hateful agenda.

**In fact, national GOP donors are _*already*_ looking for candidates they can run against me in the next election.**

**We’re aiming to raise $20,000** from emails like this one to show everyone that our progressive movement is only getting stronger — and since we still need another boost to hit our goal, we started looking through our 2025 Supporter Records:
**Pramila for Congress**
**2025 Supporter Record** dpwillis67@gmail.com **2025 Donor:** No, not yet! **End-of-Month Deadline:** Tomorrow **[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250130?amount=3&refcode=em20250130-4716&refcode2=4716_420207_G3TE1I&akid=4716%2E420207%2EG3TE1I)**
---
Trump’s decision to back down (for now) on the funding freeze proves that our movement is _far_ from powerless.
But if we’re going to build the durable coalition we need to defeat MAGA and pass a bold, populist, working-class agenda, we have to continue growing our movement every single day from here on out.
**That’s where you come in, Peter. Pramila doesn’t take corporate PAC money, which means she’s counting on grassroots supporters like you to help fund this campaign.**
[**Will you make your first grassroots donation of 2025 right now to help us reach our $20,000 goal and keep up the work?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250130?refcode=em20250130-4716&amount=3&refcode2=4716_420207_G3TE1I&akid=4716%2E420207%2EG3TE1I)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250130?amount=3&refcode=em20250130-4716&refcode2=4716_420207_G3TE1I&akid=4716%2E420207%2EG3TE1I)**
In solidarity,
Jayapal HQ
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250130-4716-footer&t=2&refcode2=4716_420207_G3TE1I&akid=4716%2E420207%2EG3TE1I)**
---

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

Peter, here's where things stand:

**FIRST** : Donald Trump falsely campaigned with a "hands-off abortion" stance.

**THEN:** During his first week back in office, Trump passed an executive order that contained "personhood" language, which defines life as "beginning at conception" — a long-standing conservative tactic to criminalize abortion that has absolutely no basis in science.

**NOW** : If passed into law, defining life as beginning at conception would not only criminalize abortion, but could also threaten IVF, common forms of birth control, and even stem cell research.

Our fundamental rights are on the line, and we _must_ stay in this fight, Peter.

**Pro-choice women are our BEST weapon in the fight for reproductive freedom** , and EMILYs List has already endorsed six candidates this year — with elections as soon as April! These women are committed to taking on Trump and his extremist allies across the country.
[**When Kamala Harris calls us to action, we can't let her down. So please, will you donate now toward our 5,000 donor End-of-Month goal to support pro-choice women up and down the ballot? Together, we can stop Republicans' anti-choice agendas in their tracks.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101266920/525415114/-1037096532?refcode=WUEFE165_20250130_Kamala_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1055641&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MDZiNjkyNy00ZGRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=phw0RLk1hd_z_NzGH3L78oFYfBaj3QscrztPaBnbNgc=)
