name: COURIER
subject: NPR Report: Trump’s J6 pardons included dozens with horrific criminal records
body:
Trump, with the help of Fox News, is rewriting history and making our country unsafe.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101267123/525415771/2130526953?refcode=emwrapper&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU2ZTA0YmItNGRkZi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ti88dfAR6ctswYHbZNR6oWoHgoNUwKF7RdpJ1LFT9sE=&emci=f46e04bb-4ddf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=f56e04bb-4ddf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=14016711)
FNAME/Friend,
Last week, Donald Trump issued blanket pardons to over 1,500 individuals convicted for their roles in the January 6 Capitol attack.
**Now, NPR is reporting that many of these individuals have prior convictions for heinous crimes—including rape, sexual abuse of minors, domestic violence, and manslaughter.**
[_**We’ll tell you more in a moment, but NPR's report shatters Trump and Fox News' narrative that the Jan. 6 rioters were “patriots.” If you believe in building a progressive media alternative to expose far-right propaganda like this, please chip in $25 or more today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101267124/525415773/2081197767?refcode=20250130-EM-NPR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU2ZTA0YmItNGRkZi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ti88dfAR6ctswYHbZNR6oWoHgoNUwKF7RdpJ1LFT9sE=)
Here’s more from NPR:
* **Matthew Huttle** : Convicted of severely abusing his 3-year-old son, Huttle was sentenced to 2.5 years in prison. After his pardon for the Capitol riot, he was fatally shot during a confrontation with law enforcement in Indiana—just days after his release.
* **Peter Schwartz** : With 38 prior convictions—including assault with a deadly weapon and domestic violence—Schwartz was sentenced to over 14 years for attacking police officers with pepper spray during the Capitol riot. Trump’s pardon has now released him back into the community.
* **Theodore Middendorf** : Awaiting sentencing for striking a Capitol window with a flagpole on January 6, Middendorf was convicted in May 2024 of sexually assaulting a 7-year-old child and received a 19-year prison sentence. Despite this, he benefited from Trump’s pardons.

**Yet Fox News and others on the right keep framimg these individuals as "patriots," in a deliberate attempt to help Donald Trump avoid accountability and rewrite the history of January 6:**
* **Sean Hannity** asked Trump about the pardons without mentioning that many recipients had prior convictions for brutal crimes, including domestic violence and assaults on police officers.
* **Laura Ingraham** hosted two pardoned rioters, including Brandon Straka, who had pleaded guilty to inciting violence. Straka falsely claimed on her show that the FBI "fabricated" his case, while Ingraham sympathized and questioned the legitimacy of the prosecution.
* **Fox & Friends co-host Lawrence Jones** suggested that Trump only pardoned non-violent offenders, ignoring those who attacked police with weapons and chemical sprays, not to mention the criminal backgrounds uncovered by NPR

By distorting facts and pushing conspiracy theories, Fox and Trump are teaming up to normalize violent insurrection and undermine the rule of law.
**At COURIER, we’re here to set the record straight. We deliver direct, factual reporting—free from corporate agendas—so the truth isn’t hidden behind propaganda or fear of retribution.**
[**Will you chip in $25 today to help us continue this critical work? With just 48 hours left in January, we’re $5,000 short of our $50,000 fundraising goal.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101267125/525415774/2081197767?refcode=20250130-EM-NPR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU2ZTA0YmItNGRkZi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ti88dfAR6ctswYHbZNR6oWoHgoNUwKF7RdpJ1LFT9sE=)
**[Chip in $25 now!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101267126/525415776/-1581427288?refcode=20250130-EM-NPR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjU2ZTA0YmItNGRkZi1lZjExLTg4ZjgtMDAyMjQ4MmE5NTc5IiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ti88dfAR6ctswYHbZNR6oWoHgoNUwKF7RdpJ1LFT9sE=)** In solidarity,
The COURIER Team

**⭐ Team DLCC's 2025 Wish List:** **Elect** state Dems nationwide
**Protect** reproductive freedoms across the country
**Ensure** equal access to the ballot
**Defend** our democracy

name: Rashida Tlaib
subject: We all belong here and we all deserve dignity and safety.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress
body:
Last year, MIRC provided direct legal services to more than 5,000 immigrants in Michigan. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWD0ferydGPIBzedgWk_Pgbam-cnq4BSTffMO4QidC1sKzdwiafTXFISZF89rvYU_NbXQZpU1LcITkGL0QE1fWduryLIgRLnMLOIXq0eNOa_Gk6l0Q078gD09bWRWu6bpMQlmb86qF9irr9jBM1vh2pD73uW5BkLzCWObbIopkK1kBH0fggdMnLjkSvupoudQ88N7iZOVwgMgcaSf7RO8trA-GePaCLzo_ctAe4SDCNKk/4dl/tUZqzHmRTCKLPXLjjWnKgw/h0/h001.29P5ozNyJcp-oHgsFAqNsaNQca6VSn_6Z_pzNFW4-gU)
---
Friend, Immigrants in our community are under attack, especially our undocumented neighbors. I’m speaking out against the Trump administration’s violent proposals such as punishing sanctuary cities, dismantling asylum and humanitarian parole, sending ICE to places like schools and churches, and banning refugees—even those who were already cleared after waiting patiently for years. Yesterday, I joined local elected leaders and advocates, including the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center, to defend our immigrant neighbors and inform them of their rights. The Michigan Immigrant Rights Center is providing extensive Know Your Rights information sessions and materials, some of which I shared with you last week. The Michigan Immigrant Rights Center also provides critical legal aid to undocumented immigrants. **As the only organization****representing all unaccompanied children in federal immigration custody in Michigan, and the only** **free call for legal services that immigrants can make from immigration detention in Michigan, the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center is vitally important.** **But over 80% of the group’s****legal services are supported by federal funds** , and in the ongoing confusion around which federal grants will be frozen by the Trump administration, these legal services could be in jeopardy. Already, the group received a stop work order for their Helpdesk, which helped 4,000 immigrants in Detroit last year. [**At this urgent moment with the Trump administration potentially freezing funding, we need to support the crucial organizations that serve as lifelines for our marginalized neighbors, including immigrant families. Please join me in supporting the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center (MIRC) with a donation today to power their essential work.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtVknEK6EKuRE0l6mKa7ik2YrkzX0fidKdzRPNuqz--o8ZAFiNaBDvPhkZchU238r95uLzcRkwHUKYZZQJMNgJ8trB0hw_wUhQU9yv-89gbT7gWwGVfVe3KGGSZY1KBApvY1WnxrqA3ujtKLjPGkz18rSBltZcTofyKXnodl0pqsI3hdXkWbEgNo8ULm4DCJBVEPgouV5XfdrsJPDQaIUijYC50lqzeodFOrr-1KspRIY6lKyl6EEvo9cteoRIqZ65IC4adU5bs-y13t2UITQUD4_ZUvH89TZh7IXhtrk-PNB-czBHWARDFkXCP-eJsI3iRZoj7Kzs4QOFl33GgJg8UXXk5-_OfetaML2rfyrW_nkXWVs2prlGCMlJmHmeGPcfw/4dl/tUZqzHmRTCKLPXLjjWnKgw/h1/h001.TybEU_7nkVidecIPq6C63woyl0u84SghO9V5j7kM_-s) | [SUPPORT MIRC](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtVknEK6EKuRE0l6mKa7ik2YrkzX0fidKdzRPNuqz--o8ZAFiNaBDvPhkZchU238r95uLzcRkwHUKYZZQJMNgJ8uAlKBNdjf6ktJbviEGDjTJYlQySY5TEwLZWdNP1tEdkwvrpXiBm53MHVvN6-0vVLnZ4MivTtY-Bfey5LjJwtpeglmDtyA8qWMRAO_ZOHizQk6vMUne9--bU9gKEIo8h50AI0a-IcPNzwMDPefNHmqB8X2eGc8RgijMZhZ2jr1gLkLi-jCwQJ6Jr8lKeeEoYfy4y8WMH2XeXIHwTFrsF3nDi-99Gha_MDWhVV07fg1e8l3qERdMDECMEsd-ijWUpeZoLY0wcV0zuVbQBU7r8JiFWYauDFMiV7XjI8bfOw5UHg/4dl/tUZqzHmRTCKLPXLjjWnKgw/h2/h001.t5A5jABC_nUuA_U8U8pWZgyc6Ouk0_8Gk_Rc_44wcJ8)
---
Last year, MIRC’s five offices throughout Michigan provided direct legal services to more than 5,000 immigrants who otherwise could not have afforded representation. In 2018, they helped make sure every child brought to Michigan during the family separation crisis was successfully reunited with family members.
As ICE agents harass and round up immigrants in racist raids, the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center needs our support more than ever. We all belong here, and we all deserve dignity and safety. The time to protect each other is now.
[**Please rush a donation to the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center today.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtVknEK6EKuRE0l6mKa7ik2YrkzX0fidKdzRPNuqz--o8ZAFiNaBDvPhkZchU238r95uLzcRkwHUKYZZQJMNgJ8teHIyVaHk-wlyfAW7_HfgyjeCCzwcjEnLznnL2lCCHuMyz_q09ABxmVb7riw6ILZqQUz-QSBiUlkNYRa9j-iVkpmCZ2K5C8cX_57p_5Y_qygoz5c9Xf5HLg2squ2MQs0KZNjBsKtSQuD4gVU2dNzz97kb7nULU8E_5wSMKzL0nTO_uYeKF8UwZf3yD_wg3ebrqB4vqbEZsb_XhnabPBOnIHPm1hM-mA1XAGn0w7cBqQCveZcNiNRihg2yYWQ2nN4hDr2Ptsr4c8e5D3zeliuZDJ8vLMZJWEjchiIjh7JB3SA/4dl/tUZqzHmRTCKLPXLjjWnKgw/h3/h001.UTSRaCrBXrGCEBY61rLzpD9uy1lCzguPGdcO_sK7lU8)
Thank you for always being by my side as we work together to lift up our shared humanity. I am a child of immigrants, and I promise to keep fighting back against these racist policies, including plans for mass deportation. If you’d like to reference and share Know Your Rights information from the Michigan Immigrant Rights Center, you can find it here: https://michiganimmigrant.org
In love and solidarity,
Rashida
* * *

name: Wes Moore
subject: Tuesday's actions were deeply irresponsible
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101267858/525418397/-926250309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJmMjc3ZS01MWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aS7cyWc7b8KW9BOf3ppWDeSdY1I_dt1GIApNk4tvPxo=&emci=17bf277e-51df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=1bbf277e-51df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=24635485)
Friend, In times like these, we need clear leadership. What we saw on Tuesday was not just troubling, but it was **deeply irresponsible.** Tuesday, the Office of Management and Budget released a memo announcing that they would be enforcing a freeze on federal funding per the Trump-Vance Administration. As of this moment, there is back-and-forth, but a federal judge has blocked the freeze until Monday. With the time that we have, we are working around the clock to ensure we have a full understanding of how this will affect Marylanders. We know one thing is clear: **This action from the White House has caused unnecessary confusion, instability for our economy, and fear among Marylanders.** This is not what a responsible government looks like — _**this is chaos.**_ Friend, we will not let this seep into our state. We are going to answer this instability with **clear, calm, and steady leadership.** Maryland has joined other states in a lawsuit to block the funding freeze. We are in constant communication with local, state, and federal partners on both sides of the aisle so we can deepen our understanding of this developing situation. I want Maryland to know that our commitment to leaving no one behind has not changed. We remain committed to Maryland, our Constitutional rights, growing our economy, and restoring faith in our institutions, public servants, and our democracy. **Friend, the best antidote to chaos is calm. We will continue to provide real results for working families even when the winds are harsh and the storm is fierce.** Elevate, Wes
---
This message was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[Receive Fewer Emails](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101267859/525418398/450621870?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxYmJmMjc3ZS01MWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aS7cyWc7b8KW9BOf3ppWDeSdY1I_dt1GIApNk4tvPxo=&emci=17bf277e-51df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=1bbf277e-51df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=24635485)

name: Lacy Lunsford
subject: My U.S. Army Veteran husband is facing jail because of a Soros-Funded prosecutor
body:
My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s.
---
| |
---
Dear Peter,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for _11 years_.
Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys.
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0a8fa1678b24700be7b3c030be32646&_e=J7i4k8M-iGEgKW7xCm2G_jg02WznNZJpVXbY0b49c-7_ijfQnttRyzM0XO_TrGpBU0hcOKPbD4wZKv9labV9uPoAjOMsaDD6dGFQ1p5O0TsEyueiwStxK1BNjmsLEQ_lyuDbFdR0BHtBStmcr-V8ZLC7YePUFsVIlZ_ss-5qyADW6l9UKDm2qXbWpMRHTJufAiL9YShAm6tBk-C3vLFLfOK8FqDUm-BF9UQtP3RX2DXOZcj9Z4uN9vUQDuS1xAh_qIJqGb1aDpXzGt9JP0l0UmBB32HU4jkFhdhgVlHyMSD0gj5AhElsd0Ivl5rQ6FLhmQwtlFJnumjNcKDv2F2ikNKXnols9MNzabdZJkAbdR7W8ZwKQT5kjldjhsiGfkzxUGwbczESnSgtQkICUcy3aA%3D%3D)
---
[](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0a8fa1678b24700be7b3c030be32646&_e=J7i4k8M-iGEgKW7xCm2G_jg02WznNZJpVXbY0b49c-7_ijfQnttRyzM0XO_TrGpBU0hcOKPbD4wZKv9labV9uPoAjOMsaDD6dGFQ1p5O0TsEyueiwStxK1BNjmsLEQ_lyuDbFdR0BHtBStmcr-V8ZLC7YePUFsVIlZ_ss-5qyADW6l9UKDm2qXbWpMRHTJufAiL9YShAm6tBk-C3vLFLfOK8FqDUm-BF9UQtP3RX2DUoWfr3pOyUmZCeZuuC4Hqa_LU9YPXwgAFuAMbBb6t9NEM1bnouCRQCT0vYfWTBC9X8UJ-mfg2Eq86-v54usgWH3C7Xz60kKEuo852AqvMwq0_Rsf9kD-neLRM5Dk1qAnNyQcahnniBKn0TE6eqCLNFLLZjzMeo9z89uyIwiyUKVA%3D%3D)
---
Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a _Soros-funded_ , _anti-police_ _prosecutor_. **[**That's why I'm writing you today as a last resort to ask if you'll help me fight for my husband.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0a8fa1678b24700be7b3c030be32646&_e=J7i4k8M-iGEgKW7xCm2G_jg02WznNZJpVXbY0b49c-7_ijfQnttRyzM0XO_TrGpBU0hcOKPbD4wZKv9labV9uPoAjOMsaDD6dGFQ1p5O0TsEyueiwStxK1BNjmsLEQ_lyuDbFdR0BHtBStmcr-V8ZLC7YePUFsVIlZ_ss-5qyADW6l9UKDm2qXbWpMRHTJufAiL9YShAm6tBk-C3vLFLfOK8FqDUm-BF9UQtP3RX2DWHZTMRWJz56dEGfH7tsNJLSMrdyO1RS_5onOHFzVW_ABWOtbVxNk2LIseAMcT0LZzTKKGBoOEqYafl-bQb5eWcSTScD593yKX_6rUITVXe7BwP4xe3a6nB_L-w6h_RlsH_lVMzqnMARO-JGXA-y61GZg--e_dXsP2ieocSQ8YnYA%3D%3D)** Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation _and_ the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who _hates_ the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." **Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge.** Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in just days and the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. **[**Will you donate $35 or any amount to LELDF to help me save my husband?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0a8fa1678b24700be7b3c030be32646&_e=J7i4k8M-iGEgKW7xCm2G_jg02WznNZJpVXbY0b49c-7_ijfQnttRyzM0XO_TrGpBU0hcOKPbD4wZKv9labV9uPoAjOMsaDD6dGFQ1p5O0TsEyueiwStxK1BNjmsLEQ_lyuDbFdR0BHtBStmcr-V8ZLC7YePUFsVIlZ_ss-5qyADW6l9UKDm2qXbWpMRHTJufAiL9YShAm6tBk-C3vLFLfOK8FqDUm-BF9UQtP3RX2DWJPl7UnRA7hagweN66TmeI32HMEE-c5Cys3irIy6Aoq0xCyVegAWFX8ApR2oCRPfThoF8qWk69XQBOzJ1ECL9fySwCGFNX8M3SaYRE3f5R9F9kfSylJSIZW6p_pUKdrORjcJl8Jc7CRFB5_VvKpuLYJeZCGk6MyAXS3i30rIOmmQ%3D%3D)** If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. **[So I pray you'll find it in your heart today to make a tax-deductible gift of $35, $50, $100 or more to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0a8fa1678b24700be7b3c030be32646&_e=J7i4k8M-iGEgKW7xCm2G_jg02WznNZJpVXbY0b49c-7_ijfQnttRyzM0XO_TrGpBU0hcOKPbD4wZKv9labV9uPoAjOMsaDD6dGFQ1p5O0TsEyueiwStxK1BNjmsLEQ_lyuDbFdR0BHtBStmcr-V8ZLC7YePUFsVIlZ_ss-5qyADW6l9UKDm2qXbWpMRHTJufAiL9YShAm6tBk-C3vLFLfOK8FqDUm-BF9UQtP3RX2DVwZu4bUxFVQ4jxCkpPVM3-uwn_G2893jszEBhDW4Ax868zp1J-hoEcH1BLzbupKrlQ1QJJ6pPURDOu6ErvuI9mMwjuQ0uWq6YKIAo_HVRIxW6Nwumm84IGhLtvcUq-F7NeAollQx6eyCM7q_oUez6BAmLERfuF06GsjCNXWivyYA%3D%3D) ** Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support.
---
Sincerely,
---
Lacy Lunsford
---
| | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- [**please follow this link right now to make a tax-deductible donation of $35 or any amount to the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund today.**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=c0a8fa1678b24700be7b3c030be32646&_e=J7i4k8M-iGEgKW7xCm2G_jg02WznNZJpVXbY0b49c-7_ijfQnttRyzM0XO_TrGpBU0hcOKPbD4wZKv9labV9uPoAjOMsaDD6dGFQ1p5O0TsEyueiwStxK1BNjmsLEQ_lyuDbFdR0BHtBStmcr-V8ZLC7YePUFsVIlZ_ss-5qyADW6l9UKDm2qXbWpMRHTJufAiL9YShAm6tBk-C3vLFLfOK8FqDUm-BF9UQtP3RX2DVAxpVG9UUqPkK5qiR1VJAeVfIlsXjWoUv_CIr0ZpIa8q94XmGCUGDXbB3zPDFVdxj2L7VO3SoL8_7SFSVRHysesPIMF-e5jXq_buWah1kc6zl2nYJHi39j8ZevDSNEe5EpUvwMnNa3ZeEXJp3NwJ4FMc3rcyoovMdHWZopqiW4LQ%3D%3D) P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor!
---
|
---
| | _More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter!_

clean_body: My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community.| | | my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect’s life or his partner’s. | | Dear Peter,My husband saved the life of his fellow officer and now, on February 3rd, a Soros-funded prosecutor is going to try and lock him up for 11 years. Here is one of my favorite pictures of our two boys. Now it makes me cry. As you can probably tell from my sons' costumes, my husband Brad is a proud U.S. Army veteran. He served two tours of duty in Iraq as a Cavalry Scout. And today he is also a decorated, 9-year veteran of the Las Cruces, New Mexico, police department. I'm used to my husband being in danger. But never in my wildest dreams did I think the biggest threat to Brad wouldn't come from a radical terrorist or a violent gangster... ...but from a Soros-funded , anti-police prosecutor. Our nightmare started the day my husband responded to a shoplifting call. When Brad arrived on the scene, right away he sensed something was off. And when he and his partner, Officer Keegan Arbogast, asked the suspect to identify himself, the suspect refused. So when Officer Arbogast saw a knife sitting on the suspect's lap, hidden under a water bottle, the officers moved to detain him. Instead of complying, the suspect got violent. Everything that happened next happened in an instant. As the officers tried to subdue him, the suspect went for Officer Arbogast's gun, trying to pull it from the holster. Then he lunged for Officer Arbogast's taser, yanked it free, and pointed it directly at him. In that moment, my husband had no choice -- it was the suspect's life or his partner's. He drew his pistol and fired, killing the suspect and saving Officer Arbogast's life. When one of Brad's coworkers called me to tell me there had been a shooting, I burst into tears. I didn't stop crying until Brad came home. I was so thankful he was safe. I knew he did what he had to do to protect his partner so they could both make it home to their families. And when an Internal Investigation and the local District Attorney cleared my husband of any wrongdoing, I thought this awful episode was behind us. I couldn't have been more wrong. Because more than a year after the incident, the Attorney General of New Mexico charged my husband with Voluntary Manslaughter! When I heard about the charges, I was shocked. Then we did some digging -- and it all made sense. The New Mexico Attorney General is a rabid far-Left activist who hates the police. He was funded by George Soros. And because my husband is white, and the suspect was black... ...this radical prosecutor is determined to make a name for himself by destroying my husband and dragging his name through the mud. He even held a press conference and turned the microphone over to the suspect's family so they could spread hateful lies about my husband, smearing him as a "racist" and a "cold-blooded killer." Make no mistake -- these charges are a slap in the face to every brave man and woman who has ever put on the badge. Now you can see why I'm so heartbroken and furious. My husband is an honorable man who wanted nothing more than to serve his country and his community. That's why he served for 3 years in the Army as a cavalry scout. And it's why he served for 10 years as a police officer. But more than that, he's a wonderful husband and an incredible father to our 9- and 6-year-old boys. We've tried to explain to our boys as best we can about what's going on. But they're too young to fully understand. And I can't bear to think of what it will do to them if one day, Daddy is taken away and they're forced to grow up with their father behind bars. But unless people like you speak up to defend my husband against these disgusting Soros-funded political attacks... ...Brad will miss 11 years of birthdays, wedding anniversaries, and Little League games. As I mentioned earlier, Brad's trial starts in just days and the legal bills have become overwhelming for our family. Thank God, we got a call from Jason Johnson. Jason is a retired police officer -- and he's the President of the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF). If you've ever heard of LELDF, you know they're a national group fighting on behalf of wrongly-accused police officers like Brad. LELDF has helped dozens of innocent officers -- and their families -- when it seemed like there was no hope left. And with the thought of losing my husband and trying to suddenly raise my two boys on my own -- I was certainly hopeless. Not only did LELDF decide to help my husband get the legal defense he deserves, they're also raising money to pay for the best lawyers and expert witnesses available. But it’s only because of the support of brave patriots like yourself. Jason and LELDF were an answer to prayer for our family. That's because Brad and I aren't wealthy people. I run our family farm and Brad is a veteran turned cop. So I must ask you one of the toughest questions I've ever asked anyone. If I had anywhere else to turn, I wouldn't be so bold as to ask for your help. But I'm so scared for Brad and I will do whatever I can for him -- and for our sons. Brad and I -- and our two sons -- are counting on the good nature and generosity of kind neighbors like you to help keep Brad home where he belongs. No matter what you're able to give today, please pray for us. Thank you in advance for your support. Sincerely, Lacy Lunsford | | P.S. I already spent a year apart from my husband when he was in the Army. It's the hardest thing I've ever done. He almost died during that deployment when the Humvee he was driving hit an IED. I can't imagine having to spend 11 long, lonely years, trying to raise the boys by myself -- and worrying every day about my husband, locked up with hundreds of violent criminals. Please don't let my two boys grow up without their father -- P.P.S. Brad's trial starts on February 3rd, so we're quickly running out time. Thank you for helping my family fight back against this Soros-funded prosecutor! | | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. The next time you see a police officer in your community, please thank them for their service. To read more about our mission or the other Law Enforcement officers we're defending, please visit. And remember –Blue Lives Matter! © Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | 2560 Huntington Ave. Suite 203, Alexandria, VA, 22303

name: LCV Membership Team
subject: Trump just tried to freeze virtually ALL federal funds. Our fight doesn’t stop here — we need your help
disclaimer_text: paid for by auctioning off public lands to Big Oil companies
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTIwNTgyMjMS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjE0MDQyODQ0NwS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Peter — we’re asking: please, renew your LCV membership for just $5 https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/- before Friday’s 3x match deadline. Your membership is so important right now. And here’s why.Just this week, Trump ordered a freeze on payment of all federal investments and
grants, including those that keep our air and water clean. It was a drastic and
illegal overreach that threatened our democracy and could have impacted every
single community in America. But you responded, Peter. Thousands of supporters like you reached out
to their members of Congress or took to the streets to push back against this
dangerous, illegal, and harmful effort to cut essential programs that support
working families and protect our environment. The immediate harm to people and
communities across the country may be paused, but our fight must continue. The chaos and confusion alone continues to do damage.As the White House has already made clear, they will only continue to attempt to
cut essential programs that help people, lower costs, and create jobs. We win when we mobilize. That’s why your membership is so important. The best thing you can do right now to stop Trump’s anti-environmental attacks is to renew your LCV membership for 2025 — right now, $5 is all it takes >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfEeZe- RENEW YOUR MEMBERSHIP FOR JUST $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. Peter, this isn’t the only threat we’re facing right now — here are
just a few reasons why your membership is so important: Because Trump has issued sweeping executive orders targeting the environment and clean energy. His “Day One” actions threaten to open up the Arctic and our coastline to oil and gas drilling, ban wind energy, and direct the government to stop studying climate change and aiding communities destroyed by its disasters. It’s up to us to stop him >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because Congress is preparing to pass a sweeping and dangerous bill — including virtually all of Trump’s most extreme priorities — in his first 100 days. That would mean mass deportations, rolling back clean energy and climate programs, and huge tax cuts for the wealthy, paid for by auctioning off public lands to Big Oil companies. We need to be ready to fight back, and we need your help >> https://links.messages.lcv.
Because Trump is rewarding his Big Oil donors with powerful positions in his administration. LCV is leading the campaign against extreme nominees like Chris Wright, an oil and gas fracking CEO picked by Trump to run the Energy Department. He attended the 2024 dinner when Trump promised handouts to oil and gas executives if they helped to fund his campaign. We need your help to oppose these radical nominations >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/_
Because we need to continue to oppose Trump’s dangerous Project 2025 agenda. From abolishing the National Weather Service (which warns people about storms and other life-threatening events) and FEMA (which provides assistance in their aftermath), to gutting environmental enforcement and allowing more toxic pollution into our air and water, to allowing more oil and gas drilling and development on precious public lands and waters, Trump has laid out a blueprint for environmental disaster. With your help, we’ll be ready to fight this pro-polluter agenda >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/~
Because, right now, your support for the environment will go THREE TIMES as far. A group of donors has agreed to TRIPLE MATCH all gifts, meaning that now is the best possible time to help oppose Trump’s dangerous pro-polluter agenda. Triple your impact: renew your membership today for just $5 >> https://links.messages.lcv. We’re ready to stop Trump’s dangerous agenda, but the truth is that this work
depends on LCV supporters like you. Please, renew your LCV membership for 2025 right now for just $5. Your gift will be 3X MATCHED, tripling your impact for people and our planet >> https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/pNy7f32Z2~ Thanks for everything you do, Peter. We’re so grateful to have you in
our corner. Onward, LCV Membership Team This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=12058223&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE0MDQyODQ0NwS2&spReportId=MjE0MDQyODQ0NwS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=12058223&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjE0MDQyODQ0NwS2&spReportId=MjE0MDQyODQ0NwS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/KybpT-

name: Gingrich, Newt
subject: Hey – it’s Newt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Axios just reported that the Democrat Machine is unloading $10,000,000 to obliterate our House Majority and barge back into power ASAP.
I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms: Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second.
| |
---
| | | This is the most serious call I've made in a while - and it's to you, Friend.

Hey, this is Newt Gingrich. I've got enough experience under my belt to say this in the strongest possible terms:

_Now is not the time to take our foot off the gas. Not for a second._

_Yes, we took back the Senate ... Yes, we saved the House... And yes, we re-elected President Trump..._

But in doing so, we emptied our ENTIRE warchest to support President Trump in battleground states, win swing races, and drive the Democrat Party into ruin in 2024. As a direct result of these strategic investments, our budgets are now running on FUMES!

**And to make matters worse, Axios just reported that the Democrat Machine is unloading $10,000,000 to obliterate our House Majority and barge back into power ASAP.**

That's why I'm teaming up with Majority Leader Scalise to launch a major rebuilding effort for House Republicans to refill our warchest with ONE MILLION DOLLARS. _**[Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before the end of the month?](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=b8b09cd17ea24b57b613814f03aa604c&_e=CD9loSIy4fgyUCMuBnz2b8EUATOVe4v0HyqoGQdEydauGO7G-18nMSf4H1CHxhuzsjpXlZJ7NRKJa5QdypOAnPCTAZ4hzKUCQUNqeF1aSbDWTvHYz4iErt79DLBhJbm2cvO4e95_ERkrbob44tT_3Vp4qGY7vHCAUkB6QerX-pz7wmyl2VVRHzveETKh4ARvjDeBGSRgTLf7J4gsKgZnmLENFGquyEL0PPKf3nrYGH5fVx-e6U6biEehZEJIuokiQPSKCbPW8fbI38prQB3YOiQu8E9-EXF0-Y2nOg7ElZkhJyHWLKHq10exXukS6Ot9pmYOLvxl5RVIIXvsuMg-60YNYJgylR_86cAh_vYK4t2w8pWBGfiq4r6h3Wu5YwONZHlCGvuWg0GPkHNipd4UAA%3D%3D "Could you help us out by pitching in a few bucks before Inauguration Day?")**_

But in doing so, we emptied our ENTIRE warchest to support President Trump in battleground states, win swing races, and drive the Democrat Party into ruin in 2024. name: Jeff Younger
subject: A California court ruled that my son can be chemically castrated...
body:
“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now.
---
| |
---
| |
---
#
---
| | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c346925421de4e0e96dc5ee10f74fc12&_e=I8F7PnIa1wU57HFPtXreuTL6hqaYsQx2dFvYfIaW3OsGPv_bXksZn-elGsPa0zFiMct4az-Qu0mo0mSo4en5xgheAatpDPMkkiqaigVIh3WVFyP9QOSQggcjicxUMXuBqpNmKomZlSaeMQMK2wHaT7Uta0NqwHhzk7W4C9eYqbC2BTDoNWw9dwuJAaKcrq31JQqiJLWVrFuPJISZQetEqaDFL5f_pyVeTOakRraARIyGFNL79QgGRIYsGNfYv2CDKMYlVkYVyPAw2RFEN_ffBznF14x54W6FDMoOReqpRjSDDS2vjx7Lw4sEknGSTPyCu0j3UBhSkDLJp5OrcGrFvBoxysChTWHdDXciXewBoy1a4fXdH4Ai4trjOdXS6ZTn)
---
My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son **James** in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” **James** against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy **James **wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with **James** to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And **James** needs to be **saved** before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son **James **from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... [I hope you’ll consider sending a one-time gift to PLDF today to help fund my battle against the California courts and judges who are trying to mutilate my son.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=c346925421de4e0e96dc5ee10f74fc12&_e=I8F7PnIa1wU57HFPtXreuTL6hqaYsQx2dFvYfIaW3OsGPv_bXksZn-elGsPa0zFiMct4az-Qu0mo0mSo4en5xuJTMfjSSY5E8wucGXCBv3KU6j2MyYr9S8arp6F3Zk9dY6pbqv3oMUgAmEIU6UzuPb9KuLx5d8KjEKWzhgIQajj3UMzIsbEaQGGkngxNRaJ2DjPaV0rlqGLgHmwUtL8gLkctemQpv5XefjX8HQInTX2IcdqTyeHFVphGl9V9WJTC_h-qFYhrH1X-hlxsFNvl9u9ubn2DDt794O6lr_jkH-fK3SiVbPN0VudickE2oGBnuxK97qZbsGDkbQo5IzL0XAQ__kThKaOW6tszvyUNj19NdoPZgFKccfmqqKVJ_wrqGE5Fu06x_ql9xhZ29kn5Uw%3D%3D "https://patriots-legal-defense-fund.revv.co/rcl9ea4bb135305b?amount=50&utm_source=BDG-REV&utm_medium=EM&utm_campaign=20250130_BDG_PLDF_DMSJ2_BDG_REV_RCL-RCL&utm_term=GAP")

clean_body: “That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.” | | | I don’t even know what my son looks like now. | | | | | | My Dear Friend, When I tell people my story, I hear the same things over and over again:“That’s crazy.” “I don’t believe that.” “That can’t be.”But if you’ve heard about my case from Charlie Kirk, Nick Freitas, or Fox News, then you know it’s horribly true. My name is Jeff Younger, and I’m the father to two wonderful boys. That’s my son James in the photo above.I’ve spent the last decade fighting tooth-and-nail to keep school counselors, my ex-wife, and activist judges from “transitioning” James against my will. If you didn’t know, “transitioning” is the LGBTQ+ industry’s euphemism for sex change surgery or the chemical castration of a child.And if these radicals get their way, my son will be sterilized, traumatized, and dependent on Big Pharma for the rest of his life.This all started ten years ago when my ex-wife began telling me our two-year-old boy James wanted to become a girl.I ignored her and kept dressing my son in boy’s clothes. Because he’s a boy!But then I found out that after dropping him off at school, the school counselor would change him into girl’s clothes WITHOUT TELLING ME.The counselors and teachers also began calling him a different name, “Luna,” at school. Also without telling me!I assumed I’d be able to stop this madness during the custody hearings with my ex-wife. Instead, the judge BANNED me from seeing my son.I would only be allowed to see James if I dressed him in girl’s clothes.My friend, I’ve never lied to my sons.And I’m not about to start now. So I was forced to stop visiting him.And then I began the fight of my life to save James from this evil “trans” culture.I’ve been in court three times a week for the past eight years. At this point, I have more trial experience than most lawyers.I even authored a bill to outlaw sex change surgeries for minors in Texas, South Carolina, and Tennessee.And spent almost every dollar I had to make sure politicians passed those bills.But these Radicals are relentless and they don’t play fair.After I got the law passed in my home state of Texas, my ex-wife fled with James to California: a “trans sanctuary” state. I think you know exactly what happened once she got to California.A radical judge sided with my ex-wife and gave the greenlight to proceed with chemically castrating my son.I have never felt so helpless in my life. I am James’s father – yet I can’t protect him from the powerful LGBTQ+ activists who are using my ex-wife and our kangaroo court systems to turn my son into the poster child for their twisted and perverted agenda.I’ve watched the school system, my ex-wife, and the courts systematically strip me of all parental rights and privileges.In fact, I can’t even appeal my case because the judge sealed the court records. I’d have to sue the LA County Court to unseal the records just to BEGIN the appeal process.Worst of all, I am under a gag order to NEVER speak about transgender issues publicly.Technically, my writing you this to you today is illegal.But I didn’t hesitate for one second to write it. If I were just some activist, maybe I would worry about the threat of jail time.But I’m not just some activist.I’m a father trying to save his son from the Left’s madness and butchery.This is what happens when you go up against the $6 BILLION “trans lobby” and radical activist judges.They’re trying to bury me in paperwork... They’re trying to bankrupt me in legal fees...They’re trying to break my spirit...But I refuse to ever stop fighting for my son... for truth... and for what’s right. Because I don’t want this to ever happen to another family.These radical LGBTQ+ doctors, lawyers and judges need to be stopped...They need to be held accountable...And James needs to be saved before he’s permanently butchered.That’s why I’m writing to you today.When Patriots Legal Defense Fund (PLDF) heard about my case, they immediately offered to stand with me and fight this insanity.PLDF has been on the frontlines defending innocent J6ers targeted by the Biden DOJ.And when they heard about my case, they told me they’d help in any way possible.The fact is, this transgender madness is affecting all of our children and grandchildren. It’s in their schools. In the books in their libraries. Pediatricians are asking five-year-olds if they “feel like they’re in the wrong body” during routine doctor visits.This is madness. And it’s got to stop.If you want to help save my son James from castration and make sure this will NEVER happen to ANY child ever again... And if you want to send a message to these radical judges that their day of reckoning has come... "" | | | | | | | I was fired from my job in the tech industry after speaking out about this LGBTQ+ madness. I have been funding my fight from my own savings. But I can’t keep this up forever. And I’m running out of time to save James. "" I’ve met so many good Americans in this battle. It’s what keeps me going when I feel there’s no hope left. God bless you for reading my letter. With gratitude, P.S. After Tucker Carlson interviewed me on his podcast, I was fired from my job and blacklisted. These radical LGBTQ+ activists have the upper hand when it comes to money and power. But I’ll never stop fighting to save my son. By God, never. P.P.S. This is an old photo...I know I don’t look like that anymore.Sadly, I don’t know what my son looks like now.I haven’t seen him in years.Would you help me fight these corrupt judges and politicians? I’d love to send you a new photo once we’ve overturned these bogus rulings and I’m reunited with my boy. Thank you for reading my letter. "" Patriot's Legal Defense Fund601 Baffie Avenue Winter Park, Florida 32789

name: Save PBS via Our Revolution
subject: BREAKING: Trump's War on Truth just took a dark turn
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis, the Trump
administration JUST launched an investigation into NPR and PBS — part of
his war on the truth and effort to DESTROY public media.

This is an EXISTENTIAL threat. Trump’s FCC Chair even said, “Congress is
actively considering whether to stop requiring taxpayers to subsidize NPR
and PBS.” By gutting public media, Trump will empower the right-wing
disinformation machine.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?source=email-20250130&t=1011&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Sign the petition: Fight Trump’s War on Truth and urge Congress to
protect funding to trustworthy public media like PBS and NPR.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?source=email-20250130&t=1012&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]ADD YOUR NAME

- Our Revolution

-----Forwarded Message-----
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
From: Media Under Attack via Our Revolution
Subject: They've declared a war on the truth

Peter Willis,

Trump and his billionaire backers have declared an all out War on Truth.
They’re coming after our independent media...eager to get it out of the way
so they can easily spread disinformation AND rake in billions by sending
us to the platforms they own to get our news.

“NO MORE FUNDING FOR NPR, A TOTAL SCAM!” Trump wrote on Truth Social. Musk
quickly followed suit, labeling public media as “propaganda” and outlining
clear plans to cut hundreds of millions in funding for the Corporation for
Public Broadcasting, which funds NPR and PBS.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?t=1013&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ][IMG]

With a $30 million budget shortfall that’s already forced NPR to lay off
staff, public media stations are not in a position to launch a massive
campaign to save themselves.

But we are.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?source=email-20250130&t=1014&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Our Revolution is already hard at work mobilizing record breaking
numbers and unleashing a huge lobbying push on Congress. But to win this
fight, we’re going to need EVERYONE to join us. Will you send an urgent
message to Congress to save independent media from Trump?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?source=email-20250130&t=1015&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]ADD YOUR NAME

Republicans have been trying since the NIXON administration to kill NPR
and PBS – and we’ve stopped them every. single. time. But experts warn
that this time could be different.

Musk has made it crystal clear that public media is on the top of his list
for government cuts. And many Republicans are gleefully going along for
the ride. Marjorie Taylor Greene just threatened to summon PBS to testify
before her committee in Congress.

It’s a chilling and blatant attack on our free media. It’s not hard to
imagine what could be next – like an editorial ‘takeover’ to make these
the mouth-pieces of the administration.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?t=1016&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ][IMG]

It’s not just NPR and PBS. Last year, Trump filed a defamation case
against ABC. And instead of fighting back, ABC agreed to settle for a
shocking $16 million. Emboldened, Trump is now coming after other news
outlets when he doesn’t like their coverage.

As CNN’s Jim Acosta said this week: “It is never a good time to bow down
to a tyrant ... it’s the job of the press to hold power to account”.

This is the bold stance we must all hold in face of theseIt’s terrifying
attacks on a free press — but the good news is that Trump can’t carry this
out alone. To make the public media cuts a reality, Republicans will need
almost unanimous support in Congress. So we’re going to raise the
temperature to make sure they’re ALL hearing from thousands of
constituents to ensure that a ‘yes’ vote is a risk Congress members don’t
want to take.

It’s terrifying, but the good news is that Trump can’t do this alone. To
make the public media cuts a reality, Republicans will need almost
unanimous support in Congress. So we’re going to raise the temperature to
make sure they’re ALL hearing from thousands of constituents who believe
in a public media and ensure that a ‘yes’ vote is a risk Congress members
don’t want to take.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/21279?source=email-20250130&t=1017&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Let’s make this attack on PBS and NPR a line in the sand to show Trump
we will NOT let him bend our media to his will. Will you add your name to
send a message straight to Congress and save our media from Trump?

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13119?c0=email-20250130.95FTZo&t=1007&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13120?c0=email-20250130.LtE8TR&t=1008&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a 2024 Movement Builder with a
recurring donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13121?c0=email-20250130.9TBg66&t=1009&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13122?c0=email-20250130.0v-zEN&t=1010&akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=7616%2E5885482%2EQc4UwO

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a
501(c)(4) organization. Donations to Our Revolution are not deductible as
charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. All donations are
made to support Our Revolution’s general mission and are not designated for

name: confirmation request  [FFR]
subject: You haven’t been watching Rachel Maddow on 𝙈𝙎𝙉𝘽𝘾?!
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
Last weekend, we sent you an urgent poll asking if you have been watching MSNBC...
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=22820%2E4449941%2EkMxWKD)
---
Hello,

Last weekend, we sent you an urgent poll asking if you have been watching _MSNBC_ after it was reported that Rachel Maddow would be returning!

**But our records indicate that you still haven’t responded.** Our data for your state is incomplete without your responses.

Fight for Reform

name: Scott Peters
subject: It’s time for action re: wildfires
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Peters for Congress
body:
---
| | Peter,

The destruction we’ve seen in Los Angeles, and the wildfire in our own district, is a painful reminder that as wildfires continue to increase in frequency and intensity, so too does the harm to human life and our ecosystems.

**That’s why I’ve made it a top priority in the new Congress to better protect our communities from disasters like this – and just last week the House voted to pass my bipartisan legislation aimed at doing exactly that.** It will go a long way in restoring forest health, reducing catastrophic wildfires that contribute to pollution and climate change, and increasing community resilience to fire threats.

It’s clear that the climate crisis isn’t waiting, so neither can we.

By instituting these smart policy changes now, we can help prevent fires, limit their spread, and make them less destructive.

[I need to hear from our strongest supporters on this important issue. If you’re on board with our work to put in place long-term climate preparedness measures, add your name here:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101268518/525420628/-2006071645?refcode2=273688ef-54df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&refcode=SP_EM_PT_180DO_250130_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzkvMS84ODA2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzM2ODhlZi01NGRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=PP_n1e42VaEOgySN7r05RHongI1jtAk1DElPcmdrWY0=&emci=b31a78e9-54df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=273688ef-54df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=5258741)

BREAKING: House Republicans just introduced a bill that would ban the right to abortion care nationwide. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101268783/525421277/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ5Nzc4ZC01NWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9j8zJ4vZOR9lVqJOXfu_99fEe-ai4EafyjFhIQ0DU9U=&emci=d1d93fba-3bdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=9049778d-55df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=15820338)

**A Missouri Republican has introduced a federal abortion ban in the House**

_"At a time when Republicans are seeking to narrow the definition of who is a citizen under the 14th Amendment by eliminating birthright citizenship, they are also using the 14th Amendment to extend personhood to fetuses—an indication of who is and isn’t considered a person with rights according to GOP philosophy."_
[CHIP IN TO HELP US FIGHT BACK](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101268784/525421278/1785449556?refcode=em25_250130_ab_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250130_ab_fndd_gq_act___TS_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=9049778d-55df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDQ5Nzc4ZC01NWRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=9j8zJ4vZOR9lVqJOXfu_99fEe-ai4EafyjFhIQ0DU9U=) Peter,

House Republicans just introduced a bill to ban abortion nationwide. Let’s be clear – this isn’t about protecting women’s health. **It’s about controlling women’s choices.**

If they succeed, millions of women across the country will lose the right to make their own healthcare decisions. _And we know they won’t stop there._

They’re coming for birth control, IVF, and family planning treatments next. This is a full-scale attack on reproductive freedom, and we cannot sit back and let it happen.

As the only pro-choice woman doctor in Congress, Kim knows exactly what’s at stake. She has sat down with patients facing impossible decisions. She’s fought back against extremist politicians who think they know better than women and their doctors. And Kim will never stop defending the right to choose – _but it's not something she can do alone._

Extremist Republicans are doing everything they can to enact their dangerous Project 2025 agenda and silence pro-choice voices in Congress. [**We need to respond. name: Team AOC
subject: Trump doesn’t want you to open this email:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
#
Our goal before tomorrow at midnight is to raise $1.7 million in order to have the resources to fight back against Trump over these next four years.
Here’s a transparent look at where we’re at:
We’re incredibly proud that this is a grassroots powered campaign. Our average donation floats around $17. Alexandria doesn’t take a dime from corporate PACs or curry favor with billionaires.
Meanwhile, Trump is raking in huge amounts of money from corporations and extremely wealthy donors:
We’re asking if you can [chip in $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250130.vTNyjm&refcode=em20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj) to help us reach our end-of-month fundraising goal. It may not seem like a lot compared to Trump’s megadonors, but when thousands of people chip in, it all really adds up.
[ Will you donate $5 right now to help Alexandria continue the fight for meaningful change and fight back against Trump?](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250130.vTNyjm&refcode=em20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250130.vTNyjm&refcode=em20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250130.vTNyjm&refcode=em20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)**
[](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250130.vTNyjm&refcode=em20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)
With your support, we can show that Alexandria has widespread support from NY-14 and beyond to do what she was elected to do: **demand better.**
We’re so thankful that you are a part of this mass movement for change—whether you can afford to give today or not.
More soon,
Team AOC

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250130?refcode=em20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=24&refcode2=8031_2526796_gM_Akj&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250130-8031-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=25&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=26&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=27&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=28&akid=8031%2E2526796%2EgM_Akj)
---|---|---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

More soon, Team AOC | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

### "I have been endorsed by over 300,000 law enforcement officers to become the next Director of the FBI, let's ask them!!"
Jan 30
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=156128080&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTU2MTI4MDgwLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTczODI3NjYxMiwiZXhwIjoxNzQwODY4NjEyLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.mlCrc9EeKPnW-6qRT6BhrLwNbkMpwRaWK_dsHggaNak&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvcG9saXRpYnJhd2wvcC9rYXNoLXBhdGVsLWRlc3Ryb3lzLWFteS1rbG9idWNoYXI_.D7zWMcOlzR3QIl9KgXzFKXL5PtJ9CzYzMeZ1nR82Rvw?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)

| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/politibrawl/p/kash-patel-destroys-amy-klobuchar?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

President Donald Trump's FBI Director pick, Kash Patel, went to war with Democrat Senator Amy Klobuchar during today's long and intense confirmation hearing.
**[Watch Patel and Klobuchar's CLASH below: ](https://substack.com/redirect/73334a44-7f69-4d9b-b176-a163902e1357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/73334a44-7f69-4d9b-b176-a163902e1357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Klobuchar pressed Patel on his past claims that the FBI has become a corrupt political weapon.
"Did you say that the FBI HQ should be shut down and reopened as a museum of the deep state?" the senator asked Patel.
Patel refused to acknowledge her question and instead fired back with a blanket rebuke of her line of questioning.
"Any accusations leveled against me, that I would somehow put political bias before the Constitution, are grotesquely unfair!!" Patel fired back at Klobuchar. "I have been endorsed by over 300,000 law enforcement officers to become the next Director of the FBI, let's ask them!!"
[Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/73334a44-7f69-4d9b-b176-a163902e1357?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Presented By American Alternative Assets](https://substack.com/redirect/d02e5a89-f095-4589-8dce-409273325e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# BREAKING: For the first time in American history, U.S. interest payments now exceed our entire defense budget.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d02e5a89-f095-4589-8dce-409273325e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The numbers are staggering:
* $36 trillion in national debt
* Every 1% rate increase = $90 billion in new costs
* Gold surging past $2,750 as central banks buy at fastest pace in history
* Over 1,082 metric tons of gold purchased by central banks in 2022 alone

As Trump prepares to retake office, a showdown with the Fed could determine the fate of your retirement savings. Smart money isn't waiting - central banks are racing to accumulate gold before 2025.
**[Get our FREE guide, "Fed vs Trump:](https://substack.com/redirect/d02e5a89-f095-4589-8dce-409273325e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** The Coming Battle for America's Financial Future" to learn:
✓ Why central banks are stockpiling gold at record rates
✓ How gold rose from $35 to $850 during the last debt crisis
✓ Why experts predict gold could hit $9,000 as this crisis unfolds
✓ How to protect your savings before it's too late
[Get Free Guide](https://substack.com/redirect/d02e5a89-f095-4589-8dce-409273325e85?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# What you didn't see on T.V. at Kash Patel's confirmation hearing today:
**By Richie McGinniss**
From the moment I showed up to wait in line outside the Hart Senate Office Building for Kash Patel's confirmation hearing, it was clear that it was going to be an icy affair. Next to me in line, anti-Kash students were offering stickers.
Ashli Babbitt's mother was in attendance to support Patel's nomination.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/207eedfd-0b11-4300-b209-f13239eb6797?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
There were also a fair number of people who didn't want to see Kash become the next FBI Director.
While the attendees refrained from the all-too-common protest interruptions for the duration of the hearing, the Senators were full of jokes, games, and plenty of screaming too.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/f0e02cee-834a-45a5-b7e9-10fd9e973da7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Senator Tillis brought his own game of bingo.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/cd620cb7-93e1-4559-8fbd-9e183ea50850?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The hearing was anything but bipartisan, with January 6 being the Democrats' primary grounds for attack. But a broad range of topics were covered, as evidenced by the "K$H BINGO" card that I filled out as the hearing progressed. I hit double bingo before the Senators even got to their second round of questions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/85c367e0-f06e-4b6e-a530-1404511848e9?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The most heated exchange came from... **[You guessed it! Senator Adam Schiff.](https://substack.com/redirect/42d67b9f-877d-4aa1-a399-da844af8f85e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Leaning into the topic of January 6, Schiff demanded that Patel turn around and look at the Capitol Police officers behind him. Patel refused and instead replied, "I'm looking at you."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/42d67b9f-877d-4aa1-a399-da844af8f85e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
The hearing was especially long, and after a lunch recess I returned to Senator Booker sparring with Patel over Trump's recent firings at the FBI.
Most of the audience who showed up to oppose Patel's nomination did not return for the second half. Their seats either remained empty or were replaced by supporters wearing MAGA hats and various forms of Trump gear.
Despite the high stakes of Patel's impending confirmation for FBI Director, there were many moments of levity too. As always, Senator Kennedy was full of one liners that had the audience in stitches.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/58db8427-62cb-40f8-86a8-6399f305f7ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
But Patel remained calm and collected for the duration. I was not surprised to see this because I have played in the same hockey league as Patel for more than five years. He isn't afraid to hold the blueline, nor does he feign from getting his elbows dirty in the corner if it means retrieving the puck for his team. For evidence of Patel's tenacity on the ice, look no further than the quotes I gathered from members of his team.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/b22c506c-03d7-4bce-bfcf-844e6813e9cd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/bf13b4f4-833d-460a-a494-516a67a39ebe?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7d6b708d-c4cb-409c-b6b5-389169a5ef54?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5a9a4f39-05b7-41c0-a526-9807086608a0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
After the confirmation hearing concluded, there were claps from the audience as if he had just won the game. If Patel's on-ice play is any indicator, he will fight as hard as he can for confirmation. But that remains the decision of the United States Senate. Regardless of which way the puck bounces, perhaps it is appropriate to conclude with a quote by The Great One, Wayne Gretzky, "You miss 100% of the shots you don't take."

Tina for Oregon [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP12/1/92654/images/TinaForOregon-Logo-FullColor-white.png]
Kotek, Rayfield decry Trump administration’s federal funding freeze
— KOIN, January 28, 2025
Kotek called the blocked access to federal funds a “dereliction of the federal government’s duty to protect Americans.”
“When the government in real time is not providing reimbursement to the state, it is not upholding its promise that was set by Congress to provide these dollars to the states.” Kotek said. “It’s our understanding those dollars cannot be taken back without an act of Congress but yet today, we cannot seek reimbursement through those systems that should be available for the State of Oregon.”
PITCH IN [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-em-jan2025]
Peter — Tina is fighting to uphold the values of Oregonians, especially in light of the federal policies coming out of Washington.
This week, the Presidential Administration attempted to block Oregonians’ federal dollars, taking money away from our most vulnerable communities in order to hand out another tax break to billionaires.
Nationwide, families with children who rely on Medicaid have been jeopardized. Kids who rely on programs like Head Start have been jeopardized. Real people depend on these dollars to make ends meet.
Thankfully, following public outcry, the federal administration reversed course. But this likely won’t be the end of it.
Tina will always fight to ensure we’re making progress on the priorities that matter to Oregonians: ending homelessness, expanding access to healthcare, and providing every child with a safe place to receive high-quality education. clean_body: Tina for Oregon [] Kotek, Rayfield decry Trump administration’s federal funding freeze — KOIN, January 28, 2025 Kotek called the blocked access to federal funds a “dereliction of the federal government’s duty to protect Americans.” “When the government in real time is not providing reimbursement to the state, it is not upholding its promise that was set by Congress to provide these dollars to the states.” Kotek said. “It’s our understanding those dollars cannot be taken back without an act of Congress but yet today, we cannot seek reimbursement through those systems that should be available for the State of Oregon.” PITCH IN [] Peter — Tina is fighting to uphold the values of Oregonians, especially in light of the federal policies coming out of Washington. This week, the Presidential Administration attempted to block Oregonians’ federal dollars, taking money away from our most vulnerable communities in order to hand out another tax break to billionaires. Nationwide, families with children who rely on Medicaid have been jeopardized. Kids who rely on programs like Head Start have been jeopardized. Real people depend on these dollars to make ends meet. Thankfully, following public outcry, the federal administration reversed course. But this likely won’t be the end of it. Tina will always fight to ensure we’re making progress on the priorities that matter to Oregonians: ending homelessness, expanding access to healthcare, and providing every child with a safe place to receive high-quality education. If you’re with us, Tina could really use a boost from this grassroots team today. Can we count on you to pitch in? [=] If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: CHIP IN $5 NOW [] CHIP IN $10 NOW [] CHIP IN $25 NOW [] CHIP IN $50 NOW [] CHIP IN $100 NOW [] ANOTHER AMOUNT [] Tina is standing firm and won’t back down from this fight. Thanks for your support today. — Team Tina Tina for Oregon PO Box 42307 Portland, OR 97242 tinafororegon.com [] | info@tinafororegon.com [info@tinafororegon.com] Paid for by Friends of Tina Kotek

Peter, we can’t stress this enough: The next four years are going to be an uphill battle as we push back against President Trump’s chaotic plans for our country.

That’s why we’re getting ready to elect leaders — from local to federal races — who will stand up and help defend our communities.

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtMtM9o7MpfQTM1SqECAoa92rPAx68Y6mdqXyYWBR1qd9VDDv7BzrlYwkp5G4_s7dV8sGKBPvJo5uNj2O6y0axDcWMNJ_BVGqyXgtMIZDBynsIHtHSYDMm356pfWet1CYy9BBpAEX_Zy9mucWuZlgtS5-LODCf8qZb0bOGxSsqGdqz9Xv_ozegNUeY0PaNCA6anwDPIzXHA5jpYmcyFH-xUVFeHtC7j2K1NlFQZEks-VTgMhcdYVxpDS9cG9XWEDmuuU-59U9sti7xL-ai-iCHnd2AE9KKwu3EaOgVibbywxu46HuIto0PGtJKSNJmV3ycSvpxNeO1YgLQU_O3MalW4xxDcPg1-GnvDE2tgVxICZXeLKXTRRQ7YlIjaArAyxNx1hcXeDxfs7mpOHlccu8T6pRDJqoKuQlvWX6M6hgGeDw/4dl/zSIEtCqqRzOmaGezHU_Rvg/h12/h001.w4gGBknWs04VfevhDQNyeHGJS61qYhzuF0Ag4GPmhhQ) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | | Peter, LAST CALL! | | Peter, we can’t stress this enough: The next four years are going to be an uphill battle as we push back against President Trump’s chaotic plans for our country. That’s why we’re getting ready to elect leaders — from local to federal races — who will stand up and help defend our communities. But this work isn’t easy, and it isn’t cheap. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 500 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Dan Carr
subject: Freedom Frontline Launch
body:
Tomorrow Is The Big Day

| |
---|---|---
|
# Freedom Frontline Launch
### Tomorrow Is The Big Day
| | | [Dan Carr](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
| Jan 30
---
| [](https://substack.com/@freedomfrontline1776)
---
Dear Friend,
I'm excited to invite you to be part of something big! Tomorrow, we kick off the very first episode of _Freedom Frontline_ --a platform dedicated to defending faith, freedom, and conservative values.[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/41bd3f2b-2517-4b29-baeb-46114c0dc56f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[CLICK HERE TO CHECK OUT THE WEBSITE:](https://substack.com/redirect/41bd3f2b-2517-4b29-baeb-46114c0dc56f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
[](https://substack.com/redirect/cdc68c6d-cc2b-46c2-bbce-f9ac7ef0336c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
We'll tackle the issues that matter, expose the truth the mainstream won't tell you, and equip patriots like you with the knowledge to stand strong for America. You won't want to miss it!
Subscribe now to stay updated and be part of this movement from the very beginning:
**[Subscribe to Freedom Frontline YouTube Channel:](https://substack.com/redirect/ad82e55e-a0b8-4011-bcf4-d36c9cbd6d9b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Together, we'll fight for the future of our country.
God Bless,
Dan Carr
_Freedom Frontline_
(C) 2025 Dan Carr
18237 Hwy 53, Gulfport, MS 39503
[Unsubscribe](https://substack..gCMj6g5-sEGEActnbjXbSFYpFS9ZPYdnDHL6QHxnCwU?)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/fd27eaaf-19f8-4050-aa8b-318498710fde?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)[](https://substack..8wfmZexmg7ZFGi86DsSWgPbN6XB-IVrzEbpDtE_OAZw?)
