subject: 🚨 Open Seat in MI 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
This gives Senate Republicans a HUGE advantage in a battleground state - Michigan. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=57e63a7ad2af4d8e9a94765729f31797&_e=lTSKyrcMtKd5GZgEh1pgvcuRbvKFhvH4tO4vpYpZm7E13DacE_c2BLP3s-7AqM8qCE36gQEcjzPYMUOqq90giX-vDyG0rhLsuBH2i0neWPmIgCo3qOfSKdD03tLVgGh4kKBpWCnbhS2wJjcQnVabC3ioyI4krc9cX-KmwMYeybSdvCkI-eXcWP23J_gBUMF82ABz_u5ZJO_w3d4rTQtmB9O9bb0fY60uJHr5TLwg571s37gd6kOxOqg9VdtRlNE1gzvm8s51r07R1rQv6gp9WsK6AT-4pNt1aLzm4YFD9Q9ceLAnwcziGCilruavDXz3XZL6zNXhGeCgioHZixJVz01ZlAT1kYBkwEpb7oID8LHwwtQHERv8gi3vRcZExbbUrdCPCCxjwfLJqMvxxkYP70XAfZBjVLAABsJgwPNC9UMHdau_u2T-dk2uon5jNLIDrDpZgm3yKPBgChokQBJyqVeXqhLN7GCUCPE9nLKwwKE%3D)
NRSC Chairman Tim Scott is absolutely right. _**Michigan is better off without Gary Peters.**_

An open Senate seat in Michigan is a HUGE opportunity for us to build our majority, but we must make sure that a conservative replaces him. Someone who will work with President Trump and Senate Republicans to enact an America First Agenda.

name: Michael Bennet
subject: Matter of life and death –
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BENNET FOR COLORADO
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250130_janeom_rfkjr_actrs [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250130_janeom_rfkjr_actrs]
Hi friends,
Yesterday marked Robert F. Kennedy Jr.’s first confirmation hearing to be Trump's Secretary of Health & Human Services. I pressed RFK Jr. on his long history of spouting [https://x.com/cspan/status/1884639007289507891?s=46&t=KTj4maKiiL_od0iuE4DDjw&nvep=&hmac=&emci=bdc1d9d7-6bde-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] conspiracy theories [https://x.com/cspan/status/1884639007289507891?s=46&t=KTj4maKiiL_od0iuE4DDjw&nvep=&hmac=&emci=bdc1d9d7-6bde-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=] , which is disqualifying for anyone seeking public office, but especially for someone nominated to be the highest health official in America.
Here’s what we learned about where RFK Jr. stands:
– RFK Jr. believes COVID-19 is a genetically engineered bio-weapon used to target Black and White people while sparing Ashkenazi Jews and Chinese people.
– RFK Jr. believes Lyme disease is highly likely a military-engineered bio-weapon.
– RFK Jr. believes exposing children to pesticides causes them to become transgender.
This isn’t a joke. Unlike other positions the Senate confirms, the job of the Health and Human Services Secretary is a matter of life and death. This matters too much to the kids and the families all across our country who can’t access basic health care and mental health services.
This job is too serious for someone like RFK Jr.
If you stand with common sense and against RFK Jr’s conspiracy theories, please stand with me today. I’m doing everything in my power to make sure he does not become our next Secretary of Health and Human Services. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/q12025-uplift?refcode=EM_250130_janeom_rfkjr_actrs]

Thank you,
Michael

name: Jane Fonda
subject: Minnesota. Virginia. Two wins. One clear message.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
Our movement is working. But we have to keep building.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101271053/525428794/1328794144?refcode=ea.a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzZDc4M2QxLTVjZGYtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JQMZj6jt1TPWogVG8Fa4RN2UnYYu_2oLDoLfrYf96XQ=&emci=e5938bcb-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=4823105)
---
The last few weeks have been a whirlwind. Donald Trump pardoned insurrectionists, declared a national energy emergency to greenlight drilling, and pulled the U.S. out of the Paris Climate Agreement — again. And every day that I turn on the news, there is another attack on democracy, the planet, or basic human decency. It feels overwhelming. Exhausting, even. But here’s the truth: No matter how many executive orders he signs, no matter how many reckless stunts he pulls, he can’t change one thing — the power of grassroots organizing. This month, we proved that. **Together, we kicked off 2025 with important down-ballot victories for climate champions in two special elections. These wins set the stage for what’s possible this year.[But to keep winning, we need to keep organizing. My team set an ambitious goal to raise $60,000 this month from emails like this one to fuel the next wave of critical races. Can you chip in today to help us propel more climate champions to victory?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101271054/525428795/2105508926?refcode=ea.a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzZDc4M2QxLTVjZGYtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JQMZj6jt1TPWogVG8Fa4RN2UnYYu_2oLDoLfrYf96XQ=)** | 🌍 **Virginia** was one of the first battlegrounds of 2025, and the stakes were high. With the state Senate hanging by a thread, Republicans saw **Senate District 32** as their chance to seize control — paving the way for Trump’s allies to roll back clean energy progress and open the state to more drilling. But we fought back. And we won. **Kannan Srinivasan’s** victory keeps Virginia’s Senate in pro-climate hands, ensuring that Trump’s agenda hits a wall at the state level. 🌍 In **Minnesota** , **Doron Clark’s** victory in **Senate District 60** flipped the state Senate back to a one-seat Democratic majority this week, breaking a 33-33 deadlock. This win means Minnesota can move full speed ahead on its ambitious climate goals (for now) — just as Trump and his fossil fuel allies try to drag us backward at the federal level.
---
No matter what happens in Washington, state and local leaders are the ones deciding whether polluters can dump toxins into our air and water with impunity. Whether our communities invest in clean energy. Whether we fight for a livable future — or let Trump and Big Oil rip it away.
With over 100,000 down-ballot seats on the line this year, even the smallest races can have a massive impact. _Some of the most critical state legislatures are controlled by just one or two seats._ That means one special election victory can literally determine the balance of power.
But this work takes resources. **Your support could be the difference between victory and defeat in the fights ahead.**
**[Can you make a donation before the end-of-month deadline to help elect more climate champions and stop Trump’s allies in their tracks?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/101271055/525428796/2105508926?refcode=ea.a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ms=ea.a3d783d1-5cdf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImEzZDc4M2QxLTVjZGYtZWYxMS04OGY4LTAwMjI0ODJhOTU3OSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=JQMZj6jt1TPWogVG8Fa4RN2UnYYu_2oLDoLfrYf96XQ=)**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Our movement is working. But we have to keep building. | The last few weeks have been a whirlwind. Donald Trump pardoned insurrectionists, declared a national energy emergency to greenlight drilling, and pulled the U.S. out of the Paris Climate Agreement — again. And every day that I turn on the news, there is another attack on democracy, the planet, or basic human decency. It feels overwhelming. Exhausting, even. But here’s the truth: No matter how many executive orders he signs, no matter how many reckless stunts he pulls, he can’t change one thing — the power of grassroots organizing. This month, we proved that. Together, we kicked off 2025 with important down-ballot victories for climate champions in two special elections. These wins set the stage for what’s possible this year.= | 🌍 Virginia was one of the first battlegrounds of 2025, and the stakes were high. With the state Senate hanging by a thread, Republicans saw Senate District 32 as their chance to seize control — paving the way for Trump’s allies to roll back clean energy progress and open the state to more drilling. But we fought back. And we won. Kannan Srinivasan’s victory keeps Virginia’s Senate in pro-climate hands, ensuring that Trump’s agenda hits a wall at the state level. 🌍 In Minnesota , Doron Clark’s victory in Senate District 60 flipped the state Senate back to a one-seat Democratic majority this week, breaking a 33-33 deadlock. This win means Minnesota can move full speed ahead on its ambitious climate goals (for now) — just as Trump and his fossil fuel allies try to drag us backward at the federal level. No matter what happens in Washington, state and local leaders are the ones deciding whether polluters can dump toxins into our air and water with impunity. Whether our communities invest in clean energy. Whether we fight for a livable future — or let Trump and Big Oil rip it away. With over 100,000 down-ballot seats on the line this year, even the smallest races can have a massive impact. Some of the most critical state legislatures are controlled by just one or two seats. That means one special election victory can literally determine the balance of power. But this work takes resources. Your support could be the difference between victory and defeat in the fights ahead. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s keep going. In solidarity, Jane Fonda = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

Hi Friend,
We are fighting back! There’s too much at stake not to!

While Trump and the MAGA majority continue their assault on the foundation of our democracy, Term Limit the Court is building a movement to stop the right-wing MAGA majority on Trump’s Supreme Court from rolling over our constitutional rights to form a country we do not recognize.

This is Alan Cohn. Term Limit the Court is working with 75 members of the House and Senate to end lifetime appointments to SCOTUS and enact 18-year term limits.

Lifetime jobs, no binding ethics requirements, and no accountability are the reasons justices like Clarence Thomas and Samuel Alito feel free to lead the assault on the rights of women to make their own healthcare decisions and create immunity from prosecution for Trump.

We can get this done, but we need the majority in the House and Senate!

We’re back at work raising what’s needed to back candidates pledging to support the TERM Act.
If you want to start fighting back, too, then join our movement!

Term Limit the Court

* * *
The American people have lost confidence in the Supreme Court after a series of rulings that strike at the core of our freedoms. _There are term limits for a President. Term limits for many governors and state legislators. And the time has come for term limits for members of the Supreme Court._

**Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court.**

Now, we're counting on your help to provide the resources we need to work directly with members of Congress and their staff to support the introduction of term-limit legislation and raise awareness about this legislative solution to the growing distrust in the Supreme Court. =** = SPONSORED BY TERM LIMITS YES, INC. 7903 HAMPTON LAKE DR. TAMPA, FL 33647 Term Limits Yes, Inc. 7903 Hampton Lake Dr. Tampa, FL 33647 United States

name: Abigail Spanberger
subject: I need your help to make this a reality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
To get my name on the ballot, I need to gather 10,000 signatures from voters all across Virginia. It’s a crucial step in the process, and it’s a big challenge—one that will take resources, staff, organization, and a lot of hard work.
Peter,
On the first day of 2025, I officially signed the petition to get my name on the ballot to run for Governor of Virginia! This is a big first step in our campaign, and I’m incredibly excited to hit the road this year, meet Virginians across the Commonwealth, listen to their challenges and aspirations, and work hard to earn their support.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85327?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll)
But I need your help to make this a reality. To get my name on the ballot, I need to gather 10,000 signatures from voters all across Virginia. It’s a crucial step in the process, and it’s a big challenge—one that will take resources, staff, organization, and a lot of hard work. And this is only step one. Once we get on the ballot, then the real work begins.
My campaign is already working to organize events, mobilize volunteers, and fund the materials needed to collect these signatures—everything from petition forms to resources for our dedicated teams out in the field. To reach our goal and secure my place on the ballot, I’m counting on supporters like you to help fund this vital effort.
**[Will you split a contribution today between my campaign and Heartland Patriots to help us gather the signatures we need and keep our momentum going? Every dollar you donate helps us get one step closer to flipping Virginia blue in November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85327?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=3&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=4&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=5&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=6&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=7&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85328?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=8&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/85327?refcode=em20250130-8745&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=9&akid=8745%2E614464%2Ej6Fpll)
---
Thank you,
Abigail Spanberger

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/101272815/525434256/1328194270?source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250130_FR_EOM_6MO_TeamBonnie_NA_NA_EOM2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNDVhZDY2My02MmRmLWVmMTEtODhmOC0wMDIyNDgyYTk1NzkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=NpDqOmV3169Wq56XitXmkLbEigIQhLWb0YJEBfGTMrM=&emci=4e6c04e6-1ddf-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&emdi=c45ad663-62df-ef11-88f8-0022482a9579&ceid=30096098) | The Trump administration is doing everything it can to roll back progress. name: SAFE Colorado
subject: Join Us in Making Colorado Safer – Introducing SAFE Colorado
body:
| |
---
| [View in browser](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ0OTk3Mzg3OTExMzAwMTIxLFwiclwiOjE0NDk5NzM5OTczNjA5MjQ1NH0iLCJzIjoiNjM5NDRiNDQxMTEzYWQ3ZiJ9)

| [ ](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ0OTk3Mzg3OTE3NTkxNTc4LFwiclwiOjE0NDk5NzM5OTczNjA5MjQ1NH0iLCJzIjoiYTg1MmMzMTg2NGYzY2MyYSJ9)
---
|
---
## A Bold Step Toward a Safer Colorado
|
---

Today marks the launch of **SAFE Colorado (Strong Advocates for Enforcement in Colorado)** , a dedicated initiative committed to enhancing public safety across our state. Led by **John Fabbricatore** , Former Field Director of ICE - Colorado & Wyoming, **2024 Republican nominee for Colorado’s 6th Congressional district** , and **Steven Monahan** , 2022 Republican nominee for Colorado’s 6th Congressional district and 20+ year Navy veteran, SAFE Colorado prioritizes the protection of our communities over political agendas and holds leaders accountable for ensuring the security of every U.S. citizen and lawful resident of Colorado.
On January 22, 2025, John Fabbricatore testified before Congress on **Restoring Immigration Enforcement in America** , discussing real solutions to combat the illegal immigration crisis. He is committed to working tirelessly to ensure Colorado is safe and secure. SAFE Colorado is dedicated to:
* **Strengthening coordination** between local, state, and federal law enforcement.
* **Advocating for policies** that prioritize public safety over politics.
* **Holding leaders accountable** for their impact on community security.
*
📢 **Take action now:** Join the 100s of Coloradans that have already signed the pledge supporting a safer path forward for Colorado.

|
---
| | [ **SIGN THE PLEDGE** ](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ0OTk3Mzg3OTIxNzg1ODgzLFwiclwiOjE0NDk5NzM5OTczNjA5MjQ1NH0iLCJzIjoiNTY0MjU0MTdiODZjM2RkOSJ9)
---
|
---
Now, more than ever, we need **your** support to ensure safety remains the top priority in Colorado. **Join us today** by volunteering, advocating, or donating to the cause.
To learn more, please visit [www.SAFEColorado.org](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ0OTk3Mzg3OTI3MDI4NzY0LFwiclwiOjE0NDk5NzM5OTczNjA5MjQ1NH0iLCJzIjoiMTNkZWRhY2Q3MDljYWZkZCJ9)
Thank you for standing with us for a safer Colorado. John Fabbricatore & Steven Monahan
|
---
| | [ **DONATE TODAY** ](https://rpgdxp.clicks.mlsend.com/td/c/eyJ2Ijoie1wiYVwiOjEyOTI0MjMsXCJsXCI6MTQ0OTk3Mzg3OTMxMjIzMDY5LFwiclwiOjE0NDk5NzM5OTczNjA5MjQ1NH0iLCJzIjoiYmUzYzZlNDYxMjg1OWE0YyJ9)

name: URGENT Petition (via Left Action)
subject: Sign: Demand Trump reinstate security protections for Dr. Fauci
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign: Demand Trump reinstate security protections for Dr. Fauci >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2e4d82fc-60d7-4a49-9b11-f6737b13d1d0/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5623d5e7-bf2b-45bd-80d4-e67b13a2cac3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Just days after Trump took office, Trump made the cruel and vindictive decision to revoke Dr. Anthony Fauci’s security detail. Dr. Fauci led our country through the COVID-19 pandemic with strength and grace. He served our country for over 50 years and advised 7 U.S. Presidents. But he has faced a deluge of death threats from the MAGA mob just for doing his job. Revoking his security protections after his dedication to public service is downright cruel and puts him directly in danger. But Trump doesn’t seem to care – he [said](https://default.salsalabs.org/T4a0f8d64-f19f-4937-9f77-fce5bbf7a092/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) he wouldn’t feel any responsibility if Dr. Fauci were to be harmed. This is unacceptable. Trump needs to revoke this decision immediately. His own supporters are threatening Dr. Fauci’s life. [_**Sign your name to demand Trump reinstate security protections for Dr. Fauci >>**_](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc8c79cf3-6075-4b19-8689-0e8841b3ef65/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

name: VoteVets
subject: Trump and his administration are politicizing the deaths of three Servicemembers
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
body:
Their hatred for those who serve knows no bounds. Their disdain for women knows no limits. Their empathy for those left behind is nonexistent.
#
Here’s a timeline for you, Peter:
The FAA, under former Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg, spent the last four years reinforcing safety protocols and hiring more Air Traffic Controllers.
Over that four year stretch there were zero commercial airline fatalities in the United States.
On January 20th, Trump took the White House.
That same day, the administrator of the Federal Aviation Administration resigned under pressure from Elon Musk.
That same day, Donald Trump issued a federal hiring freeze. Countless job offers to qualified applicants were rescinded — potentially including Air Traffic Controllers.
Yesterday, a mid-air collision between a commercial airliner and an Army helicopter over Washington, D.C. left dozens dead. A horrific tragedy.
Today, the Commander in Chief, the Vice President, and the Secretary of Defense are politicizing the deaths of not only 67 people, but three Servicemembers.
Their hatred for those who serve knows no bounds. Their disdain for women knows no limits. Their empathy for those left behind is nonexistent.
This administration wants to dismantle the federal government. They want to reduce trust, degrade service, and demoralize the federal workforce. They’ve frozen federal hiring, and they’re doing everything they can to force out civil servants tasked with issues of critical importance — including the safety of our airways.
If Trump and his administration continue down this path we will all be less safe. We’ve got to do everything we can to stop him.
[**Please, join VoteVets in denouncing Donald Trump for this dereliction of duty. The only way we can force his administration to reverse course is by joining together, raising our voices, and forcing them to act.](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250130_vv_em_politization?refcode=&akid=34127%2E3013755%2E8Z-Z9B)**
| [**ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.votevets.org/signup/250130_vv_em_politization?refcode=&akid=34127%2E3013755%2E8Z-Z9B)
---
Thank you,
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS ACTION FUND
Use of military rank, job titles or photographs in uniform does not imply the endorsement of the Department of Defense, Departments of the Army, Navy, Air Force, or the Marines or Space Force.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here ](https://act.votevets.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=1&akid=34127%2E3013755%2E8Z-Z9B).

name: The Democrats
subject: Tonight, Derek.
body:
This is about more than resisting Trump’s immediate plans.
---
We're reaching out to ask if you can contribute $3 to the DNC tonight. Not tomorrow, not next week, but **tonight.** Here's why: Since Trump was inaugurated just 10 days ago, he and his allies have begun enacting their extreme, dangerous Project 2025 agenda. So far, they have:
* Rescinded President Biden’s executive order to lower prescription drug costs for Americans on Medicare and Medicaid.
* Pardoned more than 1,500 January 6 insurrectionists, including many who committed acts of violence.
* Attempted to end birthright citizenship, which is in the Constitution.
* Eliminated the government website with information on accessing reproductive health care.
* Withdrawn the U.S. from the World Health Organization and Paris Climate Accord.

Democrats can — and will — fight back. **But we’ll need to do more than that.** We have to think beyond resisting Trump’s immediate plans. We _must_ build the long-term infrastructure we’ll need to elect Democrats at every level of government — leaders who will check Trump’s power in their cities, districts, and states. That’s why we’re asking for your help today. The truth is that the more contributions we receive now, while Trump’s term is just beginning, the more effective we can be in investing in state parties all over the country, in organizing against Trump’s worst policies, and ultimately in winning back Congress in 2026 and the White House in 2028. [**You can use this link to make a $3 contribution ahead of our first end-of-month fundraising deadline of 2025:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?refcode=em_20250130_2669_fr&amount=3&refcode2=2669_22930333_KOdzdb&akid=2669%2E22930333%2EKOdzdb) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-january-2025?express_lane=true&amount=3&refcode=em_20250130_2669_fr&refcode2=2669_22930333_KOdzdb&akid=2669%2E22930333%2EKOdzdb)**
